House Republicans have a historically narrow majority. And they're panicking.

| _Joe Kerr is a Democrat, second-generation firefighter, and labor leader running for Congress in CA-40, one of the country's most competitive districts. You are receiving this email because of your support of Democrats in California and across the country. | _We’re not slowing down, Peter._

1) CA-40 is one of the most competitive races in the country...and this seat can be *the* race that determines who controls Congress.

2) House Republicans have a historically narrow majority. _**And they're panicking.**_ Together, we can break their majority.

3) While Trump and Musk are hurting working families and causing total chaos, Joe’s GOP opponent has outright refused to host town halls.

We need leaders in Congress who listen to their constituents and know when to fight back against attempts to hurt hardworking families—not more career politicians.

[_**If you’re with us, will you rush a contribution of $25 or more to our campaign right now to help us build the momentum to take on Young Kim and flip the House?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105521164/538613023/-40941803?refcode=BLU_EM_JKC_2025-04-09_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTVjNGVlYmUtOWUxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fx7Qwkz4mr6eCaEdAhtpVcFLHAhQY2POcC1WyNUi558=)

Before a live studio audience, Jahana will answer questions from the audience and moderators. **This is an incredible opportunity for Jahana to share her priorities with you, her colleagues, and the country.** She is leading the response to attacks on education, SNAP, veterans, and the foundations of our democracy. We invite you to join us in watching Jahana take the stage tomorrow evening. You can view the town hall on CNN tomorrow night, and [subscribers can stream it live online and via mobile apps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105521255/538613832/6939658?refcode=AU_JH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTFhYmZkZS05ZTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADnxCUc-JmfWb8q2TF_fnNOxMoimEkdIeNFeshR8fjM=&emci=241abfde-9e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=451abfde-9e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15529135) Thank you for standing with Jahana! — Team Hayes | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105521256/538613834/-1534047261?refcode=AU_JH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTFhYmZkZS05ZTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ADnxCUc-JmfWb8q2TF_fnNOxMoimEkdIeNFeshR8fjM=)

clean_body: | | Team, did you hear the news? Jahana will be featured in a town hall with battleground members of Congress tomorrow, April 10 at 9 PM ET on CNN. Jahana will join Representatives Derek Tran (D-CA), Mike Lawler (R-NY), and Ryan Mackenzie (R-PA) for a town hall moderated by Jake Tapper and Kaitlan Collins. Before a live studio audience, Jahana will answer questions from the audience and moderators. This is an incredible opportunity for Jahana to share her priorities with you, her colleagues, and the country. She is leading the response to attacks on education, SNAP, veterans, and the foundations of our democracy. We invite you to join us in watching Jahana take the stage tomorrow evening. You can view the town hall on CNN tomorrow night, and Thank you for standing with Jahana! — Team Hayes | = | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: David Hogg
subject: Resistance 2.0
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Protests are a powerful start. But real change needs political power.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250409-1&t=1&akid=1959%2E587540%2EuwNI6D)
This past weekend, people across the country flooded the streets, Peter.
Protesting Trump. Protesting this administration’s cruel, chaotic policies. Protesting the feeling that things are spiraling out of control.
**People are FURIOUS — and rightfully so.** The cost of groceries is rising. Trump’s tariffs are rocking the economy. Basic freedoms are being stripped away. Our planet is on fire. And the far right is only growing bolder.
**We should be mad.** But we need to let that anger drive us to action. And that’s what we’re doing at Leaders We Deserve. We are fighting back by electing the next generation of bold, progressive leaders who understand what’s at stake.
We’re electing young candidates who will fight for our future in state legislatures and Congress. Candidates who aren’t backed by billionaires or corporate PACs but by people like you. Candidates who aren’t going to back down from the fight.
But — this is no exaggeration — we can’t win these fights without major grassroots support from folks like you.
**Because here’s the truth, Peter:**
The Trump administration and the MAGA movement are funded by the ultra-rich and powerful special interests. But our side? We have the power of the grassroots. And that’s what wins elections.
If you marched this weekend, _**THANK YOU**_ for showing up and making your voice heard! Now, if you’re ready to go all in to show the world that there is a powerful opposition to Trump — then we need your help.
This is a major moment to show our strength. **[Peter, will you pitch in $5 now to join our movement and fight for our future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250409-1?refcode=em20250409-1959&amount=5&refcode2=1959_587540_uwNI6D&akid=1959%2E587540%2EuwNI6D)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250409-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250409-1959&refcode2=1959_587540_uwNI6D&akid=1959%2E587540%2EuwNI6D)**
Let’s build the future we deserve. 💥
Thank you,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250409-1&t=2&refcode2=1959_587540_uwNI6D&akid=1959%2E587540%2EuwNI6D)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1959%2E587540%2EuwNI6D)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1959%2E587540%2EuwNI6D)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Keeping people safe in their time of need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105521796/538617261/-319689629?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThmYWNjZWMtOWYxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TT3bKXGRyO6nbq1RS_0nfvkS92G3qA2b_jeYrNs-LpA=) Friend, As we rebuild around Los Angeles, let’s center one value: victims of natural disasters shouldn’t be punished for doing what they need to recover. That’s true whether that punishment is by the government or by price gougers looking to make a quick buck. That’s why I’ve recently announced two bills to protect disaster survivors from just that:
* The **Don’t Penalize Victims Act** is a bipartisan effort that makes sure charitable donations don’t disqualify victims from FEMA aid, by fixing outdated FEMA rules that considered donations a duplication of benefits.

It also clarifies the confusing legalese behind these rules, because the last thing a family in disaster recovery should have to worry about is legal jargon.

* My **Stop Disaster Price Gouging Act** protects families from anyone looking to make a quick buck off their desperation, by prohibiting manufactured price hikes on essential goods, housing and construction materials after a federally-declared disaster.

Any violators will be fined, with the proceeds going right back to disaster victims. It would signal to price gougers that we have zero tolerance for their greed, and that victims shouldn’t have to worry about being taken advantage of in their time of need.

| ****[Read More About these Bills](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105521797/538617262/-720434622?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNThmYWNjZWMtOWYxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TT3bKXGRyO6nbq1RS_0nfvkS92G3qA2b_jeYrNs-LpA=&emci=05fc8ee4-9f15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=58faccec-9f15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8447100)****
---
Families dealing with the aftermath of wildfires deserve protections. I’m committed to standing up for them.
More soon,
Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, As we rebuild around Los Angeles, let’s center one value: victims of natural disasters shouldn’t be punished for doing what they need to recover. That’s true whether that punishment is by the government or by price gougers looking to make a quick buck. That’s why I’ve recently announced two bills to protect disaster survivors from just that: The Don’t Penalize Victims Act is a bipartisan effort that makes sure charitable donations don’t disqualify victims from FEMA aid, by fixing outdated FEMA rules that considered donations a duplication of benefits. It also clarifies the confusing legalese behind these rules, because the last thing a family in disaster recovery should have to worry about is legal jargon. My Stop Disaster Price Gouging Act protects families from anyone looking to make a quick buck off their desperation, by prohibiting manufactured price hikes on essential goods, housing and construction materials after a federally-declared disaster. Any violators will be fined, with the proceeds going right back to disaster victims. It would signal to price gougers that we have zero tolerance for their greed, and that victims shouldn’t have to worry about being taken advantage of in their time of need. | **** Families dealing with the aftermath of wildfires deserve protections. I’m committed to standing up for them. More soon, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! Friend,

I’m Marty O’Donnell. I’m not a politician. I’m a composer, best known for my award-winning work on the highly acclaimed Halo and Destiny video game series.

But even I can tell when the government is completely off-key.

And right now? **Washington’s a noisy mess of waste, fraud, and flat-out corruption.**

That’s why I support what **Elon Musk** is doing – _cutting the fat._

Slashing toxic bureaucracies like USAID, calling out censorship and a bloated government, and fighting for free speech and real innovation.

He’s not doing it for the headlines, and he certainly isn’t doing it for the money. He’s doing it because someone has to.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c6c30617fafc426796279024b4389380&_e=el5HHZzA_5BLcuqjLTgCiQyZirig-lyy5IIUp4OHkgEzyMztLeqWbN9IgomijqnJ1-u9WrGEK_OHYkWTuzCkEpFT8BsUhGP4UWOBYgfdH2wL_dO2HojrlqhyWSp9YhRWCsDtnqWlc14li7KPT894qTB-z4f4dGy1_4c_cZwkR4VfQ04-lE9sAz0ah4ubY3IU0ZEtHjKza5IvM-zdomXfNS28QEM9WFkjLRkboMy9uItcX2yR8jKqnQQPFHmuVm-aShKmjnBH222pxHMrrzCgkY54HB_Ha-toOiYHWCekj69DdxRfreD3lN8n2cvCOZLDXeHeLl3pAMai58AR4jLOaZKbyGd4kT4PVqAKtaLk8tfcPzNcCtS5PENAu7sa-us9EgChYtzCeS7kXH2eIjmvMw%3D%3D)
[**That’s why I’m running for Congress – to go to Washington and help Pres. Trump and Elon rip out the rot and rebuild this country from the ground up.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c6c30617fafc426796279024b4389380&_e=el5HHZzA_5BLcuqjLTgCiQyZirig-lyy5IIUp4OHkgEzyMztLeqWbN9IgomijqnJ1-u9WrGEK_OHYkWTuzCkEpFT8BsUhGP4UWOBYgfdH2wL_dO2HojrlqhyWSp9YhRWCsDtnqWlc14li7KPT894qTB-z4f4dGy1_4c_cZwkR4VfQ04-lE9sAz0ah4ubY3IU0ZEtHjKza5IvM-zdomXfNS28QEM9WFkjLRkboMy9uItcX2yR8jKqnQQPFHmuVm-adM2qIVnVBsV-8LeAgMqWHxiOxBCNdRMiJEl0oamxLguAb_j5nJf2BCVHj-UdPh_HOpyBo9XxIk5hTka1QzZwo6lBbxTQL6ZE66dT8CbzjK7hgF_AaB0EozAoRdVHy9TpADoiDa1W-P53AoU-wUvIOg%3D%3D) I believe in a lean, smart government that works _for the People_ – not for consultants, cronies, or globalist grifters.

And if that makes me “extreme” in my radical left opponent Susie Lee’s eyes? Good.

I’d rather be called extreme than be a part of the same broken system that gave us **$36 trillion in debt** and speech police posing as public servants.

If you’re ready to send a message to the swamp – help me get there.

👉 [**Chip in $7, $28, $117, or whatever you can afford right now. Let’s fight back.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c6c30617fafc426796279024b4389380&_e=el5HHZzA_5BLcuqjLTgCiQyZirig-lyy5IIUp4OHkgEzyMztLeqWbN9IgomijqnJ1-u9WrGEK_OHYkWTuzCkEpFT8BsUhGP4UWOBYgfdH2wL_dO2HojrlqhyWSp9YhRWCsDtnqWlc14li7KPT894qTB-z4f4dGy1_4c_cZwkR4VfQ04-lE9sAz0ah4ubY3IU0ZEtHjKza5IvM-zdomXfNS28QEM9WFkjLRkboMy9uItcX2yR8jKqnQQPFHmuVm-ab17AzTOHMSbxANztIGudo3hTegCqeALMbiP2cuvMTHK44IZOl5lrjfZCugd8insQpBusrBaRRq2qp25ysHJjL0KfTCo9ZNFrOyJGYNXv_FMEs0HfpPONIXl5T9iNETseXY1-EbwR2AGC5BUN92P4Bg%3D%3D)

We’re building a movement. Not just around politics – around truth, efficiency, and freedom.

Let’s put the adults back in charge.

Thanks,

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for Congress, NV-03

[ ** JOIN MARTY WITH $7 » **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=c6c30617fafc426796279024b4389380&_e=el5HHZzA_5BLcuqjLTgCiQyZirig-lyy5IIUp4OHkgEzyMztLeqWbN9IgomijqnJ1-u9WrGEK_OHYkWTuzCkEpFT8BsUhGP4UWOBYgfdH2wL_dO2HojrlqhyWSp9YhRWCsDtnqWlc14li7KPT894qTB-z4f4dGy1_4c_cZwkR4VfQ04-lE9sAz0ah4ubY3IU0ZEtHjKza5IvM-zdomXfNS28QEM9WFkjLRkboMy9uItcX2yR8jKqnQQPFHmuVm-aTvnH_759DsTzcXx3YMBMgz__mEX9nXsKYXfNPuinHiApb6UL36brY6Py0bfUIovJ96Yxgkw8TPkwbxGzlfNgPyuf3Noxbcde3cGp0YtmsqTfgzRVmW_0c2bDFGsnwZSq2Y1hqz0WenrpEr6AWks2fg%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: The GOP is already targeting New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We’ve got 48 hours to prove we’re ready for this fight.
Peter,
I’ve been overwhelmed by all the support we’ve received since launching our Senate campaign less than a week ago. Longtime friends and new supporters have come together in a big way to build a strong foundation for our fight for New Hampshire.
Still, we know we have a long fight ahead. Donald Trump is already weighing in on our race. That’s right: **Donald Trump, the man attacking the livelihoods of Granite Staters with his irrational tariffs, thinks he can anoint the next Senator from New Hampshire.**
We’ve created an **_Emergency Trump Response Fund_** and are setting a bold goal to raise **$100,000 in the next 48 hours** before our week one fundraising deadline.
It’s a test of strength and it sends a message — to the GOP, to national observers, and to the deep-pocketed donors trying to buy this seat — that we’re ready to compete and win.
**[Peter, we can only reach this fundraising goal with your support. Will you split $10 between our Emergency Trump Response Fund and Heartland Patriots? Every dollar makes a real difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87739?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_)**
**Let’s be clear:** Republicans are already targeting New Hampshire. We know they’ll be flooding the state with corporate money and building their infrastructure to flip this seat. **Donald Trump is trying to hand pick a Republican opponent to run against me.**
National Republicans know how much is at stake in the Granite State – _and so do we._
We can’t sit on the sidelines of this fight, not with our families’s futures in jeopardy and our democracy on the line. We _have_ to win. **Our state and country are depending on us.**
**[Peter, if you’re with me, will you split a $10 donation today between our campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us reach our goal and show we’re ready to keep New Hampshire’s pivotal Senate seat blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87739?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87740?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87740?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87740?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87740?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87740?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87740?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87739?refcode=em20250409-8875&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8875%2E614464%2E3whX1_)

Chris

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Total chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Trump’s tariffs...
What are they? (Taxes on the American people.) When are they? (Unknown.) Where are they? (On an island only inhabited by penguins.) Paused? (It seems so.) Un-paused? (Could be.) National emergency at the Canada border? (Sham.)
I don’t think Trump himself even knows the answers to these questions!
But here’s one thing we know for sure: Uncertainty is horrible for the U.S. economy.
A “pause” for 90 days on all announced tariffs except China. But wait — 10% on every other country during the pause? And maybe different on Canada and Mexico? And on cars from most countries?
So, companies will “pause” investment decisions until they know what the hell is going on.
This isn’t leadership, and it’s not even showmanship. It’s a sinking ship, and we’re all on it.
I’m going to use every single legislative tool at my disposal to fight back against these wildly ill-conceived and ill-advised trade wars Trump is determined to get us into. We’ve already had one victory with the Senate passage of my resolution to un-do Trump’s Canada tariffs, and we’re working hard on more action.
This fight is going to take all of us. Members of Congress standing up and showing backbone, no matter what their party registration is. People all across the country vocally and vehemently sharing their concerns with those in power. And a strong grassroots movement to support leaders who will do right by the American people.
If you’re ready to be a part of this, please consider pitching in whatever you can to my Common Ground PAC today. We’re all about sending folks to public office who will create jobs and economic opportunity — not bicker and cower when the going gets rough. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
More to come on the latest ways we’re fighting back.
Thank you so much for standing strong. I’m with you!
-Tim Kaine

While Trump’s playing games with tariffs, some of the highest taxes were hitting European wine and spirits. That made it way more expensive for American restaurants, importers, and consumers — all while retaliation from Europe slammed the brakes on California wine exports. So instead of lowering costs like he promised, Trump made your glass of wine pricier — and made enemies out of our allies. All bluster, no bottle. 🙄 This isn’t strategy. It’s stupidity. And frankly, it’s time Trump put a cork in it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Donald Trump promised us one thing: lower costs on Day 1. It’s now Day 78, and all he’s done is hike up the American people’s tab, kneecap small businesses, and make enemies out of some of our closest allies. = = From our wine growers and farmers to working families and retirees, I’m fighting to lower costs so the American people don’t have cash out just to put food on the table. Thanks for having my back. — Eric | = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. name: Tim Scott
subject: Thom Tillis will ALWAYS put America First.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, I'm committed to growing our Senate majority in 2026--and that starts with defending key seats like North Carolina.

Thom Tillis is a proven conservative fighter who has stood on the frontlines with me for years. Together, we've worked tirelessly to lower taxes, secure our border, and push back on the radical Left-wing agenda.

I'm proud of all we've accomplished, and there is so much more to do--especially now that President Trump is back in the White House.

**[But make no mistake: The liberal establishment is coming for this seat, and every dollar will make a difference in this critical race.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UiEjlkEs9nSSnyfP6J0oVQ~~/AAVLBhA~/PFEtKdkORokxy5yWbo5LmlbDWYMRGJOSOj6cSc4ypBD8y1H9wBrWcxRfU3ZzDbVwrV1I0DF6S2D2q5sv7nWGXVhaJaMAdCtSs8FEZGzA7aUMMuARloYOXAnw4Y5ZR3Bz-wn2FeXroBdmD0wX30WXzorHLibX5I-jHu4kHbzsHzmTupES-oQNG2vla07vBV3vPJp5T2WU4ygm9TGjiN5IS7cGZXmN3rA9oivtl1fQa7El8OtHQOzTPNhb3HRgaSm_1ktiwGEh4eShQCgFrMR_cas0wNQFRTYy6THdjXaHtCf3VrVXgr03zX4wQf3p7pJxqQ2fzGWBwh7qXHSh5Fa2CF8tcDG-RnoeaKxDlUMWVPDQ652AUVcnX6nL1zyo3iXYMVA3YRo2SSqJnOLVXTdFYA~~)**

******************************************************[Support North Carolina Now](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UiEjlkEs9nSSnyfP6J0oVQ~~/AAVLBhA~/PFEtKdkORokxy5yWbo5LmlbDWYMRGJOSOj6cSc4ypBD8y1H9wBrWcxRfU3ZzDbVwrV1I0DF6S2D2q5sv7nWGXVhaJaMAdCtSs8FEZGzA7aUMMuARloYOXAnw4Y5ZR3Bz-wn2FeXroBdmD0wX30WXzorHLibX5I-jHu4kHbzsHzmTupES-oQNG2vla07vBV3vPJp5T2WU4ygm9TGjiN5IS7cGZXmN3rA9oivtl1fQa7El8OtHQOzTPNhb3HRgaSm_1ktiwGEh4eShQCgFrMR_cas0wNQFRTYy6THdjXaHtCf3VrVXgr03zX4wQf3p7pJxqQ2fzGWBwh7qXHSh5Fa2CF8tcDG-RnoeaKxDlUMWVPDQ652AUVcnX6nL1zyo3iXYMVA3YRo2SSqJnOLVXTdFYA~~)******************************************************

Let's keep Thom where we need him most: fighting for North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas AG Ken Paxton launches Senate primary challenge against Republican Sen. John Cornyn** ," AP's**Nadia Lathan** -- "Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton** is running for the U.S. Senate in a primary challenge against Republican Sen. **John Cornyn** , setting up what is likely to become one of the GOP's most contentious and expensive contests of 2026.

Paxton, a close ally of President **Donald Trump** , made the announcement Tuesday after spending more than a year openly flirting with a Senate challenge. During that time, Paxton has sought to position himself as a national leader among the GOP's ascendant hard right, launching some of the first criminal investigations in the U.S. over [abortion bans](https://substack.com/redirect/c0f43301-d4e8-47e9-8cec-24299a7ae0da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [gender-affirming care](https://substack.com/redirect/a31e684b-05d4-4d14-b4df-ae0a1feae1dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for transgender youth.

His entry into the race, which he made official in an interview on Fox News' "The Ingraham Angle," comes as Paxton is no longer shadowed by legal troubles that had hung over him for nearly a decade but did not weaken his ability to [win reelection](https://substack.com/redirect/709ee60c-0b98-407d-9c12-8637081024a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) twice.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/6c9f390a-0ee8-4557-99f2-24229b377a36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I'm running for U.S. Senate to fight for President Trump's agenda and take a sledgehammer to the D.C. establishment," Paxton said in a post on X. "Together, let's send John Cornyn packing."

Cornyn's campaign responded by calling his challenger a "fraud" and leaning into Paxton's historic impeachment in 2023 after eight of his closest aides accused him of corruption and reported him to the FBI. Paxton was [later acquitted in a trial the Texas Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/7cfea1cd-6489-4934-a978-1ae48e494eb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where his wife is a state senator but was not allowed to cast a vote.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/6c9f390a-0ee8-4557-99f2-24229b377a36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This will be a spirited campaign and we assure Texans they will have a real choice when this race is over," Cornyn's campaign said in a statement.

Paxton's decision to enter the race highlights his political resiliency and popularity among Texas Republicans after a decade of legal woes that, at times, seemed to imperil his future: felony securities fraud charges, impeachment after an extraordinary revolt by his closest aides and an FBI corruption investigation. Paxton reached a deal to end the criminal case and the [Biden administration quietly decided](https://substack.com/redirect/91959584-e501-426e-8c67-6d8a5ba94df1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) not to prosecute him.

Cornyn, a respected and popular senator within the GOP conference in Washington, will likely now have to face his most competitive campaign since taking office in 2002.

He recently [lost his bid to lead the GOP](https://substack.com/redirect/2d642ea5-3fba-46ba-919f-bc06296446e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as Senate majority leader in November after he spent several years as Sen. **Mitch McConnell 's** No. 2 in leadership. A former Texas attorney general and state Supreme Court justice, Cornyn has helped the party raise millions of dollars throughout his decades-long career and has worked with Democrats on bipartisan bills.

Cornyn has received criticism from Paxton and other Republicans after he suggested that Trump might not be the best Republican candidate for the 2024 presidential election.

Paxton has also expressed discontent with Cornyn's support of a 2022 bipartisan gun bill that strengthened background checks for buyers under 21, increased prosecution for unlicensed sellers and funds for youth mental health services in the wake of the Uvalde, Texas, elementary school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers.

Amidst several legal battles, the Texas attorney general has become a well-known figure on the right for his litigation against former President **Joe Biden**. Notably, Paxton led a lawsuit attempting to overturn Trump's loss to Biden in 2020, an effort that the U.S. Supreme Court rejected.

In 2023, the GOP-controlled Texas House voted to impeach Paxton for bribery offenses related to [a wealthy real estate donor](https://substack.com/redirect/27a585c0-229f-49fd-9e29-6394daff4551?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) before his acquittal in the Senate, where Paxton was once a lawmaker. The Justice Department decided not to pursue its investigation into Paxton over the allegations in the final weeks of former President Biden's term, according to two people familiar with the matter who spoke to The Associated Press on the condition of anonymity.

Earlier this month, a district court awarded [a combined $6.6 million](https://substack.com/redirect/b0ef14cf-c46c-40d5-90c6-c95596cd4cb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to four former senior Paxton aides in a whistleblower lawsuit after they were fired shortly after reporting Paxton's actions to the FBI. Paxton's office has said he will appeal.

In 2022, when Paxton was last on the ballot, Republican **George P. Bush** made Paxton's legal troubles the cornerstone of a primary challenge. Paxton [won easily](https://substack.com/redirect/de625365-4574-498d-8ff9-7ffe93ba8312?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a runoff.

A Democrat has yet to enter next year's Senate race in Texas, where their party hasn't won a statewide office in more than 30 years." [AP](https://substack.com/redirect/88c14979-784b-4b6f-8d48-c8bed4a4f612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

During that time, Paxton has sought to position himself as a national leader among the GOP's ascendant hard right, launching some of the first criminal investigations in the U.S. over and for transgender youth. His entry into the race, which he made official in an interview on Fox News' "The Ingraham Angle," comes as Paxton is no longer shadowed by legal troubles that had hung over him for nearly a decade but did not weaken his ability to twice. "I'm running for U.S. Senate to fight for President Trump's agenda and take a sledgehammer to the D.C. establishment," Paxton said in a post on X. "Together, let's send John Cornyn packing." Cornyn's campaign responded by calling his challenger a "fraud" and leaning into Paxton's historic impeachment in 2023 after eight of his closest aides accused him of corruption and reported him to the FBI. Paxton was , where his wife is a state senator but was not allowed to cast a vote. "This will be a spirited campaign and we assure Texans they will have a real choice when this race is over," Cornyn's campaign said in a statement. Paxton's decision to enter the race highlights his political resiliency and popularity among Texas Republicans after a decade of legal woes that, at times, seemed to imperil his future: felony securities fraud charges, impeachment after an extraordinary revolt by his closest aides and an FBI corruption investigation. Paxton reached a deal to end the criminal case and the not to prosecute him. Cornyn, a respected and popular senator within the GOP conference in Washington, will likely now have to face his most competitive campaign since taking office in 2002. He recently as Senate majority leader in November after he spent several years as Sen. Mitch McConnell 's No. 2 in leadership. A former Texas attorney general and state Supreme Court justice, Cornyn has helped the party raise millions of dollars throughout his decades-long career and has worked with Democrats on bipartisan bills. Cornyn has received criticism from Paxton and other Republicans after he suggested that Trump might not be the best Republican candidate for the 2024 presidential election. Paxton has also expressed discontent with Cornyn's support of a 2022 bipartisan gun bill that strengthened background checks for buyers under 21, increased prosecution for unlicensed sellers and funds for youth mental health services in the wake of the Uvalde, Texas, elementary school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers. Amidst several legal battles, the Texas attorney general has become a well-known figure on the right for his litigation against former President Joe Biden. Notably, Paxton led a lawsuit attempting to overturn Trump's loss to Biden in 2020, an effort that the U.S. Supreme Court rejected. In 2023, the GOP-controlled Texas House voted to impeach Paxton for bribery offenses related to before his acquittal in the Senate, where Paxton was once a lawmaker. The Justice Department decided not to pursue its investigation into Paxton over the allegations in the final weeks of former President Biden's term, according to two people familiar with the matter who spoke to The Associated Press on the condition of anonymity. Earlier this month, a district court awarded to four former senior Paxton aides in a whistleblower lawsuit after they were fired shortly after reporting Paxton's actions to the FBI. Paxton's office has said he will appeal. In 2022, when Paxton was last on the ballot, Republican George P. Bush made Paxton's legal troubles the cornerstone of a primary challenge. Paxton in a runoff. A Democrat has yet to enter next year's Senate race in Texas, where their party hasn't won a statewide office in more than 30 years." name: AOC
subject: This weekend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
California, Utah, Idaho, and Montana
#
Two weeks ago, a record-breaking 86,847 people joined the Fighting Oligarchy tour, and millions more watched online.
People are standing up, fighting back, and ready to organize.
After a crush of requests to visit many more places across the country, **I'm hitting the road again with Senator Bernie Sanders starting this weekend**.
We'll kick off in L.A., and then over the next five days we'll visit five vulnerable, GOP-held districts in California, Utah, Idaho, and Montana.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250409-2.jSpIrw&refcode=em20250409-8573-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-)
**What's happening right now is special**. Everyday people are coming together to defend democracy, fight for one another, and build a better future for _all_.
[Will you chip in today to help us host more town halls and power our fight on the road?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250409-2.jSpIrw&refcode=em20250409-8573-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-)
Every donation helps us mobilize, organize, and fight for the working class in the places that need it most.
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250409-2.jSpIrw&refcode=em20250409-8573-P_FND_EVT_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-)**
Whether or not you can give today, **thank you for standing with us**.
We will keep you updated on the different visits, how to attend if you are nearby, and what we learn on each stop.
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250409-2?refcode=em20250409-8573-P_FND_EVT_GRM&t=22&refcode2=8573_2526796_JXZQ1-&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250409-8573-P_FND_EVT_GRM&t=23&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=8573%2E2526796%2EJXZQ1-)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* **TOP NEWS**

“**Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock** ,” AP's**Jamie Stengle** — “A day care facility in a Texas county that’s part of the [measles outbreak](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1R4UO-s1Db1m647PGB6t4yolnWoAfBYOvbnJoyrnkSma82KQ4aOoJBADGWjQf6X5n7BvyZ3Obvh3PIsUL1k91vwkGvF8R5PPNJztLS174cI2ePcIHk99-5pF56OPn0fn7bJBAPqDwIHKC-aMzlpFFEcVRXFFu9VStiq1mutKw1BzhTToob7B0DrljHZZ1OE0q6zlgw4HnrXHh5Gn5jVApRZvdKfgn0SukCcB-0SVBZ-Csi9w6K_3vp3XAishw90Auw5aOv6WED0LyVhwfhBHCBJAI8iInXswlyv4AQwrJl0g/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h11/h001._65MI10bKybJof28QfRjBxZmaQG25KSWbOtoxnMwF88) has multiple cases, including children too young to be [fully vaccinated](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1kBlFGPI12JmW0bwqFnwO6nn26CPIczRwVfqJYijBmAwGpBFzyG05JzToixCI_drqqYKwY4DhdBfSGun6dqoKlN26Y-rJHHQeC_wF1Q9MhFcpRv0XsNAgLRu0w_sOMmt_6kilwlR2S7quLAthZyNDWcNuPsLjQ4O_pHZCYW-ABFb4ccoKsC10riiXba7rN_097jI5tpYe7EgBRohxYBUwbr-OYgqE5LA-MuUoGFiVadDkLpzAD8Iwh9K7BO7UigcY1D2nJyDK7a0jctNgREqkP/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h12/h001.tBjrpBYv470xdUOqQ7akFHLLuz4VElDa9wezyMHjN4s), public health officials say.

West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing [measles outbreak](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eIm2XEttcyu7wgUz2Ryy6NrwjVkbm8A642OnHAFLobxggyAexxVYcSPL_u736IXJcvSxJ8PMnndC919OfgXUJrydCcwB3gZxwf3KTNqPzXf6HAt9wvithTtXsfYbYh8LgeD4lHSmm3cEFu8watmV91oAhix47h0o3Gv4lf8J19Ybzjrk-73WaDSuMoA0ZISSG_5kQGc_m6wBFeIZivyTW4IjyBLTqxQhhVD1w0fCqbm5/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h13/h001.kypV_tbpJYbcYRtz0JDgffdEs1qXmCcKVfpLxISWrRo) with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico.

Three people who were unvaccinated have died from measles-related illnesses this year, including two [elementary school-aged children](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1R4UO-s1Db1m647PGB6t4ydyXLn_ox8RONK6EWdLKmBkSww30YjivaO-4AfmHOo73oKptz7u0W0PtUo15KJL2nUwicuyx-5ElUJ27vlbT1oWVvcno6VFKaKNa-NZYIuzy0AOmaCu8VYRmEIWHWebGzQ0pQQSMCVMbU6TuGrHCq57AEuK7G4Q1ixiMfAwXX0BcH4GcTvAE72cb_8iFdIqK8oKTza1zwHmClc6FiRD27ffzgO2C0rpnLXSpdHsuJAMTQT6fs_9BGJghYTSXxRfkowbiUmsdABTP6L0920f_OCQ/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h14/h001.e6GjnHkVcubLabkzvgSrg8-O9HlCRti8Ed-GuZX0v3M) in Texas. The second child died Thursday at a Lubbock hospital, and Health Secretary **Robert F. Kennedy Jr**. [attended the funeral](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r0Z0I_Ma-ZVjgn_fl59VsRqGgOZjvfHlRLBiL8kE1XKI_XXQrNfukQDfDewFU1SA_We4aHWJO2LkXHtcc5HjzTzq9_E5q5hNxqUIudjn-2qjNlSCHfdyAy1eIwBY6YmyM7TiRYgZkZRLm8IJJFXp-fr4vJnsbJk2tfZa-iUohuCz10ffcZc_x38aEDb-F5omJUOIK8Lt71ux4CgSAxRDm_Wywf2N-RVicg0nJCbtPOGku9DH6VEusaf6X37_7OwSUaAjvECyhUPuJm9T70Q-46l/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h15/h001.jnRCVqtBHYQdaTYapxTwWMJDD9KvdpUpJKLx1iK_K2E) in Seminole, the epicenter of the outbreak.

As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director **Katherine Wells** said.

“Measles is so contagious I won’t be surprised if it enters other facilities,” Wells said.

There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old.

“We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected,” she said.

The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said.

Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4.

On Tuesday, [the state](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.xjnMFfva-73dHOne5Rc0eHsB1jlrVb0PxTSyHRKb3PQqoB7q72is9ApNwlHcwxc1PMHKOfx6U8a81pXwtgBpIYYghHNuutc0HVte58ny6Ed_cTODO_ykqk8fGXFBGMGFEoGHwmhcrBV8EMC4x2lsAJzej2eRNuSPBu9mwq64ATLPfg_hIx4l8TjyE5Judfv-YVE8PfhKCOI4EDNXtoHSMaIFrbpecDPWTA7iEMlAzl60n-MI9Z_HBS9lVna5HCJ6lN7P6RCiwJxBpfD57n_phg/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h18/h001.qmt9zvnjHFsqUu7Ad8cl2UG-foNmWoQLU4qVGPgnC7Y) added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total.

Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through [a close-knit Mennonite community](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1R4UO-s1Db1m647PGB6t4yAhzO12xkJkXGdNYgB5Na8mf0ZhM2-Z3o0_-ewgDGUovOTfG_xpEjKDKIBf8Pfmu9uQLpjiqRn42cdIgEXJKnsIRulo-2YU32n2cOhf34o1lO6WnaVMno2ywTkOJu6ptrGbYFuax7IIh84pzPOolIhp0TR4dRtp3VHUljdyl72-JJ7KdnMNLKJJvewNrzO0WF5aHGCsX-D6geNIdu9GVOLfuZ45pwoGzEytavs8n04uRxzZbcZCvmkXMC__67H3Rp/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h19/h001.oYCKbB91C4FBXjB1H1COxif0xLIqL2OwfIufpi_i0t8), has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36.

The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman **Jason McDonald** said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week.

The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." John Cornyn** ,” AP's**Nadia Lathan** — “Texas Attorney General **Ken Paxton** is running for the U.S. Senate in a primary challenge against Republican Sen. **John Cornyn** , setting up what is likely to become one of the GOP’s most contentious and expensive contests of 2026.

“This will be a spirited campaign and we assure Texans they will have a real choice when this race is over,” Cornyn’s campaign said in a statement.

Paxton’s decision to enter the race highlights his political resiliency and popularity among Texas Republicans after a decade of legal woes that, at times, seemed to imperil his future: felony securities fraud charges, impeachment after an extraordinary revolt by his closest aides and an FBI corruption investigation. Paxton reached a deal to end the criminal case and the [Biden administration quietly decided](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1G4V1vI8TYMiVKKUcRxUuptcJhmLOTb9YweO390e8kkRzmNwSAZHypc18i_0uV0nRimztCmA5TS5WW5pCQSUEoECeijjJeDwzBVxsWzqd7TUHIHA39NQV7R-X9r77i6ko-A-ApTRFUNl8vnEv4B421ZDxsrR9nde2lAamRDZoFwouFi-4eaOfmehvs0-62NhturZonS14v5Ip2DinTCf5AtEd8ZGao7r5r9tLf6Dh1ib4xndLJ_c7bu88-dDept4xS0Mcd-bCjCkBB9ZksP3qmfrtLawgM6OVlgPWkQKWLTEJr60fEX1BZweLVeiJMi3g/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h36/h001.u6rkhqt5k-Si8MwjN7MZdlA8uK2V8GcB2REnnGCmAZg) not to prosecute him.

Cornyn, a respected and popular senator within the GOP conference in Washington, will likely now have to face his most competitive campaign since taking office in 2002.

He recently [lost his bid to lead the GOP](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r1WQVJmixOp-onkPzjGgQ6m1VhqED3e2wg6RGTtNHjOctUoQbNZO-G5wfSD_y02gQGa0YEkPwwR-E2XDpWDzteEUTBnY4qIY4lrJ1qcof21lI14sAh2O7-NC14gguQzxjkI464HSDQuChl__MwyWrMNcRoiUTgrVmO2HmT9W2sX2Vduf1wL_sOeb8SLX0_v6XlBfQJ7DPmgDAHKKx3aLr1hbGE4q4jqN_59XeVfk5W-IMB6YVRFpZDw1VGllfFXQ2mTTB4vm3w07LsIbpzHlVaXv3PSQoaXmamWq0_IGDMHMntUAsdLQrCfLor4kcqKZE8/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h37/h001.1C_JDJbMcjbn1lkihfRRqyuON_toORDBSSTEUrLwFNA) as Senate majority leader in November after he spent several years as Sen. **Mitch McConnell’s** No. 2 in leadership. A former Texas attorney general and state Supreme Court justice, Cornyn has helped the party raise millions of dollars throughout his decades-long career and has worked with Democrats on bipartisan bills.

Cornyn has received criticism from Paxton and other Republicans after he suggested that Trump might not be the best Republican candidate for the 2024 presidential election.

Paxton has also expressed discontent with Cornyn’s support of a 2022 bipartisan gun bill that strengthened background checks for buyers under 21, increased prosecution for unlicensed sellers and funds for youth mental health services in the wake of the Uvalde, Texas, elementary school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers.

Amidst several legal battles, the Texas attorney general has become a well-known figure on the right for his litigation against former President **Joe Biden**. Notably, Paxton led a lawsuit attempting to overturn Trump’s loss to Biden in 2020, an effort that the U.S. Supreme Court rejected.

In 2023, the GOP-controlled Texas House voted to impeach Paxton for bribery offenses related to [a wealthy real estate donor](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r2wR-ouySqoz6EFteDw0gdsRw1Qk36mnMNC9_s-pdEalQ-6X1xRCr34MbObSk2Z3a2HHLH-XFxhSLh1DVRkO9CyWAf3YKJfTEB4J7cVOWqCwD43SAGIcCIasosreLs81ziQ1q_OniNfjsnySOtvJn3_KriagFgCbgm22mRZnzuRMhHvBgT8V7bD344U_j6Ni_VVdK4ewY-0t_JPCXT99Pub1tsA3YfLZgdTNADpXyahr1yTwiu_BQ7S-x_59n9cYw_acoqalaeJpe3HqYVwGNBYv7tXWb4cNPhwWQd_O3Gr1w/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h38/h001.Y9sxT8ELLgaE0tcJSlOVRCsVyVQqeM61CYMZ2x3eWNQ) before his acquittal in the Senate, where Paxton was once a lawmaker. The Justice Department decided not to pursue its investigation into Paxton over the allegations in the final weeks of former President Biden’s term, according to two people familiar with the matter who spoke to The Associated Press on the condition of anonymity.

Earlier this month, a district court awarded [a combined $6.6 million](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r2wR-ouySqoz6EFteDw0gdsFe-34fQyERZ-75Yc-x21qfTeQPs18_-Y6G3aRZcdC9ZGoTBKSAH5rqfmTkKg_oOXdNqwT35fQZjRZhtZFxqC3Vw5iS7x4p1T2odAyvyXw5olN574FheDH4PlhQMYi2hMfAZFui6upTyRIxaNX_R7M3KFTY4OyAZYQuS6VlKJVMsWA4HdrMOIzkXsu31ZNW2xg-o2ERFZzuqUP49y_vaIWeORmieDvOf2gVZSUkP3gAUnUNtNE4Xz7nXoZcqbZzQVhXP9pYfsNXo-HNLweUDzYMSdcwLeEaTcRBVtqMKNEOk/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h39/h001.cvzM3ZGuSQJORLazK9OrgY4nMXAh5kJyb2y0dWhctXw) to four former senior Paxton aides in a whistleblower lawsuit after they were fired shortly after reporting Paxton’s actions to the FBI. Paxton’s office has said he will appeal.

In 2022, when Paxton was last on the ballot, Republican **George P. Bush** made Paxton’s legal troubles the cornerstone of a primary challenge. Paxton [won easily](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.taRaxrEkWqxIZl3CYy7RU-8zPWZErbzsTpoOJuc75r3K_zniZf_eSwh0nG0cHt_BRB1sbI329rGQYukzPttSC95GP2dJ-G629UjgL_s1dIGyg9gL07w2FtQkLmy6qJgysIMgy9QjM1yQ74RQ8LKWrNyUw8fxBh5aCDtSrihy8NsfRgHmWlf1pbZT5I15Vgpx3aIcrG8a7n5txs63DRv8l3Ev0Ah6B0UpLCKyv-voTTdG2HDWz4OJG6LJlKa05rRN3C74zpEYI-tpt20Lp9JY0fz7HavIQPS9IJj6UMFxoopd53igWYz2rwi1_bjGn5-D/4fj/bvYvO4isTcylCpXdJjaT-w/h40/h001.8tETgw4vBsmBIyklvAAo9U-DW_igFqP50YAIsnUAvLQ) in a runoff.

A Democrat has yet to enter next year’s Senate race in Texas, where their party hasn’t won a statewide office in more than 30 years." Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS “Texas measles outbreak tops 500 cases, including multiple at a day care in Lubbock ,” AP'sJamie Stengle — “A day care facility in a Texas county that’s part of the has multiple cases, including children too young to be , public health officials say. West Texas is in the middle of a still-growing with 505 cases reported on Tuesday. The state expanded the number of counties in the outbreak area this week to 10. The highly contagious virus began to spread in late January and health officials say it has spread to New Mexico, Oklahoma, Kansas and Mexico. Three people who were unvaccinated have died from measles-related illnesses this year, including two in Texas. The second child died Thursday at a Lubbock hospital, and Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in Seminole, the epicenter of the outbreak. » As of Friday, there were seven cases at a day care where one young child who was infectious gave it to two other children before it spread to other classrooms, Lubbock Public Health director Katherine Wells said. “Measles is so contagious I won’t be surprised if it enters other facilities,” Wells said. There are more than 200 children at the day care, Wells said, and most have had least one dose of the measles, mumps and rubella vaccine, which is first recommended between 12 and 15 months old and a second shot between 4 and 6 years old. » “We do have some children that have only received one dose that are now infected,” she said. The public health department is recommending that any child with only one vaccine get their second dose early, and changed its recommendation for kids in Lubbock County to get the first vaccine dose at 6 months old instead of 1. A child who is unvaccinated and attends the day care must stay home for 21 days since their last exposure, Wells said. Case count and hospitalization numbers in Texas have climbed steadily since the outbreak began, and spiked by 81 cases from March 28 to April 4. On Tuesday, added another 24 cases to its count and two additional counties, Borden and Randall. One more person was hospitalized since Friday, with 57 total. Gaines County, where the virus has been spreading through , has the majority of cases, with 328 on Tuesday. Neighboring Terry County is second with 46, followed by Lubbock County with 36. The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention met with Texas officials Monday to determine how many people it would send to West Texas to assist with the outbreak response, spokesman Jason McDonald said Monday. He expected a small team to arrive later this week, followed by a bigger group on the ground next week. The CDC said its first team was in the region from early March to April 1, withdrawing on-the-ground support days before a second child died in the outbreak." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS “Texas AG Ken Paxton launches Senate primary challenge against Republican Sen. John Cornyn ,” AP'sNadia Lathan — “Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton is running for the U.S. Senate in a primary challenge against Republican Sen. John Cornyn , setting up what is likely to become one of the GOP’s most contentious and expensive contests of 2026. Paxton, a close ally of President Donald Trump , made the announcement Tuesday after spending more than a year openly flirting with a Senate challenge. During that time, Paxton has sought to position himself as a national leader among the GOP’s ascendant hard right, launching some of the first criminal investigations in the U.S. over and for transgender youth. His entry into the race, which he made official in an interview on Fox News’ “The Ingraham Angle,” comes as Paxton is no longer shadowed by legal troubles that had hung over him for nearly a decade but did not weaken his ability to twice. » “I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for President Trump’s agenda and take a sledgehammer to the D.C. establishment,” Paxton said in a post on X. “Together, let’s send John Cornyn packing.” Cornyn’s campaign responded by calling his challenger a “fraud” and leaning into Paxton’s historic impeachment in 2023 after eight of his closest aides accused him of corruption and reported him to the FBI. Paxton was , where his wife is a state senator but was not allowed to cast a vote. » “This will be a spirited campaign and we assure Texans they will have a real choice when this race is over,” Cornyn’s campaign said in a statement. Paxton’s decision to enter the race highlights his political resiliency and popularity among Texas Republicans after a decade of legal woes that, at times, seemed to imperil his future: felony securities fraud charges, impeachment after an extraordinary revolt by his closest aides and an FBI corruption investigation. Paxton reached a deal to end the criminal case and the not to prosecute him. Cornyn, a respected and popular senator within the GOP conference in Washington, will likely now have to face his most competitive campaign since taking office in 2002. He recently as Senate majority leader in November after he spent several years as Sen. Mitch McConnell’s No. 2 in leadership. A former Texas attorney general and state Supreme Court justice, Cornyn has helped the party raise millions of dollars throughout his decades-long career and has worked with Democrats on bipartisan bills. Cornyn has received criticism from Paxton and other Republicans after he suggested that Trump might not be the best Republican candidate for the 2024 presidential election. Paxton has also expressed discontent with Cornyn’s support of a 2022 bipartisan gun bill that strengthened background checks for buyers under 21, increased prosecution for unlicensed sellers and funds for youth mental health services in the wake of the Uvalde, Texas, elementary school shooting that killed 19 children and two teachers. Amidst several legal battles, the Texas attorney general has become a well-known figure on the right for his litigation against former President Joe Biden. Notably, Paxton led a lawsuit attempting to overturn Trump’s loss to Biden in 2020, an effort that the U.S. Supreme Court rejected. In 2023, the GOP-controlled Texas House voted to impeach Paxton for bribery offenses related to before his acquittal in the Senate, where Paxton was once a lawmaker. The Justice Department decided not to pursue its investigation into Paxton over the allegations in the final weeks of former President Biden’s term, according to two people familiar with the matter who spoke to The Associated Press on the condition of anonymity. Earlier this month, a district court awarded to four former senior Paxton aides in a whistleblower lawsuit after they were fired shortly after reporting Paxton’s actions to the FBI. Paxton’s office has said he will appeal. In 2022, when Paxton was last on the ballot, Republican George P. Bush made Paxton’s legal troubles the cornerstone of a primary challenge. Paxton in a runoff. A Democrat has yet to enter next year’s Senate race in Texas, where their party hasn’t won a statewide office in more than 30 years." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. body:
I regret to inform you that your House GOP Membership has expired.

|

| | | Friend,

I wouldn't be coming to you like this if it wasn't important.

My team just informed me that, as of today, your House GOP Membership has **expired.**

This is no cause for alarm - **[but I'm going to ask you to step up and renew your Membership for 2025 right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3vh28hgf9s1ndmkurl4n1n7h5p60fi3q7b5gmmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "but I’m going to ask you to step up and renew your Membership for 2025 right away.")**

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrpnfv2thtach1a619ta8jhcbsa5o1s19dv3kem0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaiioutu7r6mkhp2qks59108ukaivlclgu8ue7qo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qi7q8fkfc4lcukfidk5s2qtebvs82889855t7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16ggj9ko8d6cf4eanq4hi8219pcfk9b342f7e2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztf8nnm86os2dr7msijhj4eqd4ev7qkhh60jicko_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr7crldq9uh7h6dg18q3jou7ganoahdcm2n8enpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmho04meq6ppme0rv8jtkak2f3v8h849snqvi5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlem8j6edv1a5lstt6b0jj5hil8l18gvhmtchuh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpgl9uclu17h5abh6vve0gj0qf0j6ikh0i6f5dl0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znot9bcfs1jt695pn4k9v8v9nreu19c2fbr9u290_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9jm9oj6cth2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. body:
They cheered when this unelected health beauracrat shut down Ohio, forced your kids into masks, and crippled small businesses.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-cA)Peter -
We don't usually waste time talking about Democrat opponents this early in a campaign. But this? **This can 't be ignored.**
The fake news media has already crowned their candidate: radical Democrat Amy Acton. They cheered when this unelected health bureaucrat shut down Ohio, crippled small businesses, and forced your kids into masks.
And now? They're cheering her again -- this time for her "record-breaking" fundraising.
NBC just ran a glowing headline bragging that Amy Acton raised $600,000 last quarter.
**Here 's what they refused to report:**
* Vivek Ramaswamy raised twice that.
* In half the time.
* Without their puff piece.

But don't expect the media to mention any of that. They won't report that barely two months into the campaign, Vivek is well on his way to visit all 88 counties in Ohio. They won't admit that Vivek's shattering expectations. They definitely won't admit he's running circles around their Democrat darling.
We fully expect the bias to continue - [and we're ready to cut through it with the help of grassroots patriots like you. ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
This isn't about making headlines. It's about building momentum, Peter.
Vivek is growing a movement of bold, unapologetic, America First patriots who are sick of being lied to by the media AND unelected government bureaucrats.
He doesn't need the media on his side - **he just needs you.**

## Dow Soars 2,900 Points as Tariffs Paused
The Dow Jones Industrial Average [surged nearly 2,900 points Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp_G3hxxLxfbDAxdsqVrR4ufS0KDYwtoorx95e4dP33SOdL5uiwXm3J6XD_tyqbFbUGBahA0gFiCTfm9UB9MZEaWPRuYiHAWIOf-Zki6CW1QwUWFHEanlXfSz3JWaiQY-2QOmiAQIISQdFJuBPKatNYII8SOBIfUtnL63tKj3Tjm9_bkcvLb2mdza22vnfzo8Nzh2e4PftXjOkZpyWfu8Fzb5u91WG25c6tDsyXFWIdWftZ9mBCstEpPEMGhIj1DkBjJeqfZwdQXE_ZXyjnVcepIXFeb8p-9_VfjafA3AAD___FOX20), leading a historic rally after President Trump announced a 90-day pause on most global tariffs. The S&P 500 jumped 9.5%--its biggest gain since 2008--while the Nasdaq soared over 12%. [Tariffs were dropped](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71urDAQQOGnsbtFM-NZsAsXt6Hb26ZEYMaLI_MjsEC8fbTpUx_pk87Xq3v1Kafl_b-fxZe4dgT0fAA_ELqxT_nuWI8-ipAYLR4bZrKAxurJN0wkiDDUAZGtIyTbRMsRXAj9MOrkPxowAgKA4eo51MjBsXOOsMaoGGRMZd2r7zUtZZKY7_WUvQrrrLOfStkOZf4pahW113VVwxA-TVG7yHUoanM6RVEbNnvet3m-zVz07sftSjmno24Uw3vuU_4Vy1-Hp6efAAAA__8MtlCz) to a universal 10% for most countries, though Trump raised duties on Chinese imports to 125%. The White House framed the reversal as a "pause" while "negotiations are ongoing." Apple stock skyrocketed 15%--[its best day since 1998](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAUBOBfgx3m8WBdLSiusdtrrzSID-UWwQC3Zv_9xeuvmWaSL5P5ekwP44OP66fZSVeXJgS8cVBcwLQYH96TahbtiJBkQ1rclcIehOybTffmJg1YB5LMnQT2wwyzUw5mBCE60Xh9aaAECACQqr3NnVB2UMMwoOiEYwpo8TXl9jv5WDdy4Z1elFub9ibordajMPnBcGQ4nufZ2jjbq2Q4XjTDEdQVA8PRHEcgPqefaKlweVC2FCs3rlLmZ8ql8pCKjysvNZN58uKjJY4AwCvZjZea7LO0W91Dk_VynD4EX7o7U7Duxoe_VfW_l14afwMAAP__7OxoHQ)--reclaiming its title as the world's most valuable company. The tech-heavy Nasdaq recorded its best session since 2001.
## Feds Freeze $1.8 Billion in Funds for Cornell, Northwestern
The Trump administration has [frozen over $1 billion in federal funding](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3mw9ngk2A0MXtnTtaBHziKkIREBiub--cvcud8vpu9N9XZerDTGk-6d9kG4-Lwh46UH0HBZnQzwW0TntiZDGjjSfhMAZ-Dh3m3YopfJ8In6xNy-d4AjT5Fc_y9WBoi7okwaCAweAUQyXm-RiVUIphVxyzwSQCy2X4TuH1Dby8chvKsOaH13UW2vPysYPhoah2fd9eFXbsrPHGWBoasvlYGgS7fU020JODM1Zy9CAOEUxNGsuiWLsUy5t26k2Kql_pfCmUkM7ev9KLqR770v-oZMwjwBiljPAxNB0RbvnHmIMVU5MwP1hQ_wb2f477a3xNwAA___MAmyV) for Cornell University and $790 million for Northwestern University while investigating alleged civil rights violations, officials said Tuesday. The freeze impacts grants and contracts from agencies including defense, health, education, and agriculture. The administration has cited [concerns over campus antisemitism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAUhH8N3rAez-DYA0MXb-kSVR0tDA-bCkOESaL8-8rdO57udPr0fV_nqwkxpPXT7KSrzzMCKg6SC5idCfE9y8ZpT4TUNaTFRUocQHRDs-lRDA763gpQ2OHilLHgLlbagYSyTjVBn28gBQgA6GSrll5IO8pxHFH0wjMJ5ELNpf3JIdWNfHznJ5XW5r2Jeqv1frDug-HEcDKLTfQ62jWfNcPp68ZweoVCt5rLm-FUy2O_c-P2kMJRi6khJ76ZWA8u-BJiPLMnR8VE7h_JhbRym0uiGLlA6FGpYWyKdvfXuT76C5Ow7ibEP6L6n6Gnxt8AAAD__2UWaDc), pro-Palestinian protests, diversity programs, and transgender policies as grounds for the review. Both universities say they haven't received full details but are seeking clarification.
## Masters Tournament Tees Off Today
The [2025 Masters Tournament](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D1u6zAQBODTUB2F5WptiQWL16jza1MKtLk0GfDHkBgLun2gVGlSTfNhBpiP23KzMcXy_G8zm-brgoAXCSQVLM7GdCzUOeOZkYeOjRqJcAI1TF0w98dkR2CHEzk10TBqQiB7V1YrHDV20ZxtQAoUAAzUX-5XRQ9NWmtUV-UFAbvY6tp_1lhaYJ-O-ua1f9TcJRNae21i-CdwFjjv-94_a_K5lhbScRqBc6tf6xmBZbZb43UTOIe6y2zLIb0tm7StcXHyF-lW4157TClu11EQPLON6We0_XXC2-B3AAAA___ZhF7S), perhaps golf's most prestigious event, opens today at Augusta National Golf Club in Georgia, expected to draw around 90,000 patrons daily, totaling nearly 200,000 over the course of the tournament. On this day in 1849, Walter Hunt, a mechanic and inventor from New York, but sold the rights for just $400. While later entrepreneurs made a fortune from it, Hunt did not earn anything more. Perhaps some of our readers grew up on a farm or still run one--tell us, is this how you used to call the cows? Today's Et Cetera features an that's as haunting as it is beautiful. We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity in a groundbreaking battery technology. | Dow Soars 2,900 Points as Tariffs Paused The Dow Jones Industrial Average , leading a historic rally after President Trump announced a 90-day pause on most global tariffs. The S&P 500 jumped 9.5%--its biggest gain since 2008--while the Nasdaq soared over 12%. to a universal 10% for most countries, though Trump raised duties on Chinese imports to 125%. The White House framed the reversal as a "pause" while "negotiations are ongoing." Apple stock skyrocketed 15%-- its title as the world's most valuable company. The tech-heavy Nasdaq recorded its best session since 2001. Feds Freeze $1.8 Billion in Funds for Cornell, Northwestern The Trump administration has for Cornell University and $790 million for Northwestern University while investigating alleged civil rights violations, officials said Tuesday. The freeze impacts grants and contracts from agencies including defense, health, education, and agriculture. The administration has cited , pro-Palestinian protests, diversity programs, and transgender policies as grounds for the review. Both universities say they haven't received full details but are seeking clarification. Masters Tournament Tees Off Today The , perhaps golf's most prestigious event, opens today at Augusta National Golf Club in Georgia, expected to draw around 90,000 patrons daily, totaling nearly 200,000 over the course of the tournament. The field includes 96 top golfers, featuring defending champion Scottie Scheffler and Rory McIlroy, who will once again attempt to complete his career Grand Slam. Former champion Ángel Cabrera returns . Making history, Danish twins Nicolai and Rasmus Højgaard will become the first twin brothers to compete in the Masters, delighting fans with their synchronized outfits and charming personalities. Watch . The tournament also remains steeped in tradition--patrons are famously prohibited from sitting on the grass. See . | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | URGENT: "TRUMP LEFT NO DOUBT THAT HE AND MUSK ARE COMING FOR SOCIAL SECURITY AND MEDICAID" **Signature submission deadline: 10 AM tomorrow | 🔴 Trump has allowed unelected billionaire, Elon Musk, to CUT critical programs with his pesky DOGE. 🔴🔴 Musk and DOGE have wasted no time causing CHAOS by suddenly firing federal workers, slashing life-saving funds for medical research, and cutting off critical aid to our allies! 🔴🔴🔴 The MAGA agenda has made Social Security and Medicaid the next target of DOGE cuts, which would leave MILLIONS of Americans without health care and important services. | | | | | | | | With you, – Blue Amp Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | Hey folks, Dennis Quaid here.

Here’s the thing: life doesn’t come with guarantees. The economy shifts, markets stumble, and years of hard work could slip through your fingers like sand.

Should it happen again—what’s your plan?

Think back just a few years. Inflation wasn’t the monster it feels like today. Prices made sense. The future felt steady.

But today? It’s a different story. Groceries cost more. Gas went up. And rising costs chip away at the value of your retirement savings every day.

But you don’t have to sit on the sidelines:
You’ve seen what happens when folks don’t prepare. It gets ugly. Savings accounts drain faster than expected, plans get downgraded, and peace of mind turns to heart-racing anxiety.

body:
While toy commercials are ubiquitous today, they were virtually unheard of before April 30, 1952.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68epy9v9it9fn0b9pdf45ac25q3563eeer62789exrosr1dhij5w4u9j1y8rctdv6b9iw2jidrxwey7jqq6yixhottxwmq8e2yze3storiazu7a2zu2cni76spas5alg461z3xvjnhecbjr1w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The first toy advertised on TV was Mr. Potato Head.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hile toy commercials are ubiquitous today, they were virtually unheard of before April 30, 1952. That day, [a television ad](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for Mr. Potato Head aired for the first time. George Lerner created an early version of the toy tuber in 1949, and sold the rights to Hassenfeld Brothers (which became Hasbro) three years later. The original package contained 30 plastic accessories, including facial features, hands, and feet, which could be affixed to any real potato or similar vegetable. What transformed the toy into a major success, however, was the innovative TV advertising campaign that soon followed.
---
The inaugural Mr. Potato Head commercial was the first of its kind to advertise directly to children rather than their parents, revolutionizing the marketing industry. The ad featured a cartoon mascot talking to kids about how to play with Mr. Potato Head and all the fun they could have. More than a million kits were sold in the first year, and the Mr. Potato Head line soon expanded to include a Mrs. Potato Head, Brother Spud, Sister Yam, and many additional parts. When new government regulations in the 1960s forced the company to pivot away from the sharp accessories necessary to puncture real potatoes, Hasbro began selling a plastic potato body with premade holes.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Lincoln Logs were invented by Frank Lloyd Wright’s son.
John Lloyd Wright, son of famed American architect Frank Lloyd Wright, [based](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suhznc&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Lincoln Logs on a real project that he worked on alongside his father. John began as his father’s apprentice in 1913, and while the professional relationship was short-lived, John briefly played a role in planning Tokyo’s Imperial Hotel. The hotel plan featured an innovative design of interlocking timber beams to increase stability, which actually helped the structure survive the 1923 Great Kantō earthquake. Though John quit before the project was complete, he drew great inspiration from its design, and in 1920 he patented an interlocking log cabin toy. He chose the name “Lincoln Logs” to evoke a sense of Americana, basing it on the 16th president’s childhood log cabin.
