clean_body: While toy commercials are ubiquitous today, they were virtually unheard of before April 30, 1952. | W hile toy commercials are ubiquitous today, they were virtually unheard of before April 30, 1952. That day, for Mr. Potato Head aired for the first time. George Lerner created an early version of the toy tuber in 1949, and sold the rights to Hassenfeld Brothers (which became Hasbro) three years later. The original package contained 30 plastic accessories, including facial features, hands, and feet, which could be affixed to any real potato or similar vegetable. What transformed the toy into a major success, however, was the innovative TV advertising campaign that soon followed. The inaugural Mr. Potato Head commercial was the first of its kind to advertise directly to children rather than their parents, revolutionizing the marketing industry. The ad featured a cartoon mascot talking to kids about how to play with Mr. Potato Head and all the fun they could have. More than a million kits were sold in the first year, and the Mr. Potato Head line soon expanded to include a Mrs. Potato Head, Brother Spud, Sister Yam, and many additional parts. When new government regulations in the 1960s forced the company to pivot away from the sharp accessories necessary to puncture real potatoes, Hasbro began selling a plastic potato body with premade holes. | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . By the Numbers | | Possible combinations of a Rubik’s Cube 43 quintillion | | Careers held by Barbie, including astronaut and surgeon 200+ | Careers held by Barbie, including astronaut and surgeon 200+ | | Pieces in the largest Lego set (a map of the world) 11,695 | | Votes received by Mr. Potato Head in the 1985 Boise mayoral election 4 | Votes received by Mr. Potato Head in the 1985 Boise mayoral election 4 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Lincoln Logs were invented by Frank Lloyd Wright’s son. John Lloyd Wright, son of famed American architect Frank Lloyd Wright, Lincoln Logs on a real project that he worked on alongside his father. John began as his father’s apprentice in 1913, and while the professional relationship was short-lived, John briefly played a role in planning Tokyo’s Imperial Hotel. The hotel plan featured an innovative design of interlocking timber beams to increase stability, which actually helped the structure survive the 1923 Great Kantō earthquake. Though John quit before the project was complete, he drew great inspiration from its design, and in 1920 he patented an interlocking log cabin toy. He chose the name “Lincoln Logs” to evoke a sense of Americana, basing it on the 16th president’s childhood log cabin. | |

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Z_7DvnQfLlvntwru6k-S3GVykxz2oEBtq05wsU83r7GnAv7nTalidi3_e69wsMkaTNhCqwWYjSI-FI3rcTrQIm9w-_dWj-Z0t-Pf1UoLCNrJwfvXn-RI3qw8Pi8dUhtznTyVQC3lsM0ErlIWYhkpcGHcyQ-RcsIyH-PT1SKugxPmnsMIX4aVrPH1HAHPSd9sTpnti3SjmehAqZLrA7OR9vJULjQfyNNEZvqiKKBAd6G1fOO_Lb6yP9Tevh1EzBAGLlo8WSN2ZGgpdhdRQE-sC_m_z_1Va_90-wkY665O29jCqUkzlGd5mFpMLBPhBG8p19gy2-kBI53SXoW3kbWPU0YoVV8fPu82NA9bIKGYfXIR3aiiv5PqJDcwdZnO3D8TnMC6Q4M1f13tD6x-LMUMIYVn9APWfc1qeSpHengjuCYoXcHVbr7L7OKacPE4NKpenrXtbjTUlrOof43yfMvs2lTbpZTc7zE5oauO1e32dXvNTxUmgqwDWbbdhFrAUjYi/H-LfDfyZkzzMQl5eDMsYBb3e8xVqtY-p/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/wZhToV2E_PlfKPaOjKS9RXZPs0b0IiMDMKNglsway5O3UxLXKImdq1h-MRC8aK2Njuo-xMft10o9ubtMEcV2wllfIBEEk3uxLe9R33fD-M0hbhexdxOzavjCXWwOAwkIXvOR8XTeDqaLCD_jVJLJhyFrd2AxSty5eLyANcD9LKgMTYRlswnbqbWbVKkQ7UketVB_2qhGIMLgwBGpDJV3S6nISXyZ6UTRnf0CeAjPYsIpxI23y6K5jYoh4YV8Gf6mx_2DLMCfsVpIYil7FxzLxL_ynFiAaLl7NF_iiUZFahWUwM6XldZ4en1DjTc4pIXW1s9xdxaHi5wBrJrNArqlY5v-qRzyLvA-5JG7HMuwhOpCkNnmqz35x3lzjoXQPsisFImG0pC78vwWMV0JH05QsXjJMaVKlwdiMcPFkl1bH2PJKBnvY1bINqshjXQtBWsErO_-ImlELDNwn-NLQs4ORSiJL2GOS9N24WL46_YOgNNMhuCWHb9NnRXEC2lTqsJP/zhkuCaV1RHzH73qycDoIZR63PRvwCh10/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/O6uGVcKpBxgAOIL8Oj0dU1TsKsIgWtifaacStWKMuFIPVar_Iz8BuOvlofy_sZeaNvt0gvJVCYSHCBHv-lgkk7maiVE-ie5F2aZmgeJCDzeB6Zr2gmt3r0jzB3KVW9mv7aQbS9Ig_54IcLEjDMyrmmOyWG0Iy_CuhdL0CEj8byUCSG408984dkWI5Q-6U21Wx3ZvIhcEYRpXyZwX0KJ_BGzDKFfmsDGKaBpUrvKUjW74JfLLw-Y8xAzOePp7kfmBNpLer9C0SHlwkX0bFib9WWWyeakiBKOvr8DqBst7BlYD5GBaX7vIvuPIPudZaVqbQBSfNzRwgUNUbdVHwUrbuqehVOt9eCnCL5A9pTJR73R721Mn7USf-L3WYMuBrnugeYLF-wqFS_Cw4t227xSxpCTtUb7TR16W_gSw_Iqwce_2l9jtg4yV7XEQ4lKDb-lf9_vKgpc-0PyRfYpFeJWBWSzWCdBCvA5ctgrFdxafRiXAr85vl2egDwCGFXhlzSaG/B3rFKZGGdJHbsRMqW0ohBSc8zOofxoUQ/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/xPujIxSxHJHWCwkAaxDlsoXD90hwWli7TfvAh2nlCEcFHelvg2X-_D-yidTW3O63_UdAfasSLKWrRO-bdZrRcb-ybG9DEbOqhJV8hKcmyJpykWAfsHkf1ybf0W8x4LyhXs7ihx5a80P-bj55eOwE_9MfQHOHuV5pwuDrWiFWXlIfwXgEfAnRPOxWnX_RTEvRIz7kJql4phnCt0V1E74dFJT3-0YtLHA2ndhd2IPlbKNW57e2RfDKeDYlnWskNl0nzLEy6oNx-WVPFlgBmp3P71cNaC7Te_OJqhNMml54F6GPRGINmrgVhXt2t3IcqSL9ItcOFNRkG1_vCzX4jFSinpxVNgSeLgOj3bH6k8sfx2o-u1-6HDTJ-QOxrv7J9FNTH2M6PRydheRc2lgHtbbsIfCGFUsL8yQE_bZgcfINCZNriMphICRmRggj-tN8woOP6p5PDGD6Pa6mvYGjseIno6WH-6lMjYMvt7cGZUS03Q9yHgNRX-BUeV7yYDg0gIj8/H5iY_H87vqCwLA_266JGwLaxuTflfgoR/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")

Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/GW8fgYRqxHhtD-bAP60GZcO0FhcPbOznf4x3sxkx-atNmS1IZcCikceKZm4UEDStplva38BsVdNdawZIdjN49LFnJTOpRP7qotQH0XQ3_wWZFuvkawjVsh2gBgMuZTa7vaD2o7Q3x7tg_YkuIQ1DeiDYpmWErfzj2cldv84dDLf9p5RCMDWQEnWYl7mVqS86P9sGla9RmJIHffHtERNssZwb_EigTIAREW2E_M9BDPeFyoQD1kn6aX1Ku6Y-626dWcXOV1Vl_qCgkx7pa_HL79ryhZyTIXGR1YC9u-EBmFkBGDwHA-0NgswUTapuNwCjCnWoFDIt73x9tszVcott4lLqiei5fRo9TMdXLb2p9WqJlAQ1SsPJw-060902ggjRszPsspauzzGfsNdKQCsmZRszCgE8l47btiHJ2FGcr1xLm81jCvUMETrAkfpV0e9PdU8_Un8L2gSSzwH6M_qNE89alL7OAhBWpWXVs5clX6m_y_IyqwLoT7pgq2uQK7FY/Rdyw6fwtRiOkU3xVMdYXdVw67IBUnY0w/7 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1965, President Lyndon B. Johnson dedicated the [Gary Job Corps Training Center](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAUheGngU5zuYBKQbGN3Wy7pUG5KgnKBMk4vv3G6af6q_Ml5-8xPFyIYV9-3Ua2vOc0IKCuQFUCBu9CvAbFvR3BG8HJilYp7NBgw1eL8-yMdEJ0o1YNeC3JG-hQyA4mQ8CDvTFQAgToVjW1QunmqW0BRq2NbpgC8qGkXJeVCr3dMccrvSjXU9p4tGspz4PJH4Y9w_48z7ocq0t7DDvVKS8M-8-q8u6qxusOw572ku9KKXm2_nmGGMPRtEzBsrkQP3j5-vZl8T8AAP__wXNV3A) at the former site of Gary Air Force Base near San Marcos. Over the next two years, over 3,000 workers received job training at the facility, making it the largest such training center in the nation. ## Houston Carrier Will Operate Deportation Flights
Houston-based budget carrier Avelo Airlines has agreed to [operate deportation flights](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OtCAUQJ8GOwxcQbSg-L7CbrbZYkuDctGbMDIB5sd9-s1sv_VJTk7O12W-OIp0bB_uira-QppBgOZCcSlm7yies2q8XYQfZYNWGqVggBH6ZreLXgC8WhepYRy6oRsCBiO0XntQysiG7FsmlBRSaKP6VkHnwmqMEIvWo-6ZEuipptzWHSu-XAnxTA_M7ZquTbR7rbfCun8MJgaTW9YDn6Xd0hszmP7fCx1YCoPpSRk_a8ong2m5-w0rd5QjHcjdA2PiIZ7c4y3l6iqlg4dI214LpxW5y_SdDsclCG3MIMYmW397UoxUesOU2K6O4m9T_XPSw8JPAAAA___962nh) for ICE beginning next month, a move the company’s founder and CEO acknowledged is “a sensitive and complicated topic.” The company will use [three Boeing 737-800 aircraft](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHPpCAQhn8NdphxQNGC4hq6vfZKgzKuJKxsgNP131_YXPs108zzzLx5_zzmh_XBH8_f9kW6fLY4I2DPQfIOZmd9uGfZOL2Am7qGdKekxBEnHJpdb8uCjkhAJ9zYu3WZBK4wWiVg2iridT0GsoMOeiWHVqKw26oUwNL3Uz8wCeR8iaktOxX62LyFO56U2jW-mqD3Ut6ZiV8MDUNzXVf7N9sSnb0rwNDkEtPN0JRkTwoMjfUp-IP4QVdmaOp_hgZkHaruTwqR_6cy9ytxR--Yii0-HnwL_rmXao44jSAGCV-tSdq9Lx-Cz4NiEp4v68M3ZPmxtVPjvwAAAP__q05s2A) based at Mesa Gateway Airport in Arizona for the “long-term charter program,” providing domestic and international flights in support of the Trump administration’s deportation initiative. Andrew Levy, Avelo’s founder and CEO, said the agreement would help the company expand and provide job security for the company’s 1,100 employees. A job listing says the carrier is seeking “energetic, highly motivated” flight attendants to [ensure safety and security](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OtCAUQJ8GOwwgPx8FxdfYzbZbmite5SYIEyXO-Pab2X77k3OS8_2YHkCZyvYFO4b2XuukhDJcaC7FtADle9LdEmaxeNlhkE5r9U95ZbsUcPXOORgcgrPeejXMc5ztsEbvIyyyo_CRCS2FFMZp22s1wBqdE2I2xhvLtMCFWj36lrDhG8413_XCo49173JIrT1PNvxnamRqXKlAidjfkGr9EEyNBV8nUyNcmCsHOjIVPHmig8rGseCxYaPIE20p31w6KYwRUvWp7bk7wvJ8Uc50Wse02Hag_Ftuf664gvoJAAD__x_lYRE) on the deportation flights. Avelo is already [facing boycotts](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOnDAQhJ8GOiNjbMCFizR0lzYlWvAaVrIxwqvjePvokvpvR6OZT9-f1_wCinRsvyGh40_Is5LKCKlFK2cPFJ9Z194t0tu2RtcOWqtRWdXXuws49Ksd7dIFLaU1xks1hs6OwRjldV-T-45J3cpWmkH3jVYdhHUYpFyMsaavtERPnK-Gd2T8QAnxyW-8mjWnOrqd-SxV96tSU6Wm-76bAIXXnE44nm-nUpNtu7ZTQ1epCd4YswC6Ih1YBK0oPJ75YmDKhwiRtp2LoJRou_5n2_ftSHiw8AhRlLwSRJHQE4glP2tmLuK8MmPhUl_OnzfFSKUfKi23BBT_sfKP8t5O_Q0AAP__71Z0gQ) over the agreement. An online petition had received over 19,000 signatures at the time of writing, and the mayor of New Haven, Connecticut—the carrier’s East Coast hub—has called on Levy to reconsider the flights.
## Student Visas Revoked at Texas A&M, UT Austin
Several international students at Texas A&M University and UT Austin have [had their visas revoked](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAQxfGnMZ3ReDA2Llzchi633RIZbMJI5kN4EpK3XyX91kf6Hen_cxtugTJt9_9hTZ5f8z4gYCtBSwVDDJTfg66iHyE6VSWvrNbYoUNTLb7rxnHECKkB0yG6uXW2gzA7ZbrgUFXkPxhoBQpaq02tsQnzZC3A2LauNUJDisT7WfOSOL1CmfN7f6aznva1yn5hPopo_gnsBfbXddXTcu7bZxXYH3smpqkI7MPJNOUksC_8iGlj-aQSivyaMqzywTI8CtMmEdBoY5v6WI7q9PG4KGcqxgoN9zVQ_n7znzGeHn8DAAD__xGMYNY) and legal status terminated without prior notice. Student visa revocations have also occurred at other colleges across the country. A Texas A&M spokesperson confirmed [15 students had their visas canceled](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQRb_GdEb2MIZQuNiGLttuiQZsyCgGIjwJyd-vyKtfM9Lo6B5d3X_X_kqceJ3_0hK9vKetBwNOG9TW9IE4fXosgh9MaG0RvW0Q4QIt1MXNt9WFKqCmQuvaaoDgaLBkmiEgkpuwYH_KDFpjjWuwLhEqmsamMWZwrnW1QhMDy7aXcosS35Sn9NlecS_HbSmSv4k8sqr-KOgUdMdxlPdB3idU0J1uBZ3B87QKuhQpi7ZO8ypxX0l4Wynpr1fTorM8Q1wl67TlqFOcKeksJM-TctA_iYND1LwsPO_fX487jfewHauCrth9eBycEue6UWjmhTh9y8qv6708_A8AAP__MoNyhA), while UT Austin administrators stated that two former students had their visas revoked after a criminal records check. The Trump administration has been [cracking down on international students](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQRb8GOqOxsSEULrahy7ZbosEewFpjIzwJyd8_Jf2r79XR0fl3n-4YYkjrX9zJ8mvJkwJlBGghYfIY4nvStbcz-EHWZGWvtbqpQXX1ZmffdwjzbW6NXEzfdobcIkHTQCBn5epgPzDQEiSYXneNVi0uru8BZmMG01UayAfOZ8MbMb2wLPGdn3Q2Lu91tBvzUar2T6XGSo3XdTULFnZ5PzC9P59KjYNspTTKVGrc8iX4fOyHQL-HFAqfyCEnQa8Dkw9pFe5E99_nK4mQmM703TEKl2OklUThh6fEpT6tP64QYyhdX2lYdwzxa8W_Znpa9RMAAP__uFhs7A) who have participated in pro-Palestinian protests or otherwise promoted civil unrest on their campuses. However, Secretary of State Marco Rubio clarified that any “potential criminal activity” is grounds for removal. In some cases, administrators discovered student visas were canceled for misdemeanor crimes or traffic violations. The federal government has also revoked visas for students whose presence could pose "serious adverse foreign policy consequences.”
## Harold Simmons Park Breaks Ground
Dallas residents celebrated a milestone on Tuesday when [ground was broken](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAURp8Gb0Rwg409MPyLt_xrR-tiLjYKhgiom7x9lXbu_n1HR-fjttwwxJC2_3iQaU-fFxDQc6G4FIvDEF-L6pyxwk2yIyO1UjDCBEO3GznI0XoaV1DSejWt4-onjTCS1na02AXzhgklhRS9VsNFwRX9qrUQtu-nfmBKkAstl0vbqdETq4-vfFK5rPnootlbe1R2_cdgZjA7jBFrSCmf2Ki-NwxmT7WFk_hW8mdythDeQ9r4TtFxnwv_ffEr9AffseToeA3HkVPlDyx3BnNXjHt8hRhDHTRTYjswxB-D9meS08B3AAAA___dCWV5) for Harold Simmons Park, a 250-acre area along the Trinity River that generations of city leaders have dreamed of turning into a vibrant urban green space. The $325 million undertaking will include [five smaller parks with trails and amenities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdAcZY-NQuIgi0eW2t0QHbMCKf5DthOTtV2TrrWakGX0azf_7eEfrbFj_oTeqvJc4MsoEUA4NHTVa9xl5pdVEdd9URjWSc3ZhPeuqTZl5kRc5C9bKngpuTG9ajXRB1LxdZlpZdcIob2hDheRdzVmLyywlpZMQvegIp0bbElNdNlPMG_PiPvFlUj1HXzm1lbJn0l4JGwgbjuOofQ5nRthgAjwzYUMwxylfXzabYcf0AJthw303wYYVNDqHGaZk8JFhTfEZNMQALRPgrXM2BtgwRachW-9j-IUQNmCC67W53ZrnVCWl9-Ns504STleP1n13lj-Peyn2EwAA__9fm3FJ) such as a skate park, cafe, basketball and pickleball courts, picnic groves, a cable ferry, and a 40,000-square-foot event lawn. The park is expected to create 600 jobs, [draw 4 to 6 million visitors a year](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAURp8GOwxcQbSg2IZutt3SXOSqZFAmyIwzb7-ZzbZ__X05OTl_btMNY4rH-ht3svW95AkEaC4Ul2IKGNNnUk2wXoRRNmSlUQoGGKFvNtuJHrwxI3gPflBBS63Ja2mWgShA30T7hQklhRTaqL5V0OEyGyOE13rUPVOCQqy5tHWjSm88l_TJLyrtnPcm2a3Wx8m6XwwcA3ddV3stiN-RgcNS45yIgTvoOhm4lGdMDFzAlPDkc34e9cPAbVhyCvyM-56Pkz-w3Pn_z1ry8wi-EN7jsTJwMBiOQB1pPfKBtOGK-oUPQmluhkULj51Xkppiw-OKKcWzN0yJdceY_lnXHzO-LPwNAAD__0PKcrE), and produce $7 billion in economic development over the next 30 years. Around $170 million has been pledged for the project, including $50 million from the wife of the project's namesake. Former First Lady Laura Bush attended the event, along with Mavericks legend Dirk Nowitzki, representatives from Native American tribes, and members of the historic Lone Star Baptist Missionary Church.

Abilene ☀️ 86/52° | Amarillo ☀️ 78/48° | Austin ☀️ 92/55° | Brownsville ☀️ 87/62° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 86/62° | DFW 🌤️ 84/56° | El Paso ☀️ 92/54° | Houston ☀️ 87/58° | Laredo ☀️ 96/61° | Lubbock ☀️ 83/52° | Midland ☀️ 89/53° | San Antonio ☀️ 92/54° | Tyler ☀️ 83/57° | Waco ☀️ 88/54° | Houston Carrier Will Operate Deportation Flights Houston-based budget carrier Avelo Airlines has agreed to for ICE beginning next month, a move the company’s founder and CEO acknowledged is “a sensitive and complicated topic.” The company will use based at Mesa Gateway Airport in Arizona for the “long-term charter program,” providing domestic and international flights in support of the Trump administration’s deportation initiative. Andrew Levy, Avelo’s founder and CEO, said the agreement would help the company expand and provide job security for the company’s 1,100 employees. A job listing says the carrier is seeking “energetic, highly motivated” flight attendants to on the deportation flights. Avelo is already over the agreement. An online petition had received over 19,000 signatures at the time of writing, and the mayor of New Haven, Connecticut—the carrier’s East Coast hub—has called on Levy to reconsider the flights. Student Visas Revoked at Texas A&M, UT Austin Several international students at Texas A&M University and UT Austin have and legal status terminated without prior notice. Student visa revocations have also occurred at other colleges across the country. A Texas A&M spokesperson confirmed , while UT Austin administrators stated that two former students had their visas revoked after a criminal records check. The Trump administration has been who have participated in pro-Palestinian protests or otherwise promoted civil unrest on their campuses. However, Secretary of State Marco Rubio clarified that any “potential criminal activity” is grounds for removal. In some cases, administrators discovered student visas were canceled for misdemeanor crimes or traffic violations. The federal government has also revoked visas for students whose presence could pose "serious adverse foreign policy consequences.” Harold Simmons Park Breaks Ground Dallas residents celebrated a milestone on Tuesday when for Harold Simmons Park, a 250-acre area along the Trinity River that generations of city leaders have dreamed of turning into a vibrant urban green space. The $325 million undertaking will include such as a skate park, cafe, basketball and pickleball courts, picnic groves, a cable ferry, and a 40,000-square-foot event lawn. The park is expected to create 600 jobs, , and produce $7 billion in economic development over the next 30 years. Around $170 million has been pledged for the project, including $50 million from the wife of the project's namesake. Former First Lady Laura Bush attended the event, along with Mavericks legend Dirk Nowitzki, representatives from Native American tribes, and members of the historic Lone Star Baptist Missionary Church. | Flying together with our sponsor It's fallen out of the news cycle, but we know you won't forget these families. At this moment, there are more than 3,000 reported dead, and aid groups have described the damage and needs as “staggering.” | ➤ Brownsville: A federal judge temporarily blocked the deportation of three illegal immigrants from Venezuela yesterday—one day after the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that challenges to deportations pursuant to the 18th-century Alien Enemies Act must be filed in Texas. () ➤ Austin: A motion to remove State Rep. Dustin Burrows (R-Lubbock) as speaker of the Texas House was defeated 141-2 yesterday. State Rep. Brian Harrison (R-Midlothian), who advocated for the speaker's removal, said Burrows has "betrayed the voters of Texas." () ➤ Parker County: Authorities arrested nine people and confiscated 96 live roosters during a cockfighting bust Sunday afternoon. About 40 people fled into a nearby wooded area when deputies arrived at the scene. () ➤ Kerrville: About 3,800 homes and businesses lost power yesterday morning due to “animal interference” at a substation. The Kerrville Public Utility Board identified the culprit as a ringtail. () ➤ Austin: Texas Supreme Court Justice Jeff Boyd announced his intent to retire this summer, allowing Gov. Greg Abbott to appoint his replacement. Boyd was appointed by former Gov. Rick Perry in 2012 and was elected to six-year terms in 2014 and 2020. () ➤ San Antonio: Crews began tearing down the former Institute of Texan Cultures building Tuesday, less than a week after a lawsuit was filed to block its demolition. The 13.59-acre UTSA property is marked for development as part of a multibillion-dollar sports and entertainment district. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Across the Country: April 10th, 2025
body:
5 Facts That Expose the Real Cost of Trump’s Tariffs.
| | | | | |
---
**_Across the Country_**
---
Hello, friend! Welcome back to _Across the Country._ This is __ your weekly breakdown of the policies reshaping American lives. I’m Zoltan Nemeth, and every Thursday, we dig into the real-world impact of political decisions on working families in America. This week we’re diving into the economic chaos unleashed by Trump’s reckless new tariffs. A 90 day "pause" has been implemented to calm the markets, but for many people across the globe, the pain has already been felt. I’ve broken it down into 5 key facts that reveal just how devastating MAGA’s economic agenda has been, and what it means for working Americans moving forward.
---
| | | | **5 Facts That Expose the Real Cost of Trump’s Tariffs**
---
|
---
Donald Trump hit the brakes on his disastrous tariffs this week, but don’t be fooled. The 90-day pause is temporary, and the economic pain is already being felt across America, and around the globe. Let’s be crystal clear: Trump’s tariffs hurt American workers, American consumers, and American allies, and if given another shot, **he’ll do it all over again.** Here are **5 devastating ways** Trump’s reckless trade war is hurting America:
**1\. U.S. Markets Are in Chaos** Wall Street is reeling. Stocks soared after Trump paused his tariffs, only to crash again the very next day. The Dow dropped 2.3%, the S&P 500 tanked, and investor confidence vanished overnight. The fear gauge (VIX) hit levels we haven’t seen since the darkest days of COVID.
**2\. Global Trade Is in Turmoil** From London to Tokyo, markets around the world are rattled. Trillions in value have been wiped out, and even our closest allies are hitting back. Europe, China, and others are preparing retaliatory tariffs, making everything from steel to cars more expensive for American families.
**3\. American Consumers Pay the Price** Trump brags about bringing in billions from foreign countries, but those costs are falling straight on **us, the American people.** Higher tariffs mean **higher prices** on everything from groceries to electronics to auto parts. It’s a hidden tax on working families, plain and simple.
**4\. Small Businesses Are Getting Crushed** Local manufacturers and family-owned farms are losing contracts, slashing jobs, and shutting down operations. They can’t keep up with soaring costs and shrinking export markets. **Trump’s trade war is already devastating the American people,** just months after he returned to the White House.**** MAGA ran a 2024 campaign centered on economic reform and prosperity. But the truth is, they lied to the American people from the start. Now, families, workers, and businesses across the country are paying the price.
**5\. Recession Warning Signs Are Flashing** Economists are sounding the alarm. Goldman Sachs downgraded China’s GDP. JP Morgan warned the tariffs could drag us straight into a global recession. And the Federal Reserve’s progress on inflation? Undermined by Trump’s economic chaos. This is **not** leadership, and Trump is poised to **double down.** The 90-day pause is a stunt to calm the markets before launching another round of economic warfare. We’ve seen this movie before, and we know how it ends: with **American workers footing the bill.** [**_We can’t afford another round of Trump’s reckless trade wars. We need to fight back; join our campaign to hold Trump accountable. Let’s send a message loud and clear: America deserves better than this._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x2ojs-w6tc25-kyd76rh8/) **Thank you for joining us this week, and stay informed with NDLB!**
---
|
---
-Zoltan Nemeth
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x2ojs-w6tc26-kyd76rh9/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x2ojs-w6tc27-kyd76rh0/)
---

---

---
We appreciate your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---
|
---

body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/xFzwGjK8XUuJncA4vbJqYP21hnPqRWHHk257tE8l5PFqdPoGXS4-jBeFh4Zy39Iv5o6aLRmpeJmGf50IEg2ft3uu-KtAG6Jq54ptq9Ik4wvGB2rTqT36rolYB1ngOOj5YeYWdoX-cVRTefBJ7rGTuRwpOtRX_vuiBROlubO-tyFLlLSCDRzphFMcQUT5SXeCDGarYuZjKt3BIP4udskIxnbY5zqNeS_QCdHz1oXBBNNASU90ye50aie4w9joW4oCkm0Qm13BRNDp4jPOcd7BO1-wpjaA6Qq38NTYdedBAtAl3vp5id4LLpiNfr-1whRVKO_in99xwL25Y5q5VQTkJBLywOSlxMIpeYRIKnsaDGuyL6nTdlQW6HQzNyojs6z_2uSR46Z_2ImEuAa1x9QgXzZ5y3QZsbEIqXrTyskD0TD1lj5NL3a0an32WbjRJaeV9tStFGyHqGHbS_vvK63OnI-45OTZij1TKgIx0B1vBO_gZVBJL_OENb90ITjwC4yE/V7EkiRoJ0L76fbERoffqvXpUFD8_n_kg/7 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/3FK9wDJix5doD2JduGCaU8tq-ujYl27gzJ8Sv3XG8qhdgNi1mGxjby_F9q8yTK6WZ2zGlZGBYcc_uacxP5UhrP6L37CtjN5TBmZa8GtyrzmQUOwE1LEc8onp37n6Bfw94HW0-N3b095qdQFFCIob1N9qcH3nLpDcO9ez-zvhVp6jCoFvkUKuzAmMcSdXPtYpvqR1ywbS5cWjntDv_cly4wP9HfyUMLkJy9oAeDqoCS1RMo7o1p8SKGv1W4Hr6sZV60tRp-ICEPHRshDuWXrIr1iwv4BreoCYWwO3JDLCfp3HT3kMoeZQK1tdI2xpDjMKGp1BCo55dYQqgGjQm1NQRpJw5mMpf4pn2vciEONrXiBQHoxIz2AM6AhfttZSvmcSZArH9f5-6rnGaxF5x6D7nGhCNcNWNhl61KoJak_lTLd4tQweJMfytjuHx3ICZR1CF6_jOQqpws6nF2Xgus6kjyXY-wKtLaVxbRcqRJKHa5yPzfm789ncuxFIHmnf9TId/8fCqwYIjTSXJp1HVak1x-qNvkBVmSYPa/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/qz1JB8T4FjXLGs6ozluzQrOklOI3UpZGT_vZqOV7pMHfW5q2QDG5DEwNQpdAVyxeOKcjJVrPrVULInu-CHX0Rq1pMqk_hCSGUHSWGyeFT8pQM-8APw1GBY4EU1-x5D_XEsVe9-ieG-xdxFELmm2ZPklo5pFUcdMFfYojhRfDJyK4f_fZRDtmD8ojBFvSNh3f-EfFM0C1tYH78zbus51jxOtnc4q9eDFrKWMGywmlKRsBL5sf19Ljf7FLZovuiURbHXOaNuuf2P3x0sAInu1QUXEgtNu6zdKdeoujOZYRLttGDpCPEGIxwAvTKyE6nkY8yx6wccyLiGWcyqh8OboSjYnNweKS4_vzXdWPAkd-68BGAQKyCzbFdjownLsAIgAfUQ3tk0L6N2r0BEJ-0p7uSuGvRuyQNGFnOgv1KwGfUcc4z9DXQfnhjgzFqQ8LhnO1R7tcxqaExEG4T-2hux-PAh93oMDn7IXaF8ETfgaH6bNlij2egW6Crqwyx0m3VsCR/ELmjXkfc7KYUhqc3WBIH_Nip3T_OlM6w/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/2LdD6W77Et_pkw7QBSee8xzjsJ0xx1AdSNSDr-yYBRfZ-pIUp7SviygR7aMmTirXDKRsVtlZIORrFlJv5W8l_Epc_6qB80dsU0PIPfCGvFCcyHkkjFkiT9qhzG9TIfJ223RAWHrg3p198ug_NpXe0cz601K7wm1MrMTJOD3bDUjbYHJi3DjtzkGYun1ozXqIPNPzOuuo3pmPZK2O6O3XgpIRVll-GQE5S8K1-xRAxIEeYRlXkhEEOlt0PibbL5oxzAnGkd-zTVKeOuzphLyLmf6Q3avpkCXh9e8J1X5g5wLVliH4nn9R9A5a63OwwzxpEkl7-CM-P8_jppcXs7lcGCCPKjf1V8yKIv0FT0RFqtgf6gFhL0fLeQZWKOF8S-h2xxlYxcSO9bvxvmAfai9Wq4rKvp7y_PcG_Ve51qm6vDLFDDuNyjOOAhTF5ejlNNaLzftJ3i1q13O7yPDEll2LNIfIlVLlIUWluAPfq6s1NodZSJsBS91CCDOm3NJlWdZd/N2JSfOHKBCYQYglQbQCUs_sB41zZriPJ/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_

| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/hMxAT_L1FYR0q9kVwsS9GtNXb7WLRGeHO6q9vPLadYhFGeOFDaQUZjvimpskyqxEqE94Q42ymCdIG29bU8hjkvjn770rYXD7T1mwSvsc7TMDef2Tqr4CjO4A1rBteN7TGWW_J1mDBeK_3nTxdIfCof17tuiE1ZB69WpsZE-nSTIOAejmvvfbirMkETL2WzkrSccISlPZeGRyTdR17OCu6YkB4MqNRFpfzON3epO25hdhZKFhKBYBiqFMFq6YnLUxxsSsYKKgs6-bJllC-ByIfpb8SjYwluKYc-wT7dWIZpD0SWZaNkfkGyEJDHjTlWXsv11q66akeEn1fEUcdURVp_NpoV1oxswL05dBgCITw1RRJ3_GVp1CspzbxSzg3_EynuQrBqmbRPepDhDHDQlFYvzpXhxPkOhmwYE_q2lRpE5aMYSRKUVlpe1SjMaVFLNtJvdzeBIfSCUK8UAUdRMs66gLJPpYi81ZDPv4Ws8vhWjql8Hx1l7JhQ5v5pi_TSgL/V7T-Rurdh9D69hDbkAQAV87MC31Ats6x/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/rVq9jp15vQOt3LJ4u0Rj35kiKsmpFQQWAkcJ5wWH8YGu4ymTsG1LFlrCpkZOP3TqnUcX5KzAQA0x2yYG9INxaRKiFtVvBPFTvcARDKjBUIOy1cafYWdy328vCex5Ov-_gELYP6X_4zdt4u2h7NgfMgVGsjW5AaK5XsXrwoWb10pasQzHQa8-8azTZ48R6Cwuler2C5EkKdig_CU-kPAdiX1Vxha6FKD9tLjuOgY8wdlfip42ZznXrHC5x3zjQ6MJJzumpGMartPGCcyRFa6DGrHFhGbNKWIDb0VK5zN386G1xSGplD7hbnZqgUC9cEJTIXScqWH4oiZ9eQ2JAsuk25c8X6vh0bV2jKBtspmtwNFESY8-Sapp0-rymkUwI0cjQXTzSIpFxpAoXkDUhKJ4Nkxqon1Oz9vfA8YAerY72qktRbPY6GWRIQD26OT6_12NRo5wHrodJCX33jPMBSkPFSlKyKENdb8Dl209lffFtWXALPzWQgtnkKFfwhpBBWFR/0tOIsxg0_UhPAzZcfqDK52CW8QVys33E/7 "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance

name: Freedom Virginia
subject: ❓What is Going On With Hidden Fees❓
body:
You may have seen that the Governor made some amendments to the legislation to ban hidden fees: so what’s going on?
| | | | |
---
| ❓What is Going On With Hidden Fees❓
---
| Friends-
You may have seen that the Governor made some amendments to the legislation to ban hidden fees: so what's going on?
The legislation to ban hidden fees ([SB 1212](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQ_nVNnCBRfcxXOruEfnSFx8YuNS6O7EUG7Da34jEdWZ8HFQBKmsjuBf-fq4GTUiPUEquIPl3T0H_PbhrAv7rjbMogLP75u__7K-5sjKIVKMaRyY4DUW4GUuev0Z7yUbUQcNmFzwZMIozH7rIK1vABLeBm3rFCFNBz-Nlo4Y0xyrJqiyuV4PaRLRHbIGXtnh&c=t4YFoNcCGdYIj9PAtH3g51GvugefOAH1u9nuVvywTJ3hyj35Qe05iw==&ch=stkkJ5WI8pR02OJjOVGhMEkkc7tyM08whQPNOjFFs4HKPLRqhCO_Yg==) & [HB 2515](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQ_nVNnCBRfcxXOruEfnSFx8YuNS6O7EUG7Da34jEdWZ8HFQBKmsjuBf-fq4GTUiXIskOKc1BSdTUrENfvxl_pn-4IjFYBpl0t1la_U1-B3PRBJtDRpW6_RmSapsa4mYPvoa_YJRvvIl3NpReBLAv1YnefMfIt2h0jgKu_ddFiVc8dpj6dtGi1rRmYMEVlWP&c=t4YFoNcCGdYIj9PAtH3g51GvugefOAH1u9nuVvywTJ3hyj35Qe05iw==&ch=stkkJ5WI8pR02OJjOVGhMEkkc7tyM08whQPNOjFFs4HKPLRqhCO_Yg==)) requires that ALL businesses advertise the price of their products and services up front, meaning no surprise hidden fees at checkout. BUT, the Governor's amendments made exceptions for food delivery services and gyms, as well as delaying the start date of the legislation until 2026. In doing this, he has provided loopholes for corporations to continue their dishonest business practices.
---
| [Read More Here](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQ_nVNnCBRfcxXOruEfnSFx8YuNS6O7EUG7Da34jEdWZ8HFQBKmsjuBf-fq4GTUi_InHa69AFYgiMKrQev6zP0GcMRx7hIg-nN22VTNN68DVvZyJo84kp5207rBahvOPjl4ZRUmynKSRGly2xV_5UnJ4JoQPVUzyd8hjMMhFgrMDpQYxbjEkgO7a6A7cGBBHz13hLu4ALP5oYAJJ4KhokCtCAjYZgbH8Z8Dc-NSCboZ2ws0FlQYk35eCv_8NwuKe3XqRwGaogPF4YGoN-dBgbpPtRwdBLsQ5vsfNviCYwx0=&c=t4YFoNcCGdYIj9PAtH3g51GvugefOAH1u9nuVvywTJ3hyj35Qe05iw==&ch=stkkJ5WI8pR02OJjOVGhMEkkc7tyM08whQPNOjFFs4HKPLRqhCO_Yg==)
---
So, what happens next?
The General Assembly has rejected the Governor's amendments and returned the bills to his desk in their original form. Now, it is time for the Governor to decide whether he will side with Virginia families or corporations.
Shinji Oh Digital Manger
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQ_nVNnCBRfcxXOruEfnSFx8YuNS6O7EUG7Da34jEdWZ8HFQBKmsjpiQvBGudvzcWsYnCW7XiELPUcmvPL-bXxx7im7vfC1-WDuLhyDQsdfa9SCYzXrLV7QqT1NNBHMxpgxq3aZLQx4q1vT-gXvdjjIvnN0s4xvWyWMqJfwsnO8=&c=t4YFoNcCGdYIj9PAtH3g51GvugefOAH1u9nuVvywTJ3hyj35Qe05iw==&ch=stkkJ5WI8pR02OJjOVGhMEkkc7tyM08whQPNOjFFs4HKPLRqhCO_Yg==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQ_nVNnCBRfcxXOruEfnSFx8YuNS6O7EUG7Da34jEdWZ8HFQBKmsjpiQvBGudvzckIn35ssysKUUb05KhaKWnfqQEtaCk8aeWc_JqQOXhYOccVwQQVWPtiCdbSUmEctl6xhGfghOwRsc2PRT8TNUkr23T87WhBFE&c=t4YFoNcCGdYIj9PAtH3g51GvugefOAH1u9nuVvywTJ3hyj35Qe05iw==&ch=stkkJ5WI8pR02OJjOVGhMEkkc7tyM08whQPNOjFFs4HKPLRqhCO_Yg==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PQ_nVNnCBRfcxXOruEfnSFx8YuNS6O7EUG7Da34jEdWZ8HFQBKmsjpiQvBGudvzca7fHev9kPwcmkQsDcQbGez0tV7fscusfE_hKQpmvaS-uii_1WkWLrkoAru8HLRsj2uP8wrqlXbqyZkwNet_TSW1TDWE9yfulscLIzGKDpVA=&c=t4YFoNcCGdYIj9PAtH3g51GvugefOAH1u9nuVvywTJ3hyj35Qe05iw==&ch=stkkJ5WI8pR02OJjOVGhMEkkc7tyM08whQPNOjFFs4HKPLRqhCO_Yg==)

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4ftdt4ht20eljdejvuhst0ojn10mo5lspliarj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zenvc04t667ao151ron9hef863sfvlqveod8kmag_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk9urj3ec45fcqi6o5af23bba62lorla3grg6q18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd57vhl5v8r75489avc4rgbe5vvmh6c85njd2tlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjd9jo4od15qr9sp8k841sl76g9ql43g7qn0vi4g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3pk0mav9o3e62rshmc03n5pj8vo29d2c7u5kkbg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zddflss2rm4810nhtmmab52gdifd1627e343q0so_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1csog5git8lo89pjkek27r2jcvs8lcbfd6t3lkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5hqsbssg5dqab852bkd96jd5lqquqdrt97p238_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg17vuqlvfouvf0p7i83oc0ak6ljsrqj4nuacjp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5h9oo9a2d0vo5s8vllsucocb8upanbtoee92s0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg60o72cph2bs)

Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.

name: Justin Balik, Evergreen
subject: [Action alert] Republicans are trying to increase air pollution
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
ACT NOW to stop them
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479016/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
| Republicans are hijacking the rule of law and attempting to eliminate one of the most effective tools for reducing transportation pollution. Will you join us in calling out this petty political stunt that could have serious consequences for communities suffering from smog and dangerous air pollution? [TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479017/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Hi—

Republicans are about to pull another stunt and blow past legal limits to their power—this time to come after states' ability to limit pollution.

They’re doing this by trying to eliminate a set of Clean Air Act “waivers” granted by the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA), which allow states like California to set their own vehicle emission standards that are even stricter than the federal government’s. These waivers effectively drive forward vehicle electrification and reduce emissions from transportation, the most polluting sector in our economy.

Yet despite a recent ruling confirming that these waivers can’t be undone through political stunts—namely an obscure legislative tool known as the Congressional Review Act (CRA) process—**Republicans are barreling forward with multiple resolutions to kneecap these life-saving clean air protections anyway.
**
**It’s like Republicans are determined to poison our kids. And we shouldn’t stand for it.**

If enough members of Congress hear from their constituents before voting on these resolutions—which could happen _this week_ —there’s a chance we can stop this blatant attempt to bend the law. [**But we have to act now.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479018/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[SEND A MESSAGE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479019/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks to the EPA waivers, California is already cutting pollution, driving innovation, and protecting public health.

These state standards are critical to protecting Americans from trucking emissions that are responsible for hundreds of thousands of premature deaths and childhood asthma cases, plus over a trillion dollars in economic damages. **Eliminating them would mean all of us paying the price—with our health, economy, and future.**

Republicans love to talk about “states rights”— _that is, until states stand up to fossil fuel interests._ 😒

These CRA resolutions are nothing but a bad faith attempt to protect corporate polluters by undermining climate progress. And if they go through, **they’ll actively harm communities who live near big highways and other busy thoroughfares where vehicle pollution is regularly belched into the air.**

We can’t allow Republicans to hijack the legislative process and make it easier for polluters to keep poisoning our communities. [**Send a message urging your members of Congress to uphold the law and preserve state leadership on climate by voting against these dangerous CRA resolutions.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479020/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[EMAIL YOUR REPS NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479021/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Thanks for taking action today. |
---
| | |
---
### Justin Balik
Vice President, States
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479022/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479023/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479024/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479025/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3479026/87SdQ4wZ)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I can’t say this in public
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
You’re one of the few I trust with this.
| Friend,
---
There’s a lot that goes on behind the scenes in Washington that the American people don’t see.
---
**_But you’ve proven to be a trustworthy America First patriot, so I’m going to entrust _YOU_ with information that I can’t divulge publicly. _ **
---
I just ask that you keep what I’m about to tell you between us, Friend.
---
[**Please read my confidential memo that I’m only sharing with my most trusted grassroots supporters.**](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b784e57511834891b5d48565c908299c&_e=u_57fe7XQsnE-_-01w2eXnamchgZu19aERHkYAU_JxqNOquCarvl50bf5XeH--gigRhtZx-17AY5yUC3ofv2fvlKha3YEtOlh6NQZVBaDfYhhF4yCJbVj9hdxhgcZEmhtcH9BOzTO6QKUJ4XFCzPAs052AGsc2XVVjqcSjx1DyU68WAALSaqLoT4pqVfDeK9fYkR7CFyOjbCcLh6GgR_W6xFQntfTYWkyLhrITH-2zB09i38okxVBqEut2xbBGQjwUTF7tGP-1CYu-_PPfJE2VPhSPKqANt_N5HOo9x4J8QvZqQCbb8QnA6Zv2E_o0lPmzPpTCvTtTIyYpG8pFkhnoSqNb-M8gRhGaPzmmTAOhI%3D)
---

[ACCESS HERE >>](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=b784e57511834891b5d48565c908299c&_e=u_57fe7XQsnE-_-01w2eXnamchgZu19aERHkYAU_JxqNOquCarvl50bf5XeH--gigRhtZx-17AY5yUC3ofv2fvlKha3YEtOlh6NQZVBaDfYhhF4yCJbVj9hdxhgcZEmhtcH9BOzTO6QKUJ4XFCzPAs052AGsc2XVVjqcSjx1DyU68WAALSaqLoT4pqVfDeK9fYkR7CFyOjbCcLh6GgR_W64mdQFjtQ1VeLOf-yvecF3wwtLNMK55dA03pLT6IH44KixgmaCkdUxd9nKK8DNv8GBFRtZE6nnlKsxjfhtyKUOiARkEaUMV_V09glKLRiVaG2WHdncbU5ociil6JEGFkD9KTF3Nv3RbHLOyAswiFiY%3D)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zipjg0230q3lt2pbl7b7f3c4ing1255mfgm0jij8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbib1005fjvket0at22qtqjfglditnfrjekjc3jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1rlkt162e5pg8e43rsb40c26srht56hafjj0vk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zak0a4di0vmh8usdb069b2njqdk9mqm3fpa230rg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z64ga100osac9rbjbqup09mjt5kn5ptkjvnkudeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

body:
Colin Allred is DANGEROUS – not only for the MAGA agenda but for America. Help us mobilize our forces against him NOW.

_Friend, let 's talk about Colin Allred._

He is "seriously considering" throwing his hat in the ring for ANOTHER senate run in 2026 - this time waging competition against Texas Senator John Cornyn.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr003ajtglpg18lisa1a5hqtm313nqvn3e6a6n7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6c5h2bs)

**[In his 2024 run against Senator Ted Cruz, Allred raised over $93 million.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zenn1p07l8b0lgsmrfic162bp1vektuk5lumoaao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6c5h2bs)** He kept Democrat billionaires like George Soros in his back pocket - continuously _outpacing and outraising Ted Cruz._

**[We can't let him have another close call.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvjv5a6jg42t1gi9mdpv5dmp8n20fs39ra85jrng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6c5h2bs)** Why? Because Colin Allred is _dangerous._

In Congress, he repeatedly voted AGAINST the interests of Texas, aligning with radical Democrats who favor open border policies.

He voted AGAINST the POLICE Act, which proves he does not care about those who lay their lives on the line on a daily basis for the safety of American citizens - but rather illegal immigrants carelessly committing murder.

Allred was also IN FAVOR of ALLOWING illegal aliens to vote in U.S. elections.

If his past actions prove anything, it is this - **Colin Allred DOES NOT CARE about Americans like you, friend._[This is why we must start mobilizing our forces NOW.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4vlgsu8r38i1en9ekk9phpka48ojv59nj6bf3po_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6c5h2bs)_**

We _MUST ensure our war chest is filled and READY_ for when he formally announces his intent to run. There's no way that Senate Republicans will stand a chance against his fundraising again - with billionaires like Soros in his corner.

Senate Republicans desperately need patriots like YOU to step up NOW. **[Will you please chip in $5 or more to help us prepare for the fight?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdjaeq3dfedljaai1u8ealrsukdbob93c72ib3v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg62ob6c5h2bs)**

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: The SAVE Act is dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
I am voting no. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105542437/538680904/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250410_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ2NjUxYy0wZDE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynsS5p4VSGi5SeE12zYSaUedo12HO2zcUPg7OVr0Eo0=&emci=390e0b96-7a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=22d6651c-0d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15529135) | Soon, the House will vote on the _SAVE Act_ , which has the potential to upend elections and disenfranchise millions of voters nationwide. **I will be voting NO on this legislation. Let me take a minute to explain why.** The MAGA movement has continually attacked the right to vote and our election systems since day one, all to sow distrust in free and fair elections. If signed into law, the _SAVE Act_ would require voters to register in person and provide proof of citizenship to vote in federal elections, meaning that most voters would likely have to provide a passport or birth certificate just to be able to vote. This will make it harder for veterans, disabled voters, and married women who have changed their last names to register to vote. The _SAVE Act_ amounts to a poll tax because those who can’t afford a passport will face additional barriers to voting. These loopholes present more unnecessary obstacles, which Republicans know only benefits the GOP. MAGA extremists win when voters cannot cast their ballot or stay home because the process has become overwhelming. **[This is a veiled attempt at voter suppression. This will impact marginalized communities, including women, people of color, disabled voters, and elderly voters, and create more problems than it solves. Pitch in right now to stand with me in this fight against voter suppression.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105542442/538680906/-1534047261?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250410_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ2NjUxYy0wZDE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynsS5p4VSGi5SeE12zYSaUedo12HO2zcUPg7OVr0Eo0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105542445/538680909/-1534047261?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250410_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmQ2NjUxYy0wZDE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ynsS5p4VSGi5SeE12zYSaUedo12HO2zcUPg7OVr0Eo0=)

clean_body: I am voting no. | | Soon, the House will vote on the SAVE Act , which has the potential to upend elections and disenfranchise millions of voters nationwide. I will be voting NO on this legislation. Let me take a minute to explain why. The MAGA movement has continually attacked the right to vote and our election systems since day one, all to sow distrust in free and fair elections. If signed into law, the SAVE Act would require voters to register in person and provide proof of citizenship to vote in federal elections, meaning that most voters would likely have to provide a passport or birth certificate just to be able to vote. This will make it harder for veterans, disabled voters, and married women who have changed their last names to register to vote. The SAVE Act amounts to a poll tax because those who can’t afford a passport will face additional barriers to voting. These loopholes present more unnecessary obstacles, which Republicans know only benefits the GOP. MAGA extremists win when voters cannot cast their ballot or stay home because the process has become overwhelming. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support — voting is a fundamental freedom, and I am committed to doing everything I can to protect it. — Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Businessman Kevin O'Leary **[wrecked a naive Yahoo Finance reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/36c74406-7e32-46c7-8f9c-ad0d6ec26157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for mischaracterizing President Trump's tariff agenda during a painfully frustrating live interview.
_**" You can't blame just the tariffs for this!!" O'Leary snaps.**_
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36c74406-7e32-46c7-8f9c-ad0d6ec26157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/36c74406-7e32-46c7-8f9c-ad0d6ec26157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I have had every source on our show this morning say that these tariffs will be causing a recession," the reporter told O'Leary.
"They don't know that yet!" O'Leary fired back. He explained that there were two important aspects to Trump's tariffs: reciprocality or charging equal rates to those that our trade partners charge us, which he says will "go away quickly" and "lead to fair trade." The 2nd aspect is to address other trade imbalances disadvantaging the United States.
"When you try to use tariffs to fix trade imbalances it's difficult because really you are starting a behemoth negotiation," he explained.
"But Kevin," the reporter interjected. "As of this morning, from the 34% retaliatory tariff from China to the U.S. we are not getting closer to free trade, we are just getting further into a trade war."
O'Leary disagreed, "China is a different story,... this is about a wide range of issues, IP law, access to business, access to courts, being compliant with U.S. regulations on securities! This has nothing to do with just tariffs!"
The reporter interjected again, "But that's the tool that this administration is using. Why are tariffs the correct tool,... it's not working."
"China doesn't play by the rules," O'Leary fired back. "They're going to have to start doing it pretty soon!"
"You want to talk about the markets correcting?! You can't blame just the tariffs for this!" O'Leary continued. "These have been very expensive markets now for almost 18 months, now they're having a correction!"
**[Watch the fiery clash right there:](https://substack.com/redirect/36c74406-7e32-46c7-8f9c-ad0d6ec26157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

O'Leary disagreed, "China is a different story,... this is about a wide range of issues, IP law, access to business, access to courts, being compliant with U.S. regulations on securities! This has nothing to do with just tariffs!" The reporter interjected again, "But that's the tool that this administration is using. Why are tariffs the correct tool,... it's not working." "China doesn't play by the rules," O'Leary fired back. "They're going to have to start doing it pretty soon!" "You want to talk about the markets correcting?! You can't blame just the tariffs for this!" O'Leary continued. "These have been very expensive markets now for almost 18 months, now they're having a correction!" Do You Support DOGE? Let It Show! | | ---|---|--- Do you remember this?! Trump pulls black woman from the crowd, what he does next is amazing Watch this amazing MAGA moment when Trump sees a woman in crowd that gives him an idea... The media could not believe he actually did what happens next. PolitiBrawl Originals: DOGE crashes radical left protest, what happens next is unbelievable | | POLL Do you stand with Donald Trump and the U.S. against China in these tough trade negotiations? | ? ? ? ? name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The SAVE Act passed the House!
body:
Say ‘Thank You’ to the reps. who voted yes!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** The SAVE Act passed the House this morning--a major win for securing our elections! We're one step closer to safeguarding the future. Now's the time to thank the representatives who voted YES on the SAVE Act. **ACTION:** Send a quick "thank you" email or make a call today. **All House Republicans voted yes, and the following four Democrats crossed the aisle in support of only U.S. citizens voting in our elections,** so please be sure to thank them because you know they'll be hearing from a ton of outraged leftists. **Democrats who voted yes:**
* **Ed Case** (HI-01): [202-225-2726](tel:2022252726 "202-225-2726")
* **Henry Cuellar** (TX-28): [202-225-1640](tel:2022251640 "202-225-1640")
* **Jared Golden** (ME-02): [202-225-6306](tel:2022256306 "202-225-6306")
* **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez** (WA-03): [202-225-3536](tel:2022253536 "202-225-3536")

Therefore, if you are represented by a Republican in the House, or one of the four Democrats above, please tell your representative thank you.
Looking ahead, the fight will be big in the Senate to get this passed, and the left will whatever they can to stop any Democrat senators from crossing the aisle to vote yes for the SAVE Act. Keep an eye on your emails from us so that when the time comes to call the Senate, you know what to do and when to do it. **** __ **__** **** ************
---
| **** Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************

name: Derrick Evans, Ex-J6 Prisoner
subject: It wasn't cheap finding your name and email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555
body:
Can I just get 2 minutes of your time?

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsii5bksqs30t8vdqort1faeaaj566tk80ctbpk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn5phrnajep1gbg5ttk0lm1baupsaksub5cl32ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
**Thank you for opening my email.**

99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means **_everything_** to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of _lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial_. In 2021, my life was flipped upside down. **I was thrown into a Biden Regime Gulag****for almost 100 days.** _Why?_ Because I _**peacefully**_ protested on January 6th – standing up for President Trump and the _74 million Americans who voted for him_. **Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bust****down my front door.** My wife and kids were terrified. **Prison was going to be my home now.**
---
[**SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhi64aa9nvlqde80tq7ciqn6jo72lvm230fv7n08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zga7f7ktg7emrdqlp8feqm5uv6se2rliitmfmjf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden’s Gulag. It reminded me that I can’t give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ________________________________________
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3d5oif37et1kv3qd0anr504qjja7scevjptgp2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.________________________________________ **I will never take my freedom for granted again.** **That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing.** Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. **The D.C. elites have sold us out** —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. **Hard-working families are getting****CRUSHED in all 50 states.** I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. **My campaign is 100% powered by****patriots like you.** If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —**I need you in this fight with me.** **99% of Republicans will ignore this message.** **Even fewer will donate.** _Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way?_ **$10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. ** **Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump.** **THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! **
---
[**SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq8ve4bs2il5o75tglog0phdg2coc61lbe7fsse8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
[**SEND ME TO THE U.S. SENATE**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1e2a3or48apcqpf28p9fmeup9q1rcf4p595k5c0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
Derrick Evans
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6p27mrkf9c4b9o1esq020rahp1rv3i1pvv7vap8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate
---

---
| |

Pop Acta Media | Your America

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
