name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1t1ts78keuej04u04dtc8td5gd2rbj5f4h7ktn8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zepo9a6libu4mkh0uclaigt5v3ej42mqjs25orb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7jp2rtldqq2etuvh7r54u2upum39nj1folo16uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z6130bchbm1vn1grc967idbbafjrg8q2fqc7ohn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1tt848nkqtnqbpi9aj00o9knjft89so7skalqqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7s3em4lmf9c61s571r6bhn9q94cqfir0c0o2oj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zegi8c19pbvel07j9s5hcd1e9oee6uojlk9pk39o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z345nrui35jiahjld0c2ok45pffi6mnbafe7krdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdl513hpl07fmsn44nvf1502o21l6gvju1q182v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Update For America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zt5qfujqq8fh2k1cfg9baggjbgc8gpec778j7dq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonacpnm9q3bd9ieir38ct66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni62oj7c1i6eoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zb24a2nav0flcpt1g0l16oikrll6uqsd4c8tcimo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zte7ss18mo33ulcak4trfobh1si1gkj6aosrkkbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg6apj6c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. Erica is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. She believes in building a community that’s safe, sustainable, and strong, where everyone has a voice, and every resident, regardless of age, race, gender, or background, feels welcome and protected.

Her Democratic opponent, Barry Cassidy, on the other hand, is running as a Democrat, but his words and actions tell a shocking story. **He is a proud white nationalist who routinely uses racist and anti-LGBTQ language. He openly aligns with MAGA extremism.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105547476/538694283/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250410bump_N_JZ_90DO_4_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNjQyNGUzLTBmMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dOi2H-RyqOIJfTDnddSxPWpF4mHapfmnZ-Yt66kAW7M=)
---
That’s not all: If Erica wins the primary, she will be facing off against Republican Richard Bryant, **a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter.** He uses his online platform to spew misogyny, anti-trans rhetoric, and racist commentary. Additionally, he is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. He advocates for violence, promotes mass deportation, and supports banning books and suppressing votes. As Erica’s campaign has stated, **“This isn’t political disagreement—this is dangerous, dehumanizing extremism.”**

_In Erica’s own words: “The constituency in Downingtown is diverse, educated, and proud of our borough’s progress and growing inclusivity. Voters here care about good schools, safe streets, responsible development, and a local government that reflects the people it serves. They want a mayor who listens, who leads with compassion, and who is focused on building a better future.

I bring my whole self to this work—including my perspective as a trans woman who’s had to fight to be taken seriously in rooms where decisions get made. That makes me more determined to lead with purpose and to make sure every woman in Downingtown knows her voice matters, and her community has her back. Because when we take care of women, we’re taking care of the whole town.”_

**But Erica needs our help.**

[**Her campaign needs to raise $17,000 to fully fund all of their programs. Through our incredible community of grassroots supporters, we know we can help her get there. Rush support to Erica’s campaign by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution immediately →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105547477/538694284/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250410bump_N_JZ_90DO_4_NG_N_L3&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwNjQyNGUzLTBmMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dOi2H-RyqOIJfTDnddSxPWpF4mHapfmnZ-Yt66kAW7M=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

Voters here care about good schools, safe streets, responsible development, and a local government that reflects the people it serves. They want a mayor who listens, who leads with compassion, and who is focused on building a better future. I bring my whole self to this work—including my perspective as a trans woman who’s had to fight to be taken seriously in rooms where decisions get made. That makes me more determined to lead with purpose and to make sure every woman in Downingtown knows her voice matters, and her community has her back. Because when we take care of women, we’re taking care of the whole town.” But Erica needs our help. = Thank you, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for political office in America. As dangerous laws about women get passed in states with the lowest numbers of women in government (11%, 12%....), we're BREAKING the male supermajorities across those states. Because men shouldn't be making laws about women's bodies. Support this important work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. "_It's very difficult to reduce the size of the bureaucracy and government spending, it comes with immense opposition, even when the things that we are cutting make no sense at all._

---
| Peter, the extreme SAVE Act just **passed** the House of Representatives!! This DANGEROUS bill would require Americans to prove in person that they’re a citizen. If this bill becomes law, it could:
* Hurt states’ voter registration efforts by stopping people from registering to vote by mail or online – which is how Americans typically register.
* Disenfranchise millions of Americans who don’t own a passport or who – through name changes – don’t have a birth certificate with their legal name.
* Severely set back the fight for voting rights!!

Peter, voting is a key part of any democracy. We need leaders who will work to EXPAND ballot access, not threaten it. **Senate Democrats will work HARD to block the SAVE Act from becoming law.** Our Democratic leaders in Congress are fighting tirelessly against MAGA bills that would threaten our rights and freedoms. But to _guarantee_ Democrats can defeat dangerous bills, we need to make sure they win their upcoming special elections and take control of the House and Senate. [Will you chip in $10 to Blue Amp Action today to make an investment in the candidates working to flip Congress blue? Your support right now will have a major impact on protecting our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0ff8cbcf-3c3f-46a1-b17b-2fbd6f54bbf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I had no idea what to expect.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I started working to change our gun laws, I wasn't sure what to expect.
#

Friends -
When I started working to change our gun laws, I wasn't sure what to expect.
Sure, I knew friends would help launch our effort, but my biggest fear at the time was that a lack of grassroots support would make people think the public wasn’t on our side in the fight to change our gun laws.
Since then, millions of people have signed up to join our fight -- Democrats, Republicans and Independents -- all calling out with one voice that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! It is time to make our communities safer from gun violence.
But now, with Donald Trump in office and Kash Patel at the FBI and ATF, I have that same fear -- that a lack of grassroots support for our effort will make the new administration and the new Congress think our enthusiasm has waned and that they can do whatever they wish to weaken our gun laws.
Donations to GIFFORDS go to our work in Congress, the courts, and communities across the country to make us safer from gun violence.
I cannot do this alone. I need your help.
[**Can you make a contribution to send an unmistakable message that you want action to make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=1&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D1xNsr&amount=3&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=20&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr25.Hbc3hL&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=21&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-apr25.qYj7DB&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=22&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr25.LyCti9&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=23&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-apr25.DtUm5U&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=24&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr25.D1xNsr&refcode=em250410-1-b&t=25&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9)**
---
****
It’s not about how much money we raise today, but how many people chip in to power our effort. We’ll put each donation to work in the fight to change our gun laws.
Thank you. I mean that.
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=10275%2E3935704%2EB9LAt9) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Dear Peter, This past month, we had the incredible opportunity to host a Pastor Summit in Gainesville, Georgia, at Jentezen Franklin's Free Chapel. With over 1,200 pastors and ministry leaders in attendance, it was a powerful time of connection, encouragement, and vision-casting for the future of the Church. Pastor Jentezen shared an inspiring reminder that our faith calls us to engage both spiritually and culturally.

As of Thursday, March 20, 2025, the President of the United States, Donald Trump, signed an [Executive Order](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWxx1f58kNyRW57j4ZC4wNWLcW72Qs8N5vcVJ_N5XFYm45kBVqW69t95C6lZ3pJW2cZtcr4HGT7cW1DR97t4HN2WDW2ZK15T5J6c9YW4CqgH34tb2PzW4cPTZb45-fJLW2DP7Vg6x-PcQVHhh_g3hcdMQW5NxR9H6_m91DW62H0Z16xlgLVW2y2dBP7zw8snW4Vf3r27mZrgpW5_8wnr85GZh2W11qxNt4gyMBRW1N-y8h2g4STJVW3gN46d7td9N3tJb_fcRxdnN90Y1cHG1yvnMzM8VkwLWvnW3TtmNl20HkZhW69_VLP73qbm6VMLYGt7_jLzGVz-y1c7nFFkFW8xnjdq56g_sFW8__9kr2zPB_qW5YD5nS3dv6fPW1FGSz57vssY7W3pvLdP2YPhRvW2fD4QY1NZFzzW1bh9j72XDDZbW7g1Sw39d4PwlN93fy069_BXpW2_gtQj98RD4yN8hVmjnvxQySW5K9qrc6cTg-gW6-HlzR4FZ13VW9gHZYy8yZZKSf97f8TH04) to abolish the U.S. Department of Education (DOE). The order effectively triggers the process of returning public education to the states, aiming to give parents and local communities more control over their students’ safety and academic success. According to the White House [Fact Sheet](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWxx1f58kNyRW57j4ZC4wNWLcW72Qs8N5vcVJ_N5XFYm45kBVqW69t95C6lZ3n1W6fdS-m2yqdSsW460Q_L4nd5CDW66kFg44VXvQ4N3gfsxwR5-HTW3ndpKG41js48W1vXDVl6z6nXsW4SVzn319jWmvW5v49pX8KYzzsVbv9_x534R1kW6M_jjy8D9n7MVlQDYV94xX34MgJvqj1W7CdW101GTh5g_CHJW3Y316_2Jp8rbVhnvV81tBMdtW7TL8tm6CVVr_W8WbrPN249KnZVZ2N-g8c3FMyW7X28Zq1rdPvhW6kyb7S51NdCJW61kjNr2z7pLrN4Jd8hGcw52XW18vHVc3HfFB_N90JykTTWpcZW5qwPtP5dTbYfW55djM885_2l9W5tVXY76zKScnVJPyPs2JvFm8N1RBwSGCytWVW8J1nkx6MH_RqW4MF7KL2xF2pVW90LCp77BlgBxW2rGYpF7nnFPBW1Hb_L07zjnNcW2qT-lv8QV3ncW7hXzhk886Jh-f42CXFj04), the order seeks to accomplish two goals:
* _“The Executive Order directs the Secretary of Education to take all necessary steps to facilitate the closure of the Department of Education and return education authority to the States.”_
* _“The Order also directs that programs or activities receiving any remaining Department of Education funds will not advance DEI or gender ideology.”_

In response, the DOE [issued a statement](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VWxx1f58kNyRW57j4ZC4wNWLcW72Qs8N5vcVJ_N5XFYm45kBVqW69t95C6lZ3mmW2XWhPY5lCgrbW56yx3H6XwBHJW58RQ3G1Y4FymW79fSZR43vDphW32VtPR1Ky5hCW8TfPC24b1d3VW85Spk71Jk6HgW5gyqd215WxddW2KwYZB4PyqYgW7fKXkR2-v-cMVt4Hfb3Hq7MVW7gX6d259KjTzW4wRDlN3XqScJW4ZHdbQ7KJvGVW1c8mM82V9cNxW80mhh_8k-n0bW36QPvD6X_cP7W6ht7lS7ssqNTW42byc-8ZvwL-W6Mb2C55Y57PRW7cs9lt4fPSymW2FjrcS8KytnSW4xfq0K14S-lPW3LzPcK4_rv-sW2NdLWK1QzcSCW1MqhF-7JRJg6W4W3DLf1jgFhSN6M8C-ndWxp4W3jBsfG7lm_T7W1h1YGg7B5LhxW3qzGBm757Mn-W3K7QDb7fbCdkW7rSwKg9fsx9PW2Ymx4X6XbhnGW4XDrx73mXSTwW77h0Hb8vfmPmf4ht9Hx04): _“Education is fundamentally a state responsibility. Instead of filtering resources through layers of federal red tape, we will empower states to take charge and advocate for and implement what is best for students, families, and educators in their communities.”_ The DOE assured the public that it will continue supporting K-12 school districts and special needs students in “follow[ing] the law and eliminating the bureaucracy” that may prohibit an “orderly transition.” Since its inception in 1979, the Department of Education has been a fixture in American life, and many citizens rely on government-run schools. State control should encourage parents to exercise their authority to (re)prioritize their children’s academic success and ensure their family values are conserved for future generations.

**Participate In Our Monthly Challenge**
---
**Monthly Challenge:** This month, let's focus on deepening our faith by memorizing and reflecting on a powerful Bible verse! **Verse of the Month: Luke 9:23-24****
** _And he said to them all, “If anyone wants to follow after me, let him deny himself, take up his cross daily, and follow me. For whoever wants to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life because of me will save it.”_ Is it worth it to deny our flesh, die to self daily, and follow Christ?
1. **Following Christ requires sacrifice but leads to true life —** Though it is not an easy task, or our natural, fleshly tendency, we as believers in Christ are called to sacrifice for the cause of Christ. Bearing a cross meant impending death, and that one would face ridicule and disgrace along the way. Dying to self is an absolute surrender to God. The disciples counted the cost of following Christ, giving up their previous way of life to obediently and passionately pursue Him, facing all kinds of religious and civil punishments. Are you willing to count the cost and find it worthy to follow Christ even if that means giving up everything?

2. **Not following Christ is easy but leads to ultimate ruin —** It is certainly far easier to live according to the desires of our flesh, to fit in and be accepted by a sinful and depraved world. This is our natural tendency. However, in the end, those who try to build their lives apart from Christ on this earth will ultimately lose it. The end is destruction and emptiness.

Are you willing to follow Jesus if it means losing everything?
If faced with a choice, either Jesus or the comforts of this life, which will you choose? Count the cost. **Is He worthy?** Download the graphic below, set it as your wallpaper, and take time throughout the month to memorize and meditate on this verse. Reflect on its meaning and how it can transform your life.

clean_body: This past month, we had the incredible opportunity to host a Pastor Summit in Gainesville, Georgia, at Jentezen Franklin's Free Chapel. With over 1,200 pastors and ministry leaders in attendance. | Dear Peter, This past month, we had the incredible opportunity to host a Pastor Summit in Gainesville, Georgia, at Jentezen Franklin's Free Chapel. With over 1,200 pastors and ministry leaders in attendance, it was a powerful time of connection, encouragement, and vision-casting for the future of the Church. Pastor Jentezen shared an inspiring reminder that our faith calls us to engage both spiritually and culturally. to see more photos and videos from the Faith Forward Pastor Summit! | March Freedom Night In America Recap At this month’s Freedom Night in America, Charlie Kirk was joined by special guest Pastor Allen Jackson. Pastor Allen shared his powerful testimony of how God led him to establish World Outreach Church, offering an eye-opening perspective on the spiritual forces shaping our nation. He emphasized how both angelic and demonic forces are actively influencing our culture and how Christians must be spiritually aware and grounded in Scripture to navigate these times. He encouraged believers to boldly stand for truth and prioritize a relationship with Jesus, reminding us that real change starts with an awakened, Spirit-led Church—not political victories alone. Join Us At Young Women's Leadership Summit in Dallas, TX! The women who embody the movement are just like you, from all walks of life—-rooted in truth, radiant in purpose, and bold in conviction. Rise and lead alongside them by registering for YWLS NOW, and join us in Dallas, Texas this June!! | Learn To Lead and Educate with Faith at the 2025 Educators' Summit Join us July 10–13 for our annual Educators' Summit — Transformational Learning: Educating Minds, Hearts, and Souls. This powerful event brings together educators, administrators, and parents to explore how we can cultivate not just academic excellence, but holistic development in students. Together, we’ll dive into transformational learning that nurtures intellectual growth, emotional well-being, and spiritual depth. | As of Thursday, March 20, 2025, the President of the United States, Donald Trump, signed an to abolish the U.S. Department of Education (DOE). The order effectively triggers the process of returning public education to the states, aiming to give parents and local communities more control over their students’ safety and academic success. According to the White House , the order seeks to accomplish two goals: “The Executive Order directs the Secretary of Education to take all necessary steps to facilitate the closure of the Department of Education and return education authority to the States.” “The Order also directs that programs or activities receiving any remaining Department of Education funds will not advance DEI or gender ideology.” In response, the DOE : “Education is fundamentally a state responsibility. Instead of filtering resources through layers of federal red tape, we will empower states to take charge and advocate for and implement what is best for students, families, and educators in their communities.” The DOE assured the public that it will continue supporting K-12 school districts and special needs students in “follow[ing] the law and eliminating the bureaucracy” that may prohibit an “orderly transition.” Since its inception in 1979, the Department of Education has been a fixture in American life, and many citizens rely on government-run schools. State control should encourage parents to exercise their authority to (re)prioritize their children’s academic success and ensure their family values are conserved for future generations. | Meet the West Coast Team! West Senior Strategic Manager Connor Cornuke Connor is from Monument, Colorado, and graduated from Grand Canyon University. He has a strong passion for the church and bold, conservative beliefs. For the past two and a half years, he’s worked with TPUSA Faith and now serves as the West Region Senior Strategic Manager, overseeing the Regional Coordinator program. Outside of work, Connor enjoys golf, football, baseball, and traveling. | Coastal Regional Manager Joey Tellez Joey is a local California pastor who joined TPUSA Faith this year. Passionate about seeing lives transformed, he works to bring people to the Lord while equipping the Church to boldly engage cultural and spiritual battles. | Join our West Coast Team! Turning Point USA Faith is currently hiring Regional Coordinators to help equip churches and communities to stand for faith, family, and freedom. If you’re passionate about defending biblical values and engaging believers in civic life, apply today at tpusa.com/careers. Join us in building a stronger, more faithful America. TPUSA Faith Desert Regional Manager Employment: Full Time, Salaried, Exempt Location: Phoenix, Arizona Travel: 35%-50% Start Date: ASAP TPUSA Faith Golden State Regional Manager Employment: Full Time, Salaried, Exempt Location: Bay Area, CA Travel: 35%-50% Start Date: ASAP We also have a few part time Regional Coordinator positions available as well! | Participate In Our Monthly Challenge Monthly Challenge: This month, let's focus on deepening our faith by memorizing and reflecting on a powerful Bible verse! Verse of the Month: Luke 9:23-24 And he said to them all, “If anyone wants to follow after me, let him deny himself, take up his cross daily, and follow me. For whoever wants to save his life will lose it, but whoever loses his life because of me will save it.” Is it worth it to deny our flesh, die to self daily, and follow Christ? 1. Following Christ requires sacrifice but leads to true life — Though it is not an easy task, or our natural, fleshly tendency, we as believers in Christ are called to sacrifice for the cause of Christ. Bearing a cross meant impending death, and that one would face ridicule and disgrace along the way. Dying to self is an absolute surrender to God. The disciples counted the cost of following Christ, giving up their previous way of life to obediently and passionately pursue Him, facing all kinds of religious and civil punishments. Are you willing to count the cost and find it worthy to follow Christ even if that means giving up everything? 2. Not following Christ is easy but leads to ultimate ruin — It is certainly far easier to live according to the desires of our flesh, to fit in and be accepted by a sinful and depraved world. This is our natural tendency. However, in the end, those who try to build their lives apart from Christ on this earth will ultimately lose it. The end is destruction and emptiness. Are you willing to follow Jesus if it means losing everything? If faced with a choice, either Jesus or the comforts of this life, which will you choose? Count the cost. Is He worthy? Download the graphic below, set it as your wallpaper, and take time throughout the month to memorize and meditate on this verse. Reflect on its meaning and how it can transform your life. | Support TPUSA Faith Today! Are you ready to take on this challenge? Let's grow together! Stand with us in prayer and consider in your area! By gathering with others to pray for our nation, we can create a powerful community of believers united in seeking God’s guidance and strength. If you feel led, we ask you to consider financially supporting our mission so we can continue to spread God’s Word! | | | | | | | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

Since her swearing-in, Emily has been unstoppable: >From rallying against Elon Musk’s corruption at the Treasury to defending Medicaid on Capitol Hill.
In just a few short weeks, Emily has established herself as a hardworking, dedicated representative for working people who isn’t afraid to speak truth to power.

Emily and I made history by becoming the first LGBTQ+ people to represent our states in Congress.
But that’s not all we have in common.
We both understand what it’s like to come from working-class households, pay our own bills, and help family members navigate the healthcare system.
We both understand that Trump and Musk’s cruel cuts aren’t just numbers on a page — they have direct, damaging effects on the lives of our neighbors.

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: Democrats Announce “People’s Town Hall” Blitz During April Recess
body:
| | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=bafa764699&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | **Democrats Announce “People’s Town Hall” Blitz During April Recess to Hold GOP Accountable for Budget Scam Ripping Off Working Families**
---
| | | _After completing 71 People’s Town Halls in 35 states in the past three weeks alone, the DNC, DCCC, and ASDC continue momentum into the next recess period with expanded target districts_
In March, Democrats launched the [People’s Town Halls](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d9311bbb15&e=d6c5c7d7ec) campaign to hold Republicans accountable for running away from their constituents. In the past three weeks alone, the DNC, DCCC, and ASDC have worked alongside state parties nationwide to host **71** People’s Town Halls in **35** states. Now, as Republicans prepare to vote on a budget resolution that would threaten Social Security and Medicare, cut jobs for veterans, put health care and food assistance on the chopping block, and enable the Trump-Musk agenda as it wrecks the economy and threatens families, Democrats are teaming up over the April recess to host five new town halls to call out House Republicans in target districts who’ve refused to meet with their constituents in-person, including:
* **Arizona’s 6th Congressional District** on April 13th, represented by Republican Rep. Juan Ciscomani
* **Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District** “Good Trouble Festival” on April 22nd, represented by Republican Rep. Rob Bresnahan
* **Colorado’s 8th Congressional District** on April 24th, represented by Republican Rep. Gabe Evans
* **North Carolina’s 9th Congressional District** on April 24th represented by Republican Rep. and NRCC Chair Richard Hudson
* **Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District** on April 25th, represented by Republican Rep. Ann Wagner

Democratic elected officials attending People’s Town Halls this recess period include New Jersey Senator **Cory Booker** , Arizona Congressman**Greg Stanton** , Connecticut Senator **Chris Murphy** , Florida Congressman **Maxwell Frost** , and Texas Congressman **Greg Casar**.

Voters across the country are furious, and instead of facing their constituents, Republicans are avoiding hosting in-person town halls because NRCC Chair Richard Hudson told them to hide. If Richard Hudson won’t meet with his constituents and is advising other Republicans to do the same, Democrats will do it for him and host a People’s Town Hall in NRCC Chair Hudson’s own district this recess period.

**DNC Chair Ken Martin issued the following statement:**

“In the first three weeks holding ‘People’s Town Halls,’ we’ve already convened 71 events in 35 states. And here’s the upshot: Democrats are listening, Republicans are cowering, and folks are as fired up as I’ve ever seen. In both red and blue communities, people are sick and tired of Donald Trump and Elon Musk destroying the economy, threatening health care and Social Security, and making life worse for families. In April, we’re doubling down with leading Democratic voices joining even more town halls in key districts across the country. Republicans still want to pretend like their constituents don’t exist, but we believe Americans deserve to have their voices heard.”

**DCCC Chair Suzan DelBene issued the following statement:**

“There’s a reason voters across the House battlefield are attending the ‘People’s Town Halls’ in droves: they are sick and tired of being ignored by House Republicans who refuse to do their jobs and fail to meet with their own constituents. While vulnerable Republicans continue to run scared because they’re voting to raise costs, gut Medicaid, and threaten working families livelihoods, we’re going to make sure voters know they don’t have to wait until Election Day to hold them accountable.”

**ASDC Chair Jane Kleeb issued the following statement:**

“Our People’s Town Halls have been a rousing success and I’m so proud of all of our Democratic state parties that have answered the call and hosted events where Republicans continue to hide. We have the momentum: As we enter the April recess period, Republicans are on the back foot, losing and underperforming special elections, seeing their polling numbers drop, and pushing through an unpopular budget bill while Trump and Musk continue to tank the economy. The ASDC will continue to deliver our message straight to people across this country. We’re on offense and we’ll keep driving until we take back the House in 2026.”

In the past three weeks alone, the DNC, DCCC, and ASDC have:
* Hosted 71 People’s Town Halls across 35 states and territories.

* Hit venue capacities at nearly every town hall event.

* Seen tens of thousands of people show up to these town halls in urban, suburban, and rural districts alike.

* Consistently had more attendance than registrants at town halls.

---
| ###
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/02e66a41a71c/democrats-announce-peoples-town-hall-blitz-during-april-recess?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
DNC Community Engagement * 430 S Capitol Street, SE * Washington, DC 20003 * USA

---

name: Tim Scott
subject: Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Listen up, Friend,

Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire are three key states with OPEN Senate seats in 2026.

And midterms are usually a _bloodbath_ for the party in power. But _NOT_ this time!

**[President Trump and our Republican Senate majority are actually delivering results for the American people--unlike the last four years of the radical Left in charge.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3cldn1afdpedu1ol1gditvrf3ka4ej3gp2077q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30c3h2bs)**

Now, we're not stopping here.

We're going to expand our majority, and these Senate seats are critical to that effort.

**[If you agree with the progress Republicans have made in the last few months, will you chip in $15 or more and 3X your impact to elect Republicans in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zie88c85jdgcoqo2rs5ppfmav3sj1eaktlsj47mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30c3h2bs)**

Democrats KNOW they're in trouble. **[That 's why they're retiring in DROVES--trying to escape the fallout from their disastrous policies.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf8alb08pm3686pg69eejhi23e2l3ddk7sash4r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30c3h2bs)**

These open Senate seats in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire are _ours for the taking_ --but only if we act **[NOW.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9upbk3fvnhr9ltf8486fg22f2dmgvlls782hbmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30c3h2bs)**

And if we flip all three of these seats, the Democrats are DONE. **[It could take them YEARS to recover before they ever have a chance at the Senate again.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0gg50jvg49snet7e03e8at9krjfv8pn43f685p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30c3h2bs)**

**[PLEASE, chip in $15 or more and claim 3X your impact to elect Republicans in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire.>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zt7rr36783fck1bsgmu7d78l0khs02qb1vb1c5ko_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30c3h2bs)**

Thank you,

name: Derrick Evans, Ex-J6 Prisoner
subject: It wasn't cheap finding your name and email.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555
body:
Can I just get 2 minutes of your time?

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmrt0sf469e92m54r4bs2bnd8u8tgridd4arpmlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrrbfeigejveutlmc4cj2p0ddttogrdfuuum1u50_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
**Thank you for opening my email.**

99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means **_everything_** to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of _lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial_. In 2021, my life was flipped upside down. **I was thrown into a Biden Regime Gulag****for almost 100 days.** _Why?_ Because I _**peacefully**_ protested on January 6th – standing up for President Trump and the _74 million Americans who voted for him_. **Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bust****down my front door.** My wife and kids were terrified. **Prison was going to be my home now.**
---
[**SUPPORT MY SENATE CAMPAIGN**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z68f818pcj1pqhihhi3bm6hj4b9d1ntkah2bup68_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjcbh5ol89j7fv9jsnqn9sc8ggrj7rp6tdg6sm98_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden’s Gulag. It reminded me that I can’t give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ________________________________________
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcncmg8d56h5s8rhedfcqpd8lvngqf7j9sj1a5d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.________________________________________ **I will never take my freedom for granted again.** **That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing.** Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. **The D.C. elites have sold us out** —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. **Hard-working families are getting****CRUSHED in all 50 states.** I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. **My campaign is 100% powered by****patriots like you.** If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —**I need you in this fight with me.** **99% of Republicans will ignore this message.** **Even fewer will donate.** _Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way?_ **$10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. ** **Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump.** **THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! **
---
[**SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc6k5gb1i0aertqf3c6ggdmg7anrj8b1asm7q2no_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
[**SEND ME TO THE U.S. SENATE**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgpc0337pm9rk32ascmr5ep017mks9drjb4ki0lo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)
---
Derrick Evans
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1396f9cpidei6esod5dqpqbavs2vnlui1oqht18_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)

This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? $10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Derrick Evans Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Allred running in 2026?

body:
Colin Allred is DANGEROUS – not only for the MAGA agenda but for America. Help us mobilize our forces against him NOW.

_Friend, let 's talk about Colin Allred._

He is "seriously considering" throwing his hat in the ring for ANOTHER senate run in 2026 - this time waging competition against Texas Senator John Cornyn.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0h7pppn3ciietg60q9ptaenmeo91274v6jj0iq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)

**[In his 2024 run against Senator Ted Cruz, Allred raised over $93 million.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl0ugi8kljnn5iadt9qfethadjkb8q3su1m159mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)** He kept Democrat billionaires like George Soros in his back pocket - continuously _outpacing and outraising Ted Cruz._

**[We can't let him have another close call.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zenkccnssutk7nd8shv340hi8923eu5qr7hcohq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)** Why? Because Colin Allred is _dangerous._

In Congress, he repeatedly voted AGAINST the interests of Texas, aligning with radical Democrats who favor open border policies.

He voted AGAINST the POLICE Act, which proves he does not care about those who lay their lives on the line on a daily basis for the safety of American citizens - but rather illegal immigrants carelessly committing murder.

Allred was also IN FAVOR of ALLOWING illegal aliens to vote in U.S. elections.

If his past actions prove anything, it is this - **Colin Allred DOES NOT CARE about Americans like you, friend._[This is why we must start mobilizing our forces NOW.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdslb7j2n0n7emnt8aqr8otda1u8s1e0kj6b781g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)_**

We _MUST ensure our war chest is filled and READY_ for when he formally announces his intent to run. There's no way that Senate Republicans will stand a chance against his fundraising again - with billionaires like Soros in his corner.

Senate Republicans desperately need patriots like YOU to step up NOW. **[Will you please chip in $5 or more to help us prepare for the fight?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhd4a54vd9m2pr88c5qs9n6j7vqlalcp8datca6o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61o30cth2bs)**

We cannot allow another close call like the one we saw in 2024. clean_body: = | The SAVE Act could come up in Congress this week, and if it passes, millions of eligible Americans could be blocked from voting. This bill would require documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote. But as we’ve seen in Kansas, that kind of requirement shuts out seniors, students, and voters who simply don’t have the paperwork. Minnesota has proven we can keep elections secure without creating chaos and confusion at the ballot box. Steve and Secretaries of State from around the country are stepping up and leading with the truth. They are engaging with Congress to stop this bill from becoming law. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | **********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** Thanks, Team Simon | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. name: Tim Scott
subject: Lord have mercy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Listen up, Friend,

Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire are three key states with OPEN Senate seats in 2026.

And midterms are usually a _bloodbath_ for the party in power. But _NOT_ this time!

**[President Trump and our Republican Senate majority are actually delivering results for the American people--unlike the last four years of the radical Left in charge.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1bugih7la2g07b5fahshpojsuihvpj5nqieiuq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)**

Now, we're not stopping here.

We're going to expand our majority, and these Senate seats are critical to that effort.

**[If you agree with the progress Republicans have made in the last few months, will you chip in $15 or more and 3X your impact to elect Republicans in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7sinnslvem5db3ogk2qqjegiu5silhgnnq5l53o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)**

Democrats KNOW they're in trouble. **[That 's why they're retiring in DROVES--trying to escape the fallout from their disastrous policies.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8o1mmhe4vlru0a1umjero89p0qf45sqloh4kv4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)**

These open Senate seats in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire are _ours for the taking_ --but only if we act **[NOW.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm1neotuudnnv4ok1ahmenqsubn8vm1mr5vc2ejo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)**

And if we flip all three of these seats, the Democrats are DONE. **[It could take them YEARS to recover before they ever have a chance at the Senate again.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zn0cvtunq6bf57bi80t6b0i9rgjjhe9t54fo47bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)**

**[PLEASE, chip in $15 or more and claim 3X your impact to elect Republicans in Michigan, Minnesota, and New Hampshire.>>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmubtjr0r89jq3qj9jt5d9qr3gtbu7n191mqnl98_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)**

Thank you,
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo43dcr0k22jb99i6b2g9avsa60b19ffjk8aona0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpg61p76cdh2bs)
Tim Scott

Donald Trump continues his agenda of chaos, cruelty, and incompetence. He and his MAGA Republicans are doing whatever they want with no regard for the harm they’re causing. **BREAKING:** The SAVE Act is now on the House floor. This is an extreme, anti-voter bill that could disenfranchise millions of eligible voters — and we must hold the line against it. Peter — Imagine if you couldn't exercise your right to vote just because you don't have your original birth certificate or because you decided to change your last name when you got married.
If extremists in Congress get their wish and pass the SAVE Act, that could be the reality for _tens of millions_ of Americans.
**The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law.**
[**Rush a donation to All On The Line to help protect our democracy from these kinds of brazen attacks.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105558685/538715052/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEHouse_email_20240410-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEHouse_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240410-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEHouse_&utm_campaign=SAVEHouse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4NmZhZTQyLTE4MTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4tl4LKwn_w9vKFT95lxNDt7wt-um7AxhOPpieqFZ4BQ=)

The SAVE Act would force every voter to prove their identity with a passport or birth certificate every time they register or update their registration. That doesn’t just effectively end online and mail-in voter registration — if passed, it’d have devastating effects on who gets access to the ballot box.
Studies show that millions of Americans can’t meet the SAVE Act’s paperwork requirements to register to vote, disproportionately affecting military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, and working-class Americans.
**Let’s be clear about what this is about: making it more difficult for certain citizens to vote, all while claiming to address very-false claims of widespread voter fraud.**
**[We need all hands on deck to stop the SAVE Act. Can we count on you to make a donation to All On The Line today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105558697/538715059/-877614143?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_SAVEHouse_email_20240410-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEHouse_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240410-AOTL-Tier1-SAVEHouse_&utm_campaign=SAVEHouse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4NmZhZTQyLTE4MTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4tl4LKwn_w9vKFT95lxNDt7wt-um7AxhOPpieqFZ4BQ=)**

The All On The Line Team

clean_body: We need all hands on deck to stop this legislation from becoming law. | BREAKING: The SAVE Act is now on the House floor. This is an extreme, anti-voter bill that could disenfranchise millions of eligible voters — and we must hold the line against it. = | = Peter — Imagine if you couldn't exercise your right to vote just because you don't have your original birth certificate or because you decided to change your last name when you got married. If extremists in Congress get their wish and pass the SAVE Act, that could be the reality for tens of millions of Americans. The SAVE Act is one of the biggest threats to voting rights we’ve seen in a generation — and we must do everything we can to prevent it from becoming law. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The SAVE Act would force every voter to prove their identity with a passport or birth certificate every time they register or update their registration. That doesn’t just effectively end online and mail-in voter registration — if passed, it’d have devastating effects on who gets access to the ballot box. Studies show that millions of Americans can’t meet the SAVE Act’s paperwork requirements to register to vote, disproportionately affecting military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, and working-class Americans. Let’s be clear about what this is about: making it more difficult for certain citizens to vote, all while claiming to address very-false claims of widespread voter fraud. = We’ll keep you posted on the latest. Thank you, The All On The Line Team = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Joe Lombardo said about the Hands Off rallies. | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTT6P51EZsB7qeHgHYlwZE4YUrcMWNN3ZVpJHiAC5sY8-ljEiR6ga81vd1KfRRl02oTzE-50GLzCU8ObrdVbRPJJJTF2jXxr9dgbHGe-wtmbGUNc_-DUQPuLdItt9sZ3iWqXD9cJ7hKD-S5dK6YTLVcAX-STJXDrEZoSaOZUtARFyoZBiA_6Y6A7d8JaRNtRdothcFFsI8f-LuaL_JS6E_vYCQlau28qEm7twzqfR0HvuEQgD-iRoEi8HMzT0NmU5rE6bZ9h7lNFZnpny029efc31aB-CcQRikhW_8DTfwtP92G03mkFFGCKdUTs1uLYRNp3H9huCVFeVM9b_fFtoPhmBR5XXisYcFBkbFMyLpLSYwwFUIgeDxG95z9GcuICG8/4fj/0CHpE7MjTgWK9i7WKj6MwA/h0/h001.DgdO5cx7UnkV3hwF7njlAVRcp0gOHjwWW4M36x8pcAU)

Hey friend,
First: Over 1,400 “Hands Off!” protests took place on Saturday demanding Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their Republican cronies keep their “hands off” of Social Security, Medicaid, and more.
Then: The protests were reported as the largest day of public demonstration of Trump’s second term with millions in attendance.
**Now: New leaked audio of Governor Joe Lombardo shows how he really feels about his constituents. Lombardo was caught on tape saying that the Hands Off protestors “don’t feel like working” and are asking for handouts.**
“In my opinion, the theme of the Democratic Party is ‘hands out.’ What can you do to give away taxpayers’ money to the benefit [of] the people who don’t feel like working. It’s interesting that those individuals are standing out there and if you had the opportunity or the displeasure of driving by the protest there’s probably 10,000 different signs.... the simple message was ‘What do you mean you want me to get back to work?’” | [Hear the clip](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT5budD9gSc53AWNwjNFbM24EkNcbLoi0lmuRDCdxjSyWLNHQ_k2EevfaVsfyjgwK5105izRvoiuqIjy9nDQI5-1nSNimfSa2jtzwwt4jHEB-JEsDbIt5-ww8bI8ZAtiaInrSwcTwZGaOJhUr8-4TBNcWpnifFu15gduWEBf5rqGg3JCHt1B03qJhR4jEJlWz2mwL-PBq6OMSnTlYyijMIT9eke6o6fyIPuyi5DD6vog4fNX8nYuqYC9WW35Noe3CgedrP5OF20zulWuxc65hvwIpHoHg3XrP8Lbnpth_4yPXqY1cyDWOft0mV7zwL4pGkR7BY-xYRyWHslzRMKwQvf6yBhxvLZTe6Jyzr8KQNQu-sSxl9G9m6Ilzky9U_ZpH5/4fj/0CHpE7MjTgWK9i7WKj6MwA/h1/h001.dFRir4-d-1GblJSd3P4nyHL5YrV481R4wtPGCVJjgCs)
---
Meanwhile, Nevada is #1 in the country in unemployment with rates _higher_ now than before Lombardo took office. Under Lombardo, unemployment and food insecurity continue to rise while the cost of housing and health care become more expensive.
Lombardo has consistently blocked efforts to lower costs for Nevadans – including vetoing legislation that would have lowered housing and prescription drugs costs and guaranteed school meals for every student.
Republicans are ransacking essential services and public goods to hand out tax cuts to billionaires like Elon Musk and his friends. Americans are rightfully calling them out for it and Lombardo mocks us for demanding more from our government.
[_**Lombardo’s disdain for struggling Nevadans is evident in the newly leaked audio. Chip in $10 or any amount to NV Dems and together we’ll hand Lombardo a pink slip and elect real leaders who fight for working families.**_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yT5budD9gSc53AWNwjNFbM24EkNcbLoi0lmuRDCdxjSyWLNHQ_k2EevfaVsfyjgwK5105izRvoiuqIjy9nDQI5-65elASElb79qpMHviaF_nstpC0PnR9SO4pyFxE_f5XehXiRtiAAJE_6ultbBLzZjp3oJM6_EJwZbemggkYEUuRoN5MqFQnMKzwinktw7Y4QSfp--6ZYbVxyVNtvevLxVHP7Zghwemgd1jZuTcltIhGmk1VTtoapS1fTHU14LZ7BY10elUxsag5I9mnpyvm_x5oeih_VxqQDIFmDj2sqgEmvfXcB4ZvSLqlI9vrY_xRlevXRLupJ2Jb2BNYTx6XJWzz0uV_d7d1FpIAANERfrsuCvJyPmTm3U6EJbvLacZMX/4fj/0CHpE7MjTgWK9i7WKj6MwA/h2/h001.QpLULs5a_iFokvm1lY75LtFR4CejGqsWulKeAqozgws)

clean_body: You won’t believe what Gov. Joe Lombardo said about the Hands Off rallies. | | | | Hey friend, First: Over 1,400 “Hands Off!” protests took place on Saturday demanding Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their Republican cronies keep their “hands off” of Social Security, Medicaid, and more. Then: The protests were reported as the largest day of public demonstration of Trump’s second term with millions in attendance. Now: New leaked audio of Governor Joe Lombardo shows how he really feels about his constituents. Lombardo was caught on tape saying that the Hands Off protestors “don’t feel like working” and are asking for handouts. “In my opinion, the theme of the Democratic Party is ‘hands out.’ What can you do to give away taxpayers’ money to the benefit [of] the people who don’t feel like working. It’s interesting that those individuals are standing out there and if you had the opportunity or the displeasure of driving by the protest there’s probably 10,000 different signs.... the simple message was ‘What do you mean you want me to get back to work?’” | Meanwhile, Nevada is #1 in the country in unemployment with rates higher now than before Lombardo took office. Under Lombardo, unemployment and food insecurity continue to rise while the cost of housing and health care become more expensive. Lombardo has consistently blocked efforts to lower costs for Nevadans – including vetoing legislation that would have lowered housing and prescription drugs costs and guaranteed school meals for every student. Republicans are ransacking essential services and public goods to hand out tax cuts to billionaires like Elon Musk and his friends. Americans are rightfully calling them out for it and Lombardo mocks us for demanding more from our government. name: Ryan Zinke
subject: Closing the curtains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Closing the curtains on my campaign.

|
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znrqemb5p70gtntfosndagr38vdi4pl1ql6i42tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpi60pr1c1h2bs)
---

**Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has _**already**_ pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zagnk5rpcq2sq9hn8puoanm3lmr536uspf3aipfo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpi60pr1c1h2bs "Friend,this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7dqvg1971uecn85dk55nm276sfuu7dgbg31jc38_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpi60pr1c1h2bs "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4qlg61rnh2ev4d62k75rttlofuusjmp8iuo0bj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpi60pr1c1h2bs)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, I'll always serve you proudly.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

Patriot,
---
The other night I sat down to put my thoughts to paper.
---
I didn’t want to fill your email with a lengthy message, so I’ve scanned my letter to a secure page for you to read.
---
**_What I’m about to say will SHOCK you to your core, but I need you to hear it all the same..._**
---
_**BRACE YOURSELF and then please read the letter I wrote for you in full:**_

name: Brad Finstad
subject: The Left is Making a Play for Red Districts Like Ours
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-tECGIy40AggmLw_-N-yUaowmJWuz5zWmo74s-GXkFWuj-WQRhqDguXmlwk)

| Dear Friend,
---
House Democrats are feeling bold and it’s showing.
After overperforming in two red Florida districts, the DCCC is now launching a coast-to-coast offensive, aggressively recruiting candidates and pouring money into traditionally Republican strongholds.
They’re not just defending their own seats anymore; they’re coming after ours.
Governor Tim Walz rallied the Left in our district, national Democrats are smashing fundraising records, and the Democrats' House Majority PAC has officially targeted this seat.
We must be prepared to hold our ground. **[So please make a contribution to help us stand strong for our values and protect this district from a Democrat takeover.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-tECGIy40AggmLw_-N-yUaowmJWuz5zWmo74s-GXkFWuj-WQRhqDguXmlwk)****[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-tECGIy40Aggmbw_Je82rzJ7AQTUOTQmS5G7ucPgWPuEd_4o-GXQxlOAXSE)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ-tECGIy40Aggmbw_Je82rzJ7AQTUOTQmS5G7ucPgWPuEd_4o-GXQxlOAXSE)

**“Do not hide your faith and your beliefs. Especially in this world that seems to have gone mad with political correctness.”**
**“I admit to being unapologetically Catholic and unapologetically patriotic.”**
\- Justice Clarence Thomas.\-------------------------Thank you for reading Justice Thomas’ message.
**The sad truth is, even with President Trump in office, the far-left is still waging war against America and against religion.**
And without America-First men of faith like Clarence Thomas to defend us, they’re sure to win.
As you’re reading this message, the Democrats are calling for the impeachment of Justice Clarence Thomas.
**Their petition to have him removed from the Supreme Court bench has nearly 1.4 MILLION SIGNATURES.**
If Justice Thomas goes, then there will be nothing stopping the Democrats from going after the America-First Agenda, our religious freedom, and President Trump.
That’s why it’s so important **_right here_ , _right now_ ,** to sign our counter petition and stand with Clarence Thomas.
[2,000,000 million signatures are needed by midnight to support his seat on the Supreme Court.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z7lg3gee0i8nd9i1gadimfpi0ian9p76vq5md2i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1cpi68or6c5h2bs)

The sad truth is, even with President Trump in office, the far-left is still waging war against America and against religion. And without America-First men of faith like Clarence Thomas to defend us, they’re sure to win. As you’re reading this message, the Democrats are calling for the impeachment of Justice Clarence Thomas. Their petition to have him removed from the Supreme Court bench has nearly 1.4 MILLION SIGNATURES. If Justice Thomas goes, then there will be nothing stopping the Democrats from going after the America-First Agenda, our religious freedom, and President Trump. That’s why it’s so important right here , right now , to sign our counter petition and stand with Clarence Thomas. Please - it only takes a second to add your name. Hey there, Meet the Tomahawk that’s a cut above the rest - a tool that perfectly merges rugged durability, slick design, and multi-purpose functionality. Please, allow us to introduce [the Steel River Tomahawk. ](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21017/6374453/9aa006116a80b614e58ad994c58cf46352517993/27d1d6013c51b471be77b4ac5abd8b2e6986d0b9) But be warned, this isn't your run-of-the-mill tool - it's a workhorse wrapped in sleek sophistication, ready to accompany you on your most exciting adventures. Crafted from top-notch forged steel, this tomahawk isn't just built to last; it's built to conquer. Its 3.5” blade provides precision cutting, chopping, and hacking capabilities. It's finished with a sexy black coating, giving it a distinct, stealthy appeal. No more unnecessary exertion - whether you're felling small trees or splitting firewood, [the Steel River Tomahawk](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21017/6374453/9aa006116a80b614e58ad994c58cf46352517993/27d1d6013c51b471be77b4ac5abd8b2e6986d0b9) is designed to work with you, not against you. And that's not all. The handle of our tomahawk is wrapped in **military-grade paracord**. You never know when you might need some sturdy cordage in the wild. Want to see it for yourself? [Click here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21017/6374453/9aa006116a80b614e58ad994c58cf46352517993/27d1d6013c51b471be77b4ac5abd8b2e6986d0b9) to get a closer look. But be quick - a tool this extraordinary won't stay in stock for long! Adventure awaits, and the Steel River Tomahawk is ready to take you there.
