Hi, this is Melissa Evans. That’s me and my husband, Derrick, at home with our four kids. If you donated to Derrick’s campaign recently, _**_thank you_**_ _**_._**_ Your support means the world to him. **The politicians in Washington D.C. hate him.** _They treat him like he's redneck trash_.
---
[**DONATE TO MY HUSBAND’S SENATE CAMPAIGN**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/A76P388bMZuA7q1BccVEPP-MRz0IZFuOLLIvR32bdSiaYj4o8LQKZG2h6WTJ2Uo-WZ122gH-L-1d-Bw8fCMHopOwhhJIIRixq2WEUT7jKRZMdGdtCq2fIZvQAuf_G77lw3bQkc2ZcTCjAMr2-evL8isybXnZMVSR-yzNHxYVZKpIG3LMi_6XfcI5UvAWT6mVZB8LsE5fFUPQ76lXkoBL0zKzuSeVwgxuFr9XdSb98HU54OLCOp122_k8tBwkupSabSQO-C6DfLE-UgV4HWIbCipxMqf719V9S13WUO8azl-k3N9bDqZV3Yq63Gzx1KF8zmdpEj4NKJ7Kb-oEKrB0CIy9kpITjzetQ4FZo88b76q0jP0v8TMM1s2bj_SgUMo-wvTzcKVxzf1kvr-s_zcndx-pJECuTuBcADtuZk4eBqnnFvFErtPnWN0KYaSIiYyYrSlwgnxZatzRlKOCIZ52hiq1NW1UmQbkc7NqKkSTNhBt-ZjOJLyWl4OcQkpuYe9s/ZQtC8QLTpIXgot5INtdrzi-9Av4oV-r1/7)
---
You see, many people __**THINK**__ they know Derrick’s story based on the headlines and newspapers. _“January 6th Insurrectionist.”_ _“Redneck from West Virginia.”_ The media is going to say what it wants. But I know the real Derrick, and _I want you to know him too_. Derrick was my college sweetheart. He was one of the few **pro-life conservatives** I met on campus—passionate, kind, and full of conviction.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/fHYkaj1kWWKKHc7haUvE4bNmcQySM0JMpjDwX_uV16kSJ4nAfGZNxoz9i-ryJLNSMuEwU82i_TOfM_JDcCNFNVbekWxfyHkUnG7O-K_S3IwV0hGRei2eGu3MD5OzG44y6JlBip5_L_kvS1dxEKHlEBI_ugkkObGwWbGmimkj77bW_exswwwHStK0Wq2xRnRfSdO2UU1OZ7Z-uhP4bSyYQfVty6aCfJiG0BT2WnOBYwucD-nmYgjU1QyMT2T8QXdlluX0b3PHIWwx7VT-r60hf4cw2PeqybhGmSrFrxLb9OGnedNO6cZUm_riOs2QusHaeP6zlPiF-B5j2w0hlObvQ9wZQXLCmloSpiBxw-bSvsa0VFD7HAFmDUd6kvBGoePmUI8qFGWCmURq06pU7m1d3PdT1bgNfyQFjMocDfDlfAGl-lLfJxipufgTjR2_aXeP_o9be30KX5dUZ9Xtly9G6eFnfP9nuUurLEIPf2GaXrHBCDTYaofTwWaKKYbNCvYm/FKS-CFaZbKC54eqwVrmghOpR7sZ0OSzY/7)
---
When we got married, we lived a normal American life. We had kids running around. Derrick was working on homes, helping out at the family ranch, even volunteering at rehab facilities across West Virginia – __a state ripped apart by opioids and alcoholism__. On top of running for local office, he also helped coached D1 football. Beyond the wins and losses, he wanted to teach young men how to __be good fathers, American__ ____patriots, and strong leaders__. But that all changed in a blink of an eye. **The life Derrick created for our family was** **FLIPPED UPSIDE DOWN OVERNIGHT.** **A SWAT team of Biden's FBI agents****busted down our front door. ** The kids were screaming. Derrick had his hands up. **I was CONFUSED, living in a NIGHTMARE.** Then I remembered – _Derrick went to Washington DC on January 6th to PEACEFULLY contest a stolen election_. _That’s what this was all about_. The Biden Regime labeled him an “insurrectionist” and that was it. **My husband was going to prison.** We tried to fight back. We argued entrapment. We argued violation of free speech. Nothing worked. The courts REFUSED to hear it. **Derrick’s fate was SEALED. ** He would be spending his nights in a cold, dark prison cell. I would be laying in bed alone wondering how I'm going to take care of four kids by myself. Months later, when Derrick was released on good behavior, _the man I saw come home was different_. He always had an interest in politics, _but going to prison this lit a fire inside of him I had never seen before_.
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/876alCLQngeMPq3J6wYe6heWsNNysycoN2Q1Ic0cEWu4iR-2uQ2BrZQNNG-ev-t0TgW6KW1POTJ0lWKhgz7ayyXErBd7ojlVJqvmYq56yLDr_vCWCSCDBNOSsu4vAVftSt7hw3W24LWUWgYWktZ07589cStCBCYqsyELHqz0fybQu8ufYMSiCvnNVyUGDGDU_RpMbHyxz16gmVJ0QoBnTwylAnMJH_vuI1Rgj2sIVcGT0nzA5zxs1ubgiWTJUStLPliK3GpDG400xm320kmD_LMexrkid6qD1TpPc3eMEp2Nz2vPj1iWS3CW2ueYmY7RSzqJ-xdpmF5C6PHdGXgIZcP0HdBhysQmBh4f6kOY8hYQazldO8Az2ob_TzRnOCPOfONlFbKZgXZrz0oAb-r8gyMaJgDYbDBe8d7dPXWmd7Vlh2d6dyJKpq2WkTd5HdL6kA61J64xg7oBwqdVF_8HNsWO4xGyJYphnW2UcnoWYyQm84dYIYc3CDUbD0pGVSWL/GbMBMBRnysqFj2q14EuDR2t9RzsVlN4U/7)
---
So when Derrick found out he was PARDONED by President Trump, and was now eligible to run for U.S. Senate, _that’s immediately what he decided to do_. **I support him 100%. ** _Do you?_
---
[**DONATE TO MY HUSBAND'S CAMPAIGN**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/wlhMo7XQdIti3jNqL-UadJJlG0t8ZROuTpzHrstGm59eca_OmnLAXeSSgJ3OxTxIfVI2vQ6dc__Kd70w-9gnVpf1QxQjl50-kB09a38XRisZyZqZ5JZ9tH6pDLsEWDQuJztHQzbStLGlHqgRIHGOxZFR04XzJA3ctKquKlJ8_h3uPhxIBWJeMPpfdtuPMki2K7UA4_sKQt8eAjbjLEvPKxNzA1boGXth4Qpo6GWoR7w6o5M1a4vv1uA0YQzgY3WdiFXrLhneJyOCOX7iEtVTUuJsLMDcVHJFWLZXIaZCNMRWkkWRQt1uaqzp1Mpf5UMLS16hPWxc78ScSDbis5TYGz-QbKlnj_HCjeZ_2h0aanIRdJ6sY-A2MYCWr2dHy8nGx3Gjpnhl2CX9SE38vvrrfm84RJ2QFSpI2O18_HGwtzfxWCiDC1ql1fN42qn26BOMzzxVlQdU4KWdZCqrn2irupY0D3SxsCMadMmPlOo28ubCFVbSABWGecRZYd8uZ0zI/iMHR-xH9Vf7lA5bHnmwLu9U6yHFqxhca/7)
---
This isn’t about “revenge” for Derrick. This is about justice. Justice for the **HUNDREDS** of Americans who were entrapped and imprisoned on Jan 6th. Justice for young girls like Laken Riley who were **MURDERED** by Joe Biden’s illegal aliens. Justice for our police officers, first responders, and military heroes who were **FIRED** over vaccine mandates. Justice for our coal miners and blue collar workers – right here in states like West Virginia – who’ve seen their livelihoods **SHIPPED** overseas. Now, I don’t know a whole lot about politics, but I know this: **Derrick’s running for Senate to look out for America's future – to look out for the people who have been IGNORED by the politicians for too long. ****He calls it the “Swamp”. ** Bottom line: _he needs your help to WIN_.
---
[**HELP MY HUSBAND WIN HIS CAMPAIGN**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/k2aLJW0JQymYHVXOpue-_2MMlu4J2FNnap5VDCSuhlKUHRATME7jeardnzkk1GenTDKMQfSIXWLd05B-wkmMfC-2bh5GKLjAD5LdxmJtH4c6Nyp6vNSMTrkpg7mJ-QPJNpqHqnmxKNeAjah1BuUkiz--xwUI8B6evlGjiXdw0pCL_jr8dnveqvgewGe8IjKj8OJDBOKbpUbND3K1chN095P1PaJ4zxu8xO6RMpPGxiDw2IVLkO1egUAmqwDB4jFoqDrGotCSrANxJMUVVb0yuqqGc06pDEIDszq-u_rBnmqGs31nw3inikwY6SzjRwrf8PxAEb6fsCRsKyWamOR7d81WDuDgutvvQQnVClVjgo9tp4H378Tz_grO8MayOHTpkGflQgZnDGIOnxON285ub9-jg1Khl2uNcjoKCJXrdD8VK7vzSCN9Obal2c-Rlm80GdF_Kg8pO5Ca/UBs_E2WnTQUZk5PTtdgCkop0lm8ANbXG/7)
---

clean_body: | | | Hi, this is Melissa Evans. That’s me and my husband, Derrick, at home with our four kids. If you donated to Derrick’s campaign recently, thank you . Your support means the world to him. The politicians in Washington D.C. hate him. They treat him like he's redneck trash. You see, many people THINK they know Derrick’s story based on the headlines and newspapers. “January 6th Insurrectionist.” “Redneck from West Virginia.” The media is going to say what it wants. But I know the real Derrick, and I want you to know him too. Derrick was my college sweetheart. He was one of the few pro-life conservatives I met on campus—passionate, kind, and full of conviction. When we got married, we lived a normal American life. We had kids running around. Derrick was working on homes, helping out at the family ranch, even volunteering at rehab facilities across West Virginia – a state ripped apart by opioids and alcoholism. On top of running for local office, he also helped coached D1 football. Beyond the wins and losses, he wanted to teach young men how to be good fathers, American patriots, and strong leaders. But that all changed in a blink of an eye. The life Derrick created for our family was FLIPPED UPSIDE DOWN OVERNIGHT. A SWAT team of Biden's FBI agentsbusted down our front door. The kids were screaming. Derrick had his hands up. I was CONFUSED, living in a NIGHTMARE. Then I remembered – Derrick went to Washington DC on January 6th to PEACEFULLY contest a stolen election. That’s what this was all about. The Biden Regime labeled him an “insurrectionist” and that was it. My husband was going to prison. We tried to fight back. We argued entrapment. We argued violation of free speech. Nothing worked. The courts REFUSED to hear it. Derrick’s fate was SEALED. He would be spending his nights in a cold, dark prison cell. I would be laying in bed alone wondering how I'm going to take care of four kids by myself. Months later, when Derrick was released on good behavior, the man I saw come home was different. He always had an interest in politics, but going to prison this lit a fire inside of him I had never seen before. So when Derrick found out he was PARDONED by President Trump, and was now eligible to run for U.S. Senate, that’s immediately what he decided to do. I support him 100%. Do you? This isn’t about “revenge” for Derrick. This is about justice. Justice for the HUNDREDS of Americans who were entrapped and imprisoned on Jan 6th. Justice for young girls like Laken Riley who were MURDERED by Joe Biden’s illegal aliens. Justice for our police officers, first responders, and military heroes who were FIRED over vaccine mandates. Justice for our coal miners and blue collar workers – right here in states like West Virginia – who’ve seen their livelihoods SHIPPED overseas. Now, I don’t know a whole lot about politics, but I know this: Derrick’s running for Senate to look out for America's future – to look out for the people who have been IGNORED by the politicians for too long. He calls it the “Swamp”. Bottom line: he needs your help to WIN. Washington thinks Derrick is some low IQ redneck who belongs in jail. Even the Republicans. Fine, let them think that. Because while they sip martinis and discuss billion-dollar deals with megadonors, Derrick is out in the field talking to the people who matter most:Americans like YOU. Your support would mean so much to him. I keep telling him he’s doing a great job, but nothing makes his day more than seeing. Every dollar you donate helps him: → Hire additional staff to knock on doors (if only for a few hours). → Get on TV and radio and tell his story (WITHOUT the fake news media spin). → Send out campaign mail, brochures, yard signs, T-shirts (you name it)! ** All of these things are CRITICAL for running a successful ground campaign – and . Will you help my husband win his Senate campaign by rushing over $25 or more? Sincerely, Melissa Evans Wife of Derrick Evans P.S Derrick was just telling me how much his supporters mean to him – that’s why I decided to write you this email to __. ** P.P.S. Despite all of the hard times Derrick went through as one of Biden’s political prisoners, he still has his sense of humor. Look at what he wanted us to be for Halloween! | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | |

But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/ff323a65-2cae-4218-96dd-e6927c694e97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**➡ ️[Read this entire thread on X](https://substack.com/redirect/4372e3f0-a1be-422e-a345-9e81d19967b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I need to correct myself a bit (kinda, ish)...
Henry Lito Lazo-Sanchez, the Twin Falls dairy worker who killed an Idahoan, wasn't an "illegal alien" per se, as I first stated [here](https://substack.com/redirect/2a93cb67-6656-4b2b-b062-b067f86368d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

_But he IS/WAS a criminal foreign national._
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b2389a4e-723f-4f76-9ea6-7b676d231207?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Looks like he was here on some kind of visa (BTW, most illegal aliens are here because they overstay their legally obtained visas. They come here on a legal visa and never go home when they are supposed to (hence, illegal).

But let's be clear: this foreign national criminal exposes how broken Idaho's laws are, letting outsiders exploit our system while Idahoans pay the price.

Dairy farmers have been screaming for years that they can't use H-2A visas because dairy work isn't seasonal, because cows need milking every single day.

**So what visa was this guy on?**
* Was it an H-1B, which is meant for high-skill jobs, not ag labor (this would be absurd for a dairy worker)?
* Or was he an H-2A worker for some seasonal gig, moonlighting at a dairy off the books, breaking the law while he was at it?

_We need answers._
Even worse, this foreign national had an Idaho driver's license?
Currently, visa holders can stroll into the DMV with an I-94 and passport, and Idaho hands them a license to drive on our roads with no real vetting, and no accountability.
The system's a total disaster: the DMV relies on a federal database to verify status, but it's riddled with delays and errors, meaning licenses often outlast expired visas or slip through the cracks entirely. This criminal exploited that gaping hole, got behind the wheel, killed an Idahoan, and fled the scene--leaving us to clean up the mess while our laws enable the next tragedy.
Idaho's basically rolling out the red carpet for foreign nationals to endanger our communities with zero consequences.
## **"What if he** _**WAS**_**here on an H-2A!!??!"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/80dc5c87-1921-4494-8a25-6bc59d13926b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The H-2A visa, administered by the U.S. Department of Labor and USCIS, allows U.S. employers to bring foreign workers to the U.S. for temporary agricultural jobs.
BUT...
The job must be tied to a specific season or a temporary need, like planting or harvesting crops (e.g., a 10-month harvest cycle). The DOL defines "temporary" as generally less than one year, and the work must have a clear start and end date tied to seasonal demand.
_**Dairy work doesn 't qualify for H-2A...**_
Dairy farming involves continuous, year-round tasks--cows need milking daily, 365 days a year. This doesn't fit the H-2A's definition of "seasonal" or "temporary," and the DOL has consistently ruled that dairy jobs are permanent in nature, making them ineligible for H-2A certification.
[As we've heard incessantly](https://substack.com/redirect/96ea9e97-f848-44e8-9ba1-8d7af054dca1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the Idaho Dairymen's Association has noted that dairy farmers are "prohibited from using the H-2A program" for this reason, as Rick Naerebout stated all over the place tons of times.
## **"Can't an H-2A Worker Moonlight on a Dairy? "**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ad9651a2-5210-4ce3-a753-7e60462e5031?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Not legally.
An H-2A worker cannot legally work on a dairy farm while in the U.S. on that visa, even as a side job or "moonlighting"
Again, H-2A workers are bound to the specific employer and job listed on their visa petition (Form I-129 and the DOL's temporary labor certification). They can only work for the employer who sponsored them and only for the approved seasonal job (e.g., harvesting potatoes).
Working at a dairy farm outside of that would violate their visa terms, making it illegal.
Hence, if an H-2A worker were found working on a dairy farm, they'd be out of status, risking deportation. The employer (the dairy farm) could also face penalties for hiring unauthorized workers, including fines or criminal charges under immigration law (8 U.S.C. § 1324a).
In the case of Henry Lito Lazo-Sanchez, _it 's possible_ he was an H-2A worker for a seasonal job (e.g., at a potato farm) and working off the books at a dairy farm.
But the ICE post and other stories don't specify his visa type, so as of now, I can't confirm if he was on an H-2A.
_**If he was, working at a dairy would have been illegal under his visa terms.**_
And we KNOW (because they admit it publicly) that dairy farms hire illegal aliens or those overstaying visas because there's no legal visa option for year-round work. My guess is Lazo-Sanchez could have been on an H-2A for another job, overstayed or violated its terms, and taken up dairy work illegally.
Or he might have been on a different visa (e.g., an EB-3 for unskilled labor, though rare in agriculture due to long processing times).
## **" Maybe he was here on a green card?"**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1faf8c74-814f-4987-846d-6f70f01c9096?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's been established, H-2A is for temp jobs, so if he was on one, he was breaking the law working at a dairy.
H-1B is SUPPOSED to be for tech geeks, not ag workers, makes zero sense.
So I then thought...
_**MAYBE he had a green card?**_
That would let him work on a dairy, no problem--it gives holders full work rights, no restrictions. But if he had one, ICE probably wouldn't have grabbed him.
Vehicular manslaughter and fleeing the scene can strip your green card if it's an aggravated felony, but ICE didn't mention that, so I'm betting he was on a visa he overstayed or broke. If he had a green card, he'd have gotten a license easily, but that'd be void if his status was revoked.
Point is, our laws are a joke--foreign nationals and illegal aliens exploit them while Idahoans pay the price.
## **Back to H-2A...**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/188fff63-c904-45f8-a1c3-43e082c67cce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There are no direct exceptions that allow H-2A workers to work on dairies.
But there are rare scenarios where dairy-related work might qualify: If a dairy farm has a specific, temporary task like a 3-month busy season (e.g., calving season requiring extra hands) they might apply for H-2A workers for that task. But this is uncommon and must be clearly temporary, not tied to ongoing milking operations.
The DOL also made exceptions for sheep and goat herders under H-2A, as their work can be tied to seasonal grazing patterns (but this doesn't apply to traditional cow dairies, which dominate Idaho's industry).
## **Lenney 's Final Thoughts**
An H-2A visa worker cannot legally work on a dairy farm at any time unless the job is a rare, temporary task explicitly approved by the DOL--and even then, it's not for core dairy operations like milking.
If Lazo-Sanchez _**was here**_ on an H-2A, his dairy work would have been illegal, highlighting the broader issue of visa misuse and enforcement gaps in Idaho's ag sector.
> Point being: criminal foreign nationals, "illegal aliens," and those who hire and protect them are usurping Idaho's laws, taking advantage of weak enforcement while our people suffer.
1. **Where 's the mandatory E-Verify to stop this? **
2. **Where 's the mandatory 287g program to let local law enforcement partner with ICE to deport criminals like this? **
3. **Why aren 't we making it a specific state crime to transport and harbor illegals? **

Idahoans deserve better.
We need to close these loopholes now, before more foreign nationals and illegal aliens destroy our communities.
I'll keep digging.

**PREVIOUS EMAIL FROM BECCA BALINT:** Peter, I don’t have to tell you the urgency of this moment. It calls for fresh, bold, courageous leadership. **That’s why I’m so proud to fight alongside my new colleague in Congress, Emily Randall.** Since her swearing-in, Emily has been unstoppable: From rallying against Elon Musk’s corruption at the Treasury to defending Medicaid on Capitol Hill. In just a few short months, Emily has established herself as a hardworking, dedicated representative for working people who isn’t afraid to speak truth to power. [_**If you agree that we need more leaders like Emily fighting Trump, please split a donation between our campaigns today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105582037/538750974/-795924919?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.10_Balint2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzZiMDkwYi0yOTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q-Wks5IvId02psyjDZaOCSFyNuXXYAWYYyJKZ8sm41k=) Emily and I made history by becoming the first LGBTQ+ people to represent our states in Congress. But that’s not all we have in common. We both understand what it’s like to come from working-class households, pay our own bills, and help family members navigate the healthcare system. We both understand that Trump and Musk’s cruel cuts aren’t just numbers on a page — they have direct, damaging effects on the lives of our neighbors. And we both understand that we have a duty to fight like hell for the people who elected us, not for billionaires and big corporations. [_**Together, we’re working on two fronts: Blocking the worst of the Trump-Musk agenda and organizing early to elect more bold Democrats to Congress. | | President Trump is escalating his costly trade war this month. **To make matters worse, it is a trade war he's having**** _against_** **_himself_****— but we are paying for it.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105585311/538754648/1596212816?refcode=2025-04-10-tariff&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d41d6f47-2b16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDFkNmY0Ny0yYjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zAVRdTlBSmOajHEqlu6tBJdyeU-gn74qPDQMWhjB2nY=)****In Washington state, where our economy is tied so closely with the Canadian economy, we will feel that pinch. If fully implemented, these tariffs will result in $2.7 billion in taxes on Washington State importers.** That cost will be passed onto you in the form of higher prices for essentials like energy, groceries, gas, and transportation. Not to mention that Canadians who visit retailers in our district are now boycotting American stores. While having an easier time in the Bellingham Trader Joe's parking lot _might_ be novel for the first few trips, the impact of losing our Canadian neighbors' participation in our local economy certainly is not worth it. It is not just Canadian imports; taxes on Mexican imports and other nations are going to be passed onto you. This coming from a president that campaigned on fighting inflation and reducing costs from day one? Absurd. He has failed each and every day since taking office. I know that Washington State deserves better. I will continue working in Congress to combat these tariffs and similar policies that drive up costs for everyday Americans. This is simply unsustainable. More soon, _Rick_ __ | _Express Donate:_ _If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:_

clean_body: Bellingham Trader Joe’s looking a little emptier than usual? | | | | President Trump is escalating his costly trade war this month. To make matters worse, it is a trade war he's having against himself— but we are paying for it. Washington state, where our economy is tied so closely with the Canadian economy, we will feel that pinch. If fully implemented, these tariffs will result in $2.7 billion in taxes on Washington State importers. That cost will be passed onto you in the form of higher prices for essentials like energy, groceries, gas, and transportation. Not to mention that Canadians who visit retailers in our district are now boycotting American stores. While having an easier time in the Bellingham Trader Joe's parking lot might be novel for the first few trips, the impact of losing our Canadian neighbors' participation in our local economy certainly is not worth it. It is not just Canadian imports; taxes on Mexican imports and other nations are going to be passed onto you. This coming from a president that campaigned on fighting inflation and reducing costs from day one? Absurd. He has failed each and every day since taking office. I know that Washington State deserves better. I will continue working in Congress to combat these tariffs and similar policies that drive up costs for everyday Americans. This is simply unsustainable. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | =_ ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: John Fetterman
subject: contraceptives shouldn’t be controversial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10030%2E434096%2EVQ9RwJ)
| | |
---
Derek, John here with an important update I need yinz to read.
The Trump administration is cutting millions in funding from Planned Parenthood. This could put lives at stake.
**Call me crazy, but a woman’s right to choose is sacred.**
But the GOP wants to cut off access to all kinds of health services and make criminals out of women.
We gotta stop this sh*t right now. That’s why I just introduced a commonsense bill to expand access to birth control. **[But we need to show that voters support women making their own health care decisions, so if you believe that everyone should have access to birth control, will you please sign on to my petition today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50988?code=jtk41-su-fl-v1&email=&zip=&t=2&akid=10030%2E434096%2EVQ9RwJ)**
| | [SIGN NOW >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50989?code=jtk41-su-fl-v1&%3Bemail=&%3Bzip=&t=3&akid=10030%2E434096%2EVQ9RwJ)
---
Republicans have been hell-bent on rolling back reproductive freedom since the ink was barely dry on the decision to overturn Roe v. Wade.
But I said from the beginning that I will always fight to protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. 💯
**So my new bill will simply allow folks to pick up their full birth control prescriptions at once – because getting birth control should be easy and convenient!! _And the government should NOT stand in your way._**
**[Will you support better access to birth control by adding your name to my petition now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50988?code=jtk41-su-fl-v1&email=&zip=&t=4&akid=10030%2E434096%2EVQ9RwJ)**
Thanks, Derek.

John ❤️
| |

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi Freedom Awards – First two winners announced!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msfreedomawards-12848623?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Dear Friend, **The Mississippi Center for Public Policy (MCPP) recognizes lawmakers who have helped advance the cause of liberty during the 2025 legislative session.

Rep. Owen’s Bold Stand for Education Reform**
---
|
---
_Rep Jansen Owen presented with the Mississippi Freedom Award_
| **Representative Owen showed true heroism in his push to improve education across Mississippi.** He championed HB 1435, a bill that would have introduced public-to-public school choice—an option already available in every neighboring state. With strong support, HB 1435 sailed through the House, passing with a clear majority. If the Senate had followed suit, Mississippi families would now enjoy the same educational opportunities as those in surrounding states. **We salute Rep. Owen for his leadership and unwavering commitment to this cause!**

**Rep. Hank Zuber – A Champion for Red Tape Reduction**
---
|
---
_Rep Hank Zuber III presented with the Mississippi Freedom Award_
| **Representative Hank Zuber III stands out as a dedicated conservative, tirelessly working to dismantle the red tape that hampers Mississippi’s healthcare economy.** Over the past few years, he has delved deep into the effects of restrictive Certificate of Need laws, proposing how to reform the system. If Rep. Zuber’s vision had prevailed, our state would be on track for a stronger, more accessible healthcare system. **Hank is a true freedom fighter, and we’re proud to recognize his heroic efforts!**

Watch out for more announcements over the coming days!

**The forces in favor of pro-growth policies are winning! The forces of the status quo are in retreat!**
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0448bddade&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=1bb29fd49d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=1bb29fd49d).

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: Help me keep Jared working for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
I have always been able to count on Jared as a steadfast ally | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=49ac1d103b&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5d0cf787c0a3/help-me-keep-jared-working-for-us?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=bcf4b41c10&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friends,

As a member of the King County Council, I've had the opportunity to work alongside many local leaders. Few have impressed me as much as Jared Nieuwenhuis - and that's why I'm proud to endorse his re-election to the Bellevue City Council.

Jared is a thoughtful, solutions-oriented leader who embraces growth, while prioritizing the needs of the neighborhoods and families that call Bellevue home. He has been a steadfast ally of law enforcement, has held the line for families overly burdened by taxes, actively supports our local Jewish community, and consistently comes up with thoughtful strategies to tackle Bellevue's challenges, while also bringing new ideas to improve upon Bellevue's successes.

I've worked closely with Jared on regional issues and witnessed his commitment firsthand. He listens to constituents, tackles tough challenges, and he's always looking for innovative ways to improve the city budget, manage regional transportation and growth, reduce crime and so much more. With the challenges and opportunities ahead for our region, we need Jared's proven leadership guiding Bellevue forward.

I have always been able to count on Jared as a steadfast ally against some of the bad ideas that come from Seattle's far-left interest groups. He is a true leader that will be instrumental in shaping Bellevue's future for the better!

I urge you to [join me in supporting his campaign](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=9ab72922cf&e=77eef70c61) and help re-elect him to the Bellevue City Council this November. Contributions are limited to $2,400 per individual, business and PAC. Please be as generous as you can! **_[DONATE HERE](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=308092a22f&e=77eef70c61)_** When solid leaders like Jared are re-elected, it's a win for our whole region!

Sincerely,
Reagan Dunn
---
| | [Follow on Twitter](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=020f14c031&e=77eef70c61) | [ on Facebook](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=9551b88bd3&e=77eef70c61) |

Peter,

I wanted to share something with you, something that could turn the tides in California's Liberal Communist Utopia. I'm officially announcing my candidacy for the U.S. House of Representatives in California's 25th District.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=699dc2a670124f4aad7b5c2f90bf13b3&_e=tbJDHtff0PLBjd_058ZBOnVM8A_5dvHGrnIgDf64KH6LkmVsUh3__snsVKOiel11isukC6NlzkPLYAx7G5lqW2SEkqKbu1n1iycIAKR_yNHgb2vZTYUDiIj-A4g3XN5SLRCtPbuZxUy0BjbPDocod47emk1WGq5_FAbpeqA_2BryNsDWuxMRCvupNiRHh6H-Eu_cRVSl1aqjFE_gUk6z9rezWAYKmLPnmm67bXLunnh8nk1p1q1QAkcDHE8JkNKrb-epcO0T6S7tKeCBS9u47vRpub0SAgJibibtDZ-SP_NwWupeOCK6JiEYvrgyEiHAWZeMsVnRyx_9-TuzipdA2Q%3D%3D)
Representing the people of California would be one of the greatest honors of my life, right behind being a husband, father, grandfather, great-grandfather, and a proud U.S. Marine.

_**I 'm asking for your support to FLIP CA-25 RED to help Californians fight back against the Communist Utopia that Nancy Pelosi, Gavin Newsom, and Adam Schiff have created.**_

| [ **ENDORSE ME HERE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=699dc2a670124f4aad7b5c2f90bf13b3&_e=tbJDHtff0PLBjd_058ZBOnVM8A_5dvHGrnIgDf64KH6LkmVsUh3__snsVKOiel11isukC6NlzkPLYAx7G5lqW2SEkqKbu1n1iycIAKR_yNHgb2vZTYUDiIj-A4g3XN5SLRCtPbuZxUy0BjbPDocod2VgMkWFQLUwg5rxsKQmdI2cdjTcQksNzLVheNKGBeBQLBXquq2oz-YGxsjA_PfaOWq1XGQcgXu2ll3x3tOZYc1SMMsFSlNIteQ4lLMXX5hmmtOWYw3Qu1bH7YlLl_7nOwtpccZzBi9aITPQYEsN9_gL42ydICbp7CbR-iB1V9mtes0Ru4OIukLTtsj1H_NnCA%3D%3D)

That means border security is not just a talking point; it's a matter of survival. We must secure our border, back our law enforcement, and revive the America-First agenda.

I'm a proud Republican Mexican American. That's exactly why the Democrat machine will come after me. I don't fit their narrative. I don't play their identity politics game. And I'm not afraid to call them out. [**With your support, we can send a clear message: California belongs to the people, not to career politicians or radical ideologues.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=699dc2a670124f4aad7b5c2f90bf13b3&_e=tbJDHtff0PLBjd_058ZBOnVM8A_5dvHGrnIgDf64KH6LkmVsUh3__snsVKOiel11isukC6NlzkPLYAx7G5lqW2SEkqKbu1n1iycIAKR_yNHgb2vZTYUDiIj-A4g3XN5SLRCtPbuZxUy0BjbPDocod47emk1WGq5_FAbpeqA_2BryNsDWuxMRCvupNiRHh6H-engbgRM6Fx9xiFjyho_n1h2fFnygdZO8ti2IBVgsWI862OXeyy9PMzeih-QTcA3basMQlIFOqlRwxp9P6KJEcTfSUxMF7qqkU5Htgwoycs8lj3osYpj4XiXhVbA-9xg4nncQ0Aez_YimQLGDusb4fw%3D%3D)

Meet Joe Males:

**Joe Males is a Marine Veteran, small business-owner, city council member, and most importantly, a father. Throughout his life, he has put service to his community at the forefront of his life 's mission.

Shortly after turning 18, Joe enlisted in the Marine Corps. He attended boot camp in Camp Pendleton and later served overseas in the Philippines and Guam. After being discharged as a Sergeant, Joe remained committed to supporting his fellow veterans. He took on leadership roles in his local Elks Lodge and American Legion post, working to ensure veterans in the community had the resources and support they deserved.

Following his time in the Marine Corps, Joe carried his strong work ethic and discipline into the field of computer networking services. He started in an entry-level position, worked his way through multiple leadership roles, and in 1996, he built his own business from the ground up. Joe knows firsthand the hard work and sacrifice of this journey, and he's determined to make it easier for hardworking Americans to do the same.

Joe's entry into politics was deeply personal. After his son, a Marine who followed in his footsteps, was tragically murdered back home, Joe vowed that no parent should have to endure such a loss. Determined to take a stand for public safety and the rule of law, he ran for Hemet City Council to help ensure no other family would experience the same tragedy.

During his tenure on the City Council, Joe has led numerous initiatives to improve infrastructure, drive business growth, and keep neighborhoods safe and clean. He takes pride in his ability to collaborate with fellow council members and get results, even when facing different perspectives. Joe is committed to bringing this same results-driven approach to Washington D.C., to ensure the voices of the American people are heard and their needs are met.

** [**HELP JOE MALES!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=699dc2a670124f4aad7b5c2f90bf13b3&_e=tbJDHtff0PLBjd_058ZBOnVM8A_5dvHGrnIgDf64KH6LkmVsUh3__snsVKOiel11isukC6NlzkPLYAx7G5lqW2SEkqKbu1n1iycIAKR_yNHgb2vZTYUDiIj-A4g3XN5SLRCtPbuZxUy0BjbPDocod47emk1WGq5_FAbpeqA_2BryNsDWuxMRCvupNiRHh6H-5NwL_le9WWIrnfcykvNJ_t9pQ5oPmsSdbBBM-G4A56NWZsvIC8bePE1ffY6Xgog1fwXg2Pc0dSCqsMlB3J0TqQyVFhGIRkJvm_74SmiMTPTc-fR9BFTA_ulYa12ONSxypp1Oqli6FN3_hFXuKXZ0ig%3D%3D)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: I want to send you my battle plan against the Left
body:
Claim your free hardcover copy when you support Turning Point's fight for America's future.

\- Get your free copy of Right Wing Revolution and help us defeat the radical left for good. - Join the movement sweeping college campuses and get your free battle plan today. - Claim your free hardcover copy when you support Turning Point's fight for America's future. - The next generation is waking up — see how you make it possible. - The American Comeback is Real — Join the unstoppable movement of young patriots standing up for truth and freedom. - The Revolution is HERE [Young Patriots across America are rising up — get your battle plan to join the movement.] - At every campus I visit, thousands of students are standing up for American values. - Your FREE Copy of Right Wing Revolution [Get your battle plan to defeat the radical Left and restore American greatness.]
| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, You really have to see it to believe it... As I’ve been crisscrossing the country to college campuses, it’s clear something BIG is happening in America. At every stop on Turning Point’s **American Comeback Tour** , thousands of students are showing up — _waving flags, chanting “USA! USA! USA!” and defiantly standing for truth in the face of Leftist indoctrination._
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, young people are **_waking up_**... They’re rejecting Leftist lies and propaganda. Instead, they’re embracing faith, freedom, and patriotism like never before! We are in the middle of a new cultural revolution. This is exactly what I hoped for when I wrote my book, **_Right Wing Revolution_** – a battle plan to win the culture war, restore American greatness, and defeat the radical Left once and for all. **_And, friend, I want to send you a FREE hardcover copy..._** _**[_**All I ask in return is that you chip in a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA reach even more young people and fuel our unstoppable movement.**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
---
[ **Make My Gift & Claim My FREE Book**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
You know, friend, it’s amazing how far we’ve come in a matter of months... When I first released **_Right Wing Revolution_** last year, you and I were in the midst of a battle for national _SURVIVAL_.
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
But now, the evidence that the Left is on the ropes is EVERYWHERE. And it’s no more apparent than on every college campus I visit. The energy of these young people...their hunger and enthusiasm for ideas they’ve never heard before...the outpouring of patriotism and love of their country... _It’s clear this is a once-in-a-generation moment!_ **But we can’t let up now. If we want to win our culture and defeat the Left once and for all, you and I must keep the pressure on.** That’s why this book matters. That’s why YOU matter. This isn’t just a book – it's a **CALL TO ACTION** for every American who refuses to sit on the sidelines while we save our country from the radical Left. It’s NOT another boring policy book. It’s NOT another D.C. insider’s take on politics. It’s a _BATTLE PLAN._ **A roadmap for how we WIN – how we take action, take back our culture, and take back our country.** _**[And you can get your FREE copy of this book with a donation of ANY amount to Turning Point USA – your gift today will help reach the next generation with the truth about American Greatness!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
---
[ **Yes, Charlie – Send Me My FREE Book!**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, _Right Wing Revolution_ is like NO OTHER book you’ve read from a conservative before... **It’s a guide for a return to an America where:**
* We are united with a national spirit of love of country and belief in American Greatness.

* We have a free society, secure borders, and respect for our Constitution.

* We have rapidly increasing church attendance and a nationwide spiritual renewal.

* We trust our neighbors, feel safe in our communities, and don’t have to lock our doors at night.

* We bring up the next generation to love our country, to live with integrity and strong morals, and to champion a bright future for all Americans.

The focus of this book is on how ALL Americans can improve our country and our culture, starting with a focus on improving ourselves... _Because winning back our country doesn’t start with politicians in D.C. or pundits on TV – it starts with you, me, and other like-minded grassroots patriots!_ **Now, Fellow patriot, I want to get my new book in the hands of as many Americans as possible — which is why I’m offering to send you a hardcover edition for FREE.** _**[All I ask for in return is your gift of ANY amount to help support Turning Point USA’s work to make kids LOVE AMERICA again!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
---
[ **Make My Gift & Claim My FREE Gift**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, the future of this movement depends on patriots like you who aren’t afraid to stand up, speak out, and take action. We are taking back America and the next generation from the radical Left. And we’re just getting started. So please, _**[_**make your most generous gift today to Turning Point USA**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ and I’ll send you a **FREE hardcover copy of**** _Right Wing Revolution_** as a personal thank you. Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and – in advance – your support of Turning Point USA. For America, Charlie KirkFounder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ **Yes, Charlie – Send Me My FREE Book!**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiAt/?__vbtrk=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0MzE3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=284317&trkid=651167803&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Hitler. Hamas. Trump. Israel. End Times w/Jonathan Cahn
body:
Last night at Sheridan.Church, Rabbi Jonathan Cahn explained several mysteries that blew me away. For instance, I was unaware of the connection betwe
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11300.1.0495947e5c64f9cced142b2aa3f6b0c8) |
---
Last night at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11301.1.b0e719d50139b66990895b5ad72ead4a), **Rabbi Jonathan Cahn** explained several mysteries that blew me away. For instance, I was unaware of the connection between **Adolf Hitler** and **Hamas** as well as the significance of a major decision by **President Trump** in 2017. The message was so good and insightful. It is well worth the watch! **ICYMI** watch [The Dragon's Prophecy by Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11302.1.4845681729092769b9b011b4a62e9a7e) here: [https://youtube.com/live/9LSzULM27Zk](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11303.1.2fdbc796f46c69ce4291dfdcc2d7740a) Upcoming Events At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11304.1.21a4591335c79b33a5ad0bc569c4ec13): -Sunday, April 13: **Palm Sunday** -Wednesday, April 16: **NO Mid-Week Service** -Saturday, April 19 @5:00pm: **Passover Experience** | RSVP: [https://clr.cm/fXJN](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11305.1.21e8f6c0e68fe277ddff6aa1d91c9708) -Sunday, April 20: **Resurrection Sunday** -Thursday, May 8 @6:30pm: **Roger Stone** | RSVP: [https://clr.cm/hGXW](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11306.1.9ae3facc0d2f08054196b8b208b2e037) Please consider partnering w/Sheridan by visiting [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11307.1.f3300d5b8b52edcfb1244b1a96a75b29) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11308.1.9494c132aae69e87331e9c6225635dbd)
---
---
|
---
Recently, **President Trump** fulfilled another _campaign promise_ by releasing all **80,000 files** about the **JFK assassination**! Last year, **Roger Stone** (advisor and friend of Presidents **Nixon** , **Reagan** \+ **Trump**) came to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11309.1.ff847c1ce2981a5226982b39e66e7353) and gave one of the most intriguing conversations about [Who Really Killed JFK](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11310.1.313fd98bafbff55c4b6757dbd9c3ada9) from his book, _"The Man Who Killed Kennedy: The Case Against LBJ"_. You can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/ZphwDct5Mio](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11311.1.0d6528a6fd780a2956cb80dcfb8cf0ab) With that being said... I am excited to announce that **Roger Stone** is coming back to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11312.1.9e921ef19a4adf6f47baef9a60b1f4d0) to share about the **JFK files** and what they mean _plus_ to discuss how **President Trump** dismantled the **Clinton-Obama-Biden Political Dynasty**. This event will be a BLAST! Seating is **LIMITED**. RSVP today: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/1628128](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11313.1.316fae4dea246bbc159016a7e00f37d2) **Date** : Thursday, May 8 **Time** : 6:30pm **Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ RSVP For Roger Stone At Sheridan ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11314.1.a5eecb73788b945bb8d6c689f49a1981)
---
---
## Eric Trump Inside | Protesters Outside
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11315.1.bbc68c5f296dd7cc2eaa653a4bb96b48)
---
I sat down with [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11316.1.3048e5be25f93a1fa56f1d8814405366) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11317.1.c51b65d8c66ad6b43a25cbc4c73392c7) in Tulsa, OK for an _incredible conversation_ about a wide range of subjects from the **2024 Election** , **DOGE** and the **Great American Comeback** while protestors outside were not thrilled with a Trump speaking at a church... Watch [Eric Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11318.1.5451f278d4a4497ac87c04d1c7c17f10) at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11319.1.e0d07daa277ca0a6092add2863d04e51) here: [https://youtu.be/uH0zK20NJ18](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=20515504.11320.1.271ff32d9c5946513a6ab6618be07c7a)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The richest people in the world made $300 BILLION yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I want to know right now whether or not Trump tipped these guys off before he rolled back those tariffs, because that’s a violation of the law.
#

Hey Peter, it’s Ruben.
Markets plunged last week. Worst four day stretch in decades all because Donald Trump made one of the absolute dumbest moves in the history of the presidency.
After he rolled it back yesterday, the markets had their best day since 2008. Before he did it, he said “BUY!” And by the end of the day, the richest people in the world added more than $300 billion to their combined net worth.
Trump’s got 13 billionaires in his cabinet. His kids are billionaires. Tons of billionaires donated to his campaign, or his inauguration, or bought his cryptocurrency. Elon Musk is basically running the White House. And I want to know **_right now_** whether or not Trump tipped these guys off before he rolled back those tariffs, because that’s a violation of the law.
I want to know who was a part of the decision making process. I want to know whether they bought low before the announcement, or told anybody to do so. And I want to know if Trump told his family beforehand.
If any of that happened, it is an ethical travesty and likely a crime. It’s an insult to the millions of people who saw their life savings and retirement funds disappear over the last week who might never be made whole. The market is still down about 15% from its peak, and that’s trillions of dollars in losses they’re dealing with.
**Adam Schiff and I are demanding an investigation. I want answers.**
[**If you want Trump and his associates investigated for insider trading and blatant corruption, sign this petition.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_insider_trading/?source=em250410-1-90&akid=3813%2E734936%2EYsCbwG)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_insider_trading/?source=em250410-1-90&akid=3813%2E734936%2EYsCbwG)
Trump’s the most corrupt president we’ve ever had, but that doesn’t mean we have to sit here and take it.
Add your name and expose him for the fraud he is.
Thanks a lot,
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

name: Progressive Virginians for Alex Bastani
subject: Basic Dignity is not Ambitious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Virginians for Alex BastaniP
body:
| | | | | [](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=0b87f5d12f&e=8587d34f43)
---
| | | | | Dear Friend,
The other day, I had a long talk with one of the **most conservative Democrat** s I know. You know the type, fancy tie, gold watch, hasn't missed a Chamber of Commerce lunch since the Clinton years. But what he said **stopped me in my tracks** :
“Josh, I think Alex Bastani has a real shot. Because he’s the only one saying what he actually believes in.”
That’s when it hit me. We’ve got five candidates fighting for the **same tired playbook** , safe, vague, and focus-grouped to death. Meanwhile, Alex is out here talking straight to the people about **healthcare, wages, unions, and the right to a future**.
---
| | | | | [DONATE FOR PROGRESS](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=dcce7d256e&e=8587d34f43)
---
| Now, some call Alex’s agenda “ambitious.” But let me tell you why I am proud to be running this campaign:
In the richest country in the history of the world, it is _not_ ambitious to say that every Virginian should have **access to medical care** when they need it.
It is _not_ ambitious to say that our kids deserve an **education** , not a lifetime of debt.
It is _not_ ambitious to say that an honest day’s work should come with a **living wage**.
And it is _not_ ambitious to say that workers have a **right to organize** and fight for their fair share.
That’s not ambition. That’s _basic dignity_. And if you agree with me, we need your help.
**We're up against the establishment** , but we’ve already defied the odds, qualifying for the ballot with over 15,000 petition signatures, thanks to the work of real people across Virginia.Now, help us take the next step. [Chip in _right now_](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=6fd7e1ba4e&e=8587d34f43) so we can reach more voters with the truth:
* There **is** a progressive on the ballot.
* His name is **Alex Bastani**.
* He’s ready to fight.

---
| [DONATE FOR PROGRESS](https://progressivevirginiansforalexbastani.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5f516fc098ca6ecf04d23d982&id=1435d9687a&e=8587d34f43)
---
| Solidarity forever,Josh NorrisCampaign Manager
Progressive Virginians for Alex Bastani

clean_body: Can I just get 2 minutes of your time? | | | Thank you for opening my email. 99% of people scroll right past — but not you. That means everything to me. I’m Derrick Evans: a husband, father, and rancher from West Virginia. I’m just a working man with a family to raise and bills to pay—not a D.C. insider with a team of lobbyists and lawyers on speed dial. In 2021, my life was flipped upside down. I was thrown into a Biden Regime Gulagfor almost 100 days. Why? Because I peacefully protested on January 6th – standing up for President Trump and the 74 million Americans who voted for him. Biden sent a FBI SWAT TEAM to bustdown my front door. My wife and kids were terrified. Prison was going to be my home now. I wore my cross necklace every day in Biden’s Gulag. It reminded me that I can’t give up on life, give up on my family, or give up on my country. ______________________________________ President Trump OFFICIALLY PARDONED ME on January 20th, 2025. It was an honor to meet him and say thank you for giving me and 1,500 J6 prisoners our freedom back.____________________________________ I will never take my freedom for granted again. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate – something I NEVER imagined doing. Where I’m from in West Virginia, we don’t trust politicians. And for good reason. The D.C. elites have sold us out —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are gettingCRUSHED in all 50 states. I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Never make a promise you don’t intend to keep.
These are words we all heard as kids – a basic principle of humanity and moral decency. President Trump and Congressional Republicans promised to lower costs, but continue to prove it was one they never intended to keep. Just this week:
* President Trump launched a global trade war. His on again, off again tariff taxes could cost the average family $3,800 more a year.

* House Republicans are advancing a bill to increase bank overdraft fees for consumers.

* Congress passed a budget resolution that slashes critical lifelines for working families in order to provide a massive tax cut for the ultra-wealthy.

Promises, without action, are just lies.
Johnny is working to expose the lies of extreme conservatives, who continue to put their billionaire friends and donors ahead of middle class Americans. Will you contribute today – anything you can spare – to help him? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/joc-2025?refcode=1.3]

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105591516/538762247/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTkzNzljNTAtMmYxNi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJyEpkaZGYTtj-S6AcMcZn2U6dN4qDT4VwFnOQw_aag=&emci=16379c50-2f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=19379c50-2f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14016711)

Peter,
**A new report from CNN just revealed more details about the multi-pronged MAGA effort to smear and dismantle ActBlue.**
According to the report, Republicans in Congress are pressuring the Treasury Department to hand over sensitive financial records. Others are pushing the FBI to investigate ActBlue for terrorism—using outright lies and conspiracy theories as justification.
At the same time, Elon Musk is using X to amplify the disinformation—accusing ActBlue of funding protests and linking it to vandalism at Tesla. He even claimed, falsely, that a Democrat who died in 2019 is bankrolling the platform.
**This isn’t oversight. It’s an attempt to discredit and defund the Democratic Party’s most effective grassroots fundraising platform.**
**[Can you chip in $25 or more to help COURIER expose this coordinated attack—and defend our right to organize and fight back against this corrupt regime?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105591517/538762248/-1581427288?refcode=20250410_ActBlue_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTkzNzljNTAtMmYxNi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJyEpkaZGYTtj-S6AcMcZn2U6dN4qDT4VwFnOQw_aag=)**
**[Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105591518/538762249/-1581427288?refcode=20250410_ActBlue_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTkzNzljNTAtMmYxNi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJyEpkaZGYTtj-S6AcMcZn2U6dN4qDT4VwFnOQw_aag=)**
From ActBlue to USAID to Social Security, the MAGA movement follows the same pattern: smear institutions that help people, flood the zone with disinformation, then use that chaos to justify cutting them—or tearing them down entirely.
If it empowers ordinary people, they attack it. If it works, they try to destroy it.
**ActBlue is a target because it works. Because it fuels small-dollar, people-powered campaigns that threaten MAGA control. But it won’t stop there.**
What happens when they come for voter registration tools? Or independent newsrooms like COURIER?
**While most coverage stops at the headlines, we connect the dots—and help voters understand the real strategy behind these attacks.**
COURIER is one of the only media organizations reaching millions with factual reporting where right-wing propaganda spreads—on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and email. But we rely on grassroots support to keep going.
**[If you’re ready to fight back and correct the record about ActBlue, chip in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105591521/538762250/-1581427288?refcode=20250410_ActBlue_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTkzNzljNTAtMmYxNi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JJyEpkaZGYTtj-S6AcMcZn2U6dN4qDT4VwFnOQw_aag=)**

body:
but the American people are fighting back >>

We won’t stand by: Join our fight to SAVE Social Security by signing our petition »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250410_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19493%2E878179%2Eoo3O43) | [20,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social_security/?source=VPP_20250410_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19493%2E878179%2Eoo3O43)
---
**FIRST:** Unelected, unappointed billionaire-in-chief Elon Musk SEIZED control of Social Security, all of our private data, and even called it a _“ponzi scheme.”_

**BUT THEN** THOUSANDS of Americans took to the streets in Hands Off protests all over the country, SLAMMING Musk’s vile attacks!

**SO NOW:** Grassroots momentum is on our side — and if we keep it surging, we can FORCE Congress to do what’s right and DEFEND Social Security!

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19493%2E878179%2Eoo3O43). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19493%2E878179%2Eoo3O43).**

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We’re seizing this historic moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
See how you can make a sustained impact in our fight. Details inside >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, The American people spoke last fall - and despite the left's unhinged protestations, we've been given a mandate to implement long overdue fundamental reform in Washington.

President Trump and our Republican majorities are _seizing this historic moment_.

We're charging forward to save our great nation, **taking a stand for our common-sense conservative principles** and **crushing woke-left nonsense** day in and day out!

I'm proud to be leading the charge on the most important issues of the day, through both my work in the Senate and my work to share our message in the public arena.

**And I 'm grateful beyond words for your support in the fight for America's future. **

Today, I'm writing to ask you to take your involvement to the next level.

This is a great way to **[sustain our fight at Team Cruz](http://trk.tedcruz.)** throughout the year!
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
It's quick and easy to get set up. All you need to do is: 1\. Select Your Donation Amount; 2\. Click the Recurring Donation Box; 3\. Complete Your First Donation.
---
**If a monthly commitment is too much, please consider making a[one-time donation](http://trk.tedcruz.) to support our work at this critical time.** Every dollar we raise is a huge help.

Thank you, again, for your commitment to our conservative movement and for supporting our efforts at Team Cruz to lead the charge for results and accountability.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

| | **BOMBSHELL!!** A former Facebook employee has pulled back the curtain and revealed the truth about what’s been happening behind the scenes at the social media giant. _**Here’s what’s at stake:**_ According to the whistleblower, Meta has been lying—to Congress and to the American public, working-in-hand with the Chinese Communist Party, granting access to personal data, and conspiring with the CCP to censor the public—not just in China, but in America too!
* Zuckerberg has claimed no ties to China—but that’s looking like a big, fat lie.
* Meta allegedly censored content in the U.S. at the request of Beijing.
* The company reportedly stored American data in China and helped develop censorship tools used against both Chinese and American users.

This is only the beginning, and we're get to the bottom of this scandal!
---

clean_body: Has Meta been lying to Congress and the American public for years!?| | | | | Peter, | | BOMBSHELL!! A former Facebook employee has pulled back the curtain and revealed the truth about what’s been happening behind the scenes at the social media giant. Here’s what’s at stake: According to the whistleblower, Meta has been lying—to Congress and to the American public, working-in-hand with the Chinese Communist Party, granting access to personal data, and conspiring with the CCP to censor the public—not just in China, but in America too! Zuckerberg has claimed no ties to China—but that’s looking like a big, fat lie. Meta allegedly censored content in the U.S. at the request of Beijing. * The company reportedly stored American data in China and helped develop censorship tools used against both Chinese and American users. This is only the beginning, and we're get to the bottom of this scandal! | | In Liberty, | | Josh Hawley | | | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

| | Peter- Here in Massachusetts, we know what our values are. We believe in liberty and justice for all people, and we stand with hardworking middle class families who deserve opportunities to succeed. In other words- [**we reject the toxic Trump/Musk agenda and everything it stands for.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105595927/538767375/-56579985?usp=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGNmYTUyZS0zMzE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpbbnxwW3GHG9MOhIK60ivwwohj0cEtJEowPSvOdZgw=&emci=cc503065-7e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e0cfa52e-3316-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17281370) We reject its hatred and division. We reject its prioritizing of billionaire oligarchs over the American people. But MAGA Mike Kennealy thinks this destructive ideology is what's best for the Bay State. He wants to govern our state with the same recklessness and disregard for everyday folks that has been so typical of this second Trump administration. Meanwhile, Governor Healey and Lt. Governor Driscoll have been fighting for Massachusetts every single day and achieved historic wins, including tax cuts and the re-opening of South Coast Rail after nearly 70 years. They're delivering for our state, and we're going to deliver for them in 2026. We're ready to stand up against MAGA Mike's agenda and re-elect Team Healey/Driscoll- and we know [**YOU ARE TOO**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105595928/538767376/-56579985?usp=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGNmYTUyZS0zMzE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpbbnxwW3GHG9MOhIK60ivwwohj0cEtJEowPSvOdZgw=&emci=cc503065-7e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e0cfa52e-3316-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17281370). **[Click here to sign our petition and tell Governor Healey and Lieutenant Governor Driscoll- I STAND WITH YOU!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105595929/538767377/-56579985?usp=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGNmYTUyZS0zMzE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GpbbnxwW3GHG9MOhIK60ivwwohj0cEtJEowPSvOdZgw=&emci=cc503065-7e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=e0cfa52e-3316-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=17281370)**

clean_body: We won't let MAGA Mike bring the Trump/Musk agenda to Massachusetts!| | | | | Peter- Here in Massachusetts, we know what our values are. We believe in liberty and justice for all people, and we stand with hardworking middle class families who deserve opportunities to succeed. In other words- We reject its hatred and division. We reject its prioritizing of billionaire oligarchs over the American people. But MAGA Mike Kennealy thinks this destructive ideology is what's best for the Bay State. He wants to govern our state with the same recklessness and disregard for everyday folks that has been so typical of this second Trump administration. Meanwhile, Governor Healey and Lt. Governor Driscoll have been fighting for Massachusetts every single day and achieved historic wins, including tax cuts and the re-opening of South Coast Rail after nearly 70 years. They're delivering for our state, and we're going to deliver for them in 2026. We're ready to stand up against MAGA Mike's agenda and re-elect Team Healey/Driscoll- and we know . | | We're ready to organize against MAGA Mike, and with your help, we'll win this fight. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee Massachusetts Democratic Party 11 Beacon St Suite 410 Boston, MA 02108 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 **Battlegrounds:** Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the _slimmest_ of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 **Power Building Chambers:** Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 **Watch List:** Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. **We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it.** [So, on behalf of my entire team and state Democrats nationwide, I’m asking: Will you invest in our Together,

clean_body: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. | | | | | ---|--- Our team has identified the cycle’s best and most consequential opportunities to build durable Democratic power in state legislatures, and I’m so excited to share our new target map with you: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 Battlegrounds: Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the slimmest of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 Power Building Chambers: Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 Watch List: Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. We’re ready to hit the ground running – but this strategy is only as strong as the grassroots movement behind it. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | State Dems are working daily to lower costs, address real concerns, and improve the everyday lives of folks like you in places like your state. That’s why it’s vital that we fund our strategy to defend our majorities, elect strong Democratic leaders, and invest in ultra-competitive races nationwide. Thank you for being part of this movement. Together, Heather Heather Williams President Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee P.S. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: URGENT: Take Back Albuquerque from Crime and Homelessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Darren White for Mayor]
body:
Former Sheriff Darren White is taking on Albuquerque's crime crisis, but needs your immediate support to qualify for public financing...

| | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4828cd9f4e&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | Dear Albuquerque Friends:

Are you tired of the rampant crime and widespread, unchecked homelessness in Albuquerque?

**Then join me in supporting the only Republican running for mayor – former Sheriff Darren White.**

It’s critical that we support Darren with “Seed Money” contributions of up to $250 to get his campaign off the ground. He needs these funds to gather petition signatures and to qualify for public financing. Albuquerque residents can contribute here:
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Donate Seed Money Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=296f302dd0&e=567664f14c)
---
| And here’s why supporting Darren is so important... **

**_**We all know crime is out of control in Albuquerque, with record high murder and property crimes. And there is a crisis of homelessness.**_
This didn’t happen by accident – this is what happens when leftwing policies take hold.

**One of Keller’s first acts as Mayor was to make Albuquerque a Sanctuary City for illegal immigrants who commit crimes.** Krysty and I have discussed many cases on our podcast involving illegal immigrants who are arrested for crimes only to be released back onto our streets to commit more serious crimes, including murder!
_**Darren White has pledged to end the “Sanctuary City” law in Albuquerque immediately.**_ I have known Darren for years. He’s a veteran of the Army’s 82nd Airborne and a career lawman. He was elected twice as Sheriff in Bernalillo County, so he’s a proven vote-getter. Please contribute to him today by clicking here:
---
| [Donate Seed Money Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ee5b02581b&e=567664f14c)
---
| Mayor Keller’s campaign strategy is to attack President Trump and denounce ICE, because he can’t run on his failed record. He even signed a law that will give _**“guaranteed income”**_ to residents in the War Zone. **And illegal immigrants are eligible for these taxpayer handouts!**
This is socialism and we must take a stand to stop it! And that starts with supporting the only Republican running for mayor – Darren White – [by donating here](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d14e35957c&e=567664f14c).
Thank you for your continued support.

Sincerely,
Mark Ronchetti

_**P.S. In order to get his campaign off the ground,**_[_**Darren needs to raise “seed money” of up to $250 per Albuquerque resident**_](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=986a86f764&e=567664f14c) _**.**_ Please consider making your most generous contribution of up to $250 today and let’s take our city back!
---
| [Donate Seed Money Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7fb2aef1c1&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---
| [Paid for by Darren White for Mayor]
---
|

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Texas NEEDS to flip
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=GysisBQsubgKsUKxCvJhBJzgS9oG1%2BEA08ApsoDy%2Bs7H9Uw3MZZ20ts2gov5bPgc%2FxqxZqZg68o4WcLGMoNOLoy7Wsj2wrp2U5SI%2FaQ6YaK4rbwEi51qbZctHY9zgiLeS0OGV5skF%2FfFocdT28v5CZPMdJ0S8%2BvZRLRRvGbB1uaQBrPgas0Q4jIq9wNKbwr0hUZNX6HDkh4oy%2BsOpdGSCbZaxgZBvghB%2B9ePcrJMUM33mCmN23N9ZFlseW38DRwa2UKug%2F8xf%2BI7M%2Bdxs8P73YE0%2FK8yy5Lm1L%2FcU092k8RrpqFKPzJP9pJ2KLYA6WrFXi3utCeXPf5uHL1UoZmaP8YOSrgLF4Vs2yLX1Qdnb0IkU2skgNdbsNDvWC0Dke4EO3n%2FFIaN2tgBnr9Q2%2B4QTdEPfHKBcIJSMPD2ST4GEY8%3D]

# [#]
Progressives across the country can’t afford to ignore Texas. They need us to win. If we want a progressive future, we have to fight for it and FLIP the state. Before we tell you more, can you make a quick contribution now to support our efforts on the ground? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=]

RUSH $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=]

We’re fighting for a representative democracy, with leadership that looks like us and shares our values. It’s possible for us to do the work and flip Texas, but it will take A LOT of work and resources.

So, we need a new path forward, Peter. We need to be fundraising at every chance we get, we need to be contacting voters, supporting progressive candidates up and down the ballot, and showing up for progressive causes – in the streets and online!

“...Latino voters are persuadable. But only if we show up. And only if there’s major investment into the state.”
The Washington Post [https://www.washingtonpost.com/opinions/2025/03/27/texas-presidential-election-democrats/]

We need to show out in droves. We need to mobilize Black and Latino voters for progressive causes like never before, because the stakes have never been higher. We need you with us, Peter » [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
