name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/FlSMS43R3t-iFJlo-91q_dqngC3v3LfQcmSOnrXncUa4-Qgt-QAbossZZxi5aHOXKVidqj7OZe4NQlKGLkAZr3alDfRbQU7KumQQSjvF5k579Uhw9R9fWLfGm3bXwN71veYe_2snqOcZqE7Xn6qBT5kmamseE0p1rbPK37BNFgJGAefYNIbodt5fJVtiZ4BYDwLkyzk781aGNt_W3gwQBJucDKUZp54UtuPfwGkNY7I1AFJHxGD4lfhtHlS56zvR5xaPMr6lhPDUlDTKzK2ZOcmWmmz_Sc0UWCn2EnnL9IR2NndSN0JXEwFA82VmBIZgsFqiFyHfzlc7DQU3e8BvToZoYXOAaZaM-2hESG6XJ6y3JFIZAMuU6CLkbJrhfHApgjCrJHNtg-sujI3rNST9vaXJUArA0Kdz8A1GThLCJfePM8LxwUBlQQQ45Mzd1oyWLeugbURrEpvDbQf3NEDAxm7h/qAPGW0xAru4FdUkKrfJUklSePEo8zre_/7)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/tDwCR7opeR4BkQlN7buBkbuntZDAFg8tPyUTAP24rIxyfu926cvExbY1KcoHafDundBB7NguyY0CY7AX74LrAF5nGSoLC8hFFzJWReGdERb4OEIQrQaO33JlcT64aijfewpIoF9wAfrzMI6i2b5dBgqq2Xq1RAnqBIRzhVPiS0Pv5XC2eUuElilMqgcFYrWnQxUX3sTT-Pfq8bNyjsAgY72moaE03YtMy3CZdJLFlX4VUX-YCGXDC95zsHlX1nuunO393I2iekKnyFattTKBHgfFvR6Gm8QhgeXdkqUmrRy_yohlQERXmggKGh-tFdKpaydXNG64BpIwYUvuspOCJT1FXKSRtStX_HZW9-bkCShdkq9pd2MLFjIuCSylRUq4PAJBC1isOLZPfYAcFldCl7r1RvyudO-0U4aqgMvq-npaDwKeRilOAQNTy80bwrgtbCnQPEjf7k2RCcuvbtCrBQnA/JSSBh1A-0gKNQL8IbFtJhHXWTbj9ayh3/7)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/8JOJB_p_zivkUkt1CXXFbxgENXdRR-ERUKUtt4iaHAyw5lTLPZNWIIcNeGFq8WydGbdG3Fg4pzgsogcMtdo3tXniyIlCoJ8iCIcZTytCPhgg4ymi7RpQ2yZcSm960nLxg49pz_m8DVGlz74Dppf4Dg1KzKlDHZE6hAsaly5t4AdssNvwNrPCCc0mRWsEDemYbPoo0R5sPRxqYwhWe_VvTtXkAM26cj4IEZ8tHpWLFm-wLxd62fuZzH2ujdrcU1RzLmmF4IYT6fJLDK7fiPd-YPRfA5BKBUTi_pUmSQSi1Ct2hBFYN1FRkO2RvEFPAKS9c0KGyJIwBe4pZoSk0BneoFS_aS72VPDyvKXbT_SY4yI_ycthxiGpBDqfln_-C92sDyezCJDzJf7Avo0ouyshdiYeHUOE0M8WcMt8o1LuFmNvcu-EtDY45CLKhy6Pk6xEMAzhlnjWdabI5lZsKOYQqASA/gH78o_C51OHrHFfHcti-U2rXahGM1iHp/7) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/glF-ehwbQctrMxWLUECiV8PvZEnuNZB2foHo5U-CmdJIV9NXK7NiW1BWawXSgfNoj0XykpKoMVeM4w-pqow55v3HS82jhUDCt-Ao-W7o5f9igHNCYc_A06psY6bYPhh2wu8nJuq0wqB2bvMesJL0mRaRSnXQJkBGcZEo9k5zvJIICIxB-feEuicHRDbgzhioF6DiyqDetNV-_L3Xp2VG7naw7IzHvmdy1Cte_1-2uI6uDik7VMU39_PoeaocjlDbPpLObg39E7esv_zWsUIGxmn-iHxbK8eeErHyAXRRJWDEpkTh0Le-IgDP-i-EjvMQQ5LdPqYyyxU_LNoztgjLAxOMd0cHu4wtAexDg8HDpsmqKx8lVWNWEau7ZPrRPol6JC_6qbAhgQzGcklXhTRAe17mnjBGBzBrg-TNR2efkakyVRZLGerDhluRUGTW6MQ2mX6UTmu54pNG5fgMLzaHMfaO/0zHsv8BtfABFTDQX27Juicit3TM2oCLl/7)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. clean_body: Please – for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. | | Team: **Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer.** **What happens?** Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. **T****hese purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status**. Multiple stories written by the _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after _groups based outside of Georgia_ brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "_voter fraud hunters_ " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. [**Voter suppression is real, Team, both in Georgia and across the country. clean_body: Fox5 Atlanta: Georgia set to purge nearly half-million inactive voters this summer| | | | | | | Team: Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer. What happens? Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. These purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status. Multiple stories written by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after groups based outside of Georgia brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "voter fraud hunters " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Hell No to this GOP budget
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105599850/538775465/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjY2NTY0NS0zNzE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZ4iD3oYhokxh925PkepaHSi0NKmHStDTYXFqoIUuks=)
Peter, House Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s budget that will gut Medicaid from 152,483 of my neighbors in IL-17, including 66,000 children and 10,000 seniors, and strip health care away from millions more hard working American families, while giving huge new tax breaks to their billionaire donors. **HELL NO to this.** Whenever I’m moving through Central and Northwestern Illinois, I hear from dozens, if not hundreds, of constituents about the importance of protecting access to affordable, high quality health care. About how we need to expand access to health insurance, not gut it. This is cruel and unusual punishment of everyday people, an abandonment of our communities, and a betrayal to working families everywhere who are already struggling with high costs. I know the times feel desperate, but we cannot give in to despair. And I will not let up. I will keep fighting to deliver on the issues my neighbors care about the most. I am in Washington to get results for you, not to sell out and play footsie with a handful of tycoons. I hope you’ll join me in that fight. [**While I’m pushing back on this hateful giveaway in Congress, help me build the movement that will help working families across the Midwest win up and down the ballot and ensure we have a blue wave that actually works for us. clean_body: | = Peter, House Republicans just passed Donald Trump’s budget that will gut Medicaid from 152,483 of my neighbors in IL-17, including 66,000 children and 10,000 seniors, and strip health care away from millions more hard working American families, while giving huge new tax breaks to their billionaire donors. HELL NO to this. Whenever I’m moving through Central and Northwestern Illinois, I hear from dozens, if not hundreds, of constituents about the importance of protecting access to affordable, high quality health care. About how we need to expand access to health insurance, not gut it. This is cruel and unusual punishment of everyday people, an abandonment of our communities, and a betrayal to working families everywhere who are already struggling with high costs. I know the times feel desperate, but we cannot give in to despair. And I will not let up. I will keep fighting to deliver on the issues my neighbors care about the most. I am in Washington to get results for you, not to sell out and play footsie with a handful of tycoons. Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9e5bb74833474820837873da40eaaf16&_e=l3oTtlhzRRt_zNOyyZSmDAhZDC6pg3ZleSgvBZt8rUrCBw9rXaDmOF9d0PuXGV6scKIWW1N-vQHRdItlK3wJa9IRbp4KVmH_xOjt0IKUmXlboAtYKMrMLYaKG_-iW_yeRJIIMFS2QSJ-CLl_vfn9wbKcDNUlzd4uDiuzi-lSKjYUOMAW4y-GdlpNqxYlfp4MsvU4BYHs_-Uq36Q01_q47tFVcCyTgAK56qs541XCojMpbTeIRQ94omYwneqM2DeIKe4nD-TwVCFYoxsjnYHSPGvctz_hcau43IU4S8422vpvcP3-_kQQbeevzltr4Bx1P2ckViazbHOXII12WsD9VcGNgAod8hwsgKZ97fOWezQ%3D) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9e5bb74833474820837873da40eaaf16&_e=l3oTtlhzRRt_zNOyyZSmDAhZDC6pg3ZleSgvBZt8rUrCBw9rXaDmOF9d0PuXGV6scKIWW1N-vQHRdItlK3wJa9IRbp4KVmH_xOjt0IKUmXlboAtYKMrMLYaKG_-iW_yeRJIIMFS2QSJ-CLl_vfn9wbKcDNUlzd4uDiuzi-lSKjYUOMAW4y-GdlpNqxYlfp4MsvU4BYHs_-Uq36Q01_q47rInBRU132LUfYFdnHCHv0D2KgKC7ucZYueZqQWEBwFvz53KDcNqjswNODMl4hEx2vR7DCSfead4at41Riq2XMCcekkpTjnCSQT2Vat9ghLUZ7-4KruliO0EhNDwATLmpxDfgoexnCJ45lYcx6mDaE4%3D)**

Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9e5bb74833474820837873da40eaaf16&_e=l3oTtlhzRRt_zNOyyZSmDAhZDC6pg3ZleSgvBZt8rUrCBw9rXaDmOF9d0PuXGV6scKIWW1N-vQHRdItlK3wJa9IRbp4KVmH_xOjt0IKUmXlboAtYKMrMLYaKG_-iW_yeRJIIMFS2QSJ-CLl_vfn9wbKcDNUlzd4uDiuzi-lSKjYUOMAW4y-GdlpNqxYlfp4MsvU4BYHs_-Uq36Q01_q47jz2EvF6fJGHFeVuf5e4pKf7TKJ3QPacXA8SNX8wtVHnl2ldtqHa__86aSCO38rzoysTsUlnLpV0NiASEjcI0FykSXREkmZfmXEPNFsNJGa0tz_--KpRAFUyR_6iJCLhHcfudlNJ5I-UIKebCf6EHp8%3D) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9e5bb74833474820837873da40eaaf16&_e=l3oTtlhzRRt_zNOyyZSmDAhZDC6pg3ZleSgvBZt8rUrCBw9rXaDmOF9d0PuXGV6scKIWW1N-vQHRdItlK3wJa9IRbp4KVmH_xOjt0IKUmXlboAtYKMrMLYaKG_-iW_yeRJIIMFS2QSJ-CLl_vfn9wbKcDNUlzd4uDiuzi-lSKjYUOMAW4y-GdlpNqxYlfp4MsvU4BYHs_-Uq36Q01_q47nfFznxyUjX0rVpmcYKJGY2wIBpPKypgvSdFg_LliOwxCRfgA-kc-deK7u50hb4dANksfRv05wKVVHW41DvJidTUTBf_HplcXA-w6SM_tWO3cvIKQJbFATY7jyNKPF_uoO9ETIHg5rVnzZTgDAFCr5o%3D) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9e5bb74833474820837873da40eaaf16&_e=l3oTtlhzRRt_zNOyyZSmDAhZDC6pg3ZleSgvBZt8rUrCBw9rXaDmOF9d0PuXGV6scKIWW1N-vQHRdItlK3wJa9IRbp4KVmH_xOjt0IKUmXlboAtYKMrMLYaKG_-iW_yeRJIIMFS2QSJ-CLl_vfn9wbKcDNUlzd4uDiuzi-lSKjYUOMAW4y-GdlpNqxYlfp4MsvU4BYHs_-Uq36Q01_q47hNs75FsVgOscRWK9FD78Ocx6Z2jhJPPlqwh7ysLHgikH16Xq2AMe9rzRrvG0BSN7-_3Xgsvx2Bnd4QDEeM24VmWpeoJKTq3bdrsQc2rL6D17DgBLMCi5bgfaMi-k9jog6ZPAdhOVT71KFRyntLdXfA%3D) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=9e5bb74833474820837873da40eaaf16&_e=l3oTtlhzRRt_zNOyyZSmDAhZDC6pg3ZleSgvBZt8rUrCBw9rXaDmOF9d0PuXGV6scKIWW1N-vQHRdItlK3wJa9IRbp4KVmH_xOjt0IKUmXlboAtYKMrMLYaKG_-iW_yeRJIIMFS2QSJ-CLl_vfn9wbKcDNUlzd4uDiuzi-lSKjYUOMAW4y-GdlpNqxYlfp4MsvU4BYHs_-Uq36Q01_q47hSuncWHZ5x_isE54iAHhY3KdOvKKDfs_ZCZTd1Q3tSvgBwV_nAl0m3Aog-r6yp0qga9UChozm6aqbdkIk3p9g9bnF_3ajHuMlpNrU5jAJe3xb7zlkzWlYeS_mVbIYvhPZ3lxi3Qkgwnak6vlGjuu_8%3D) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: STOP SOROS!| | | | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat. | | | | STOP SOROS Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system......to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us?? My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side. AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. Thank you for joining us in this fight for America. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, . Thank you for taking action when action is needed! | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/V5shSbj6jA3WvqB3zktDFMwXUAK8T8MYei4zeFM5airsDKrnyV2TCNv4-wtxGhX222lUNtbRoCZAayMwblIyGtTVlsdkd01OgrBISH0zDHrFvoLTkChn-r8aM1rVRqXHCUWEHKQTQ-eaMkgDjtkyJxucKL2rHtjhd9YpX02OoyQzFvkwmhYdpPT2EnNcnlv-nPboGiVlp0bf9wU32kfXrVO5LwTjW9srHBH_0ZkhDfRpo8l6V8VmmYM57Vgn4VKd-LHzh5bApnqiBjmvwM4JGHueewtfr4J2pD2bfNlexoit-rqI_IGrICKen1T5N0BAtTDPLmCjwgXa2JhfiNnFXW-06pRi_YlJiN6bEu2Us6Ap2mOMSNxNuywz6ze8SdKkU0e3GYt0StWpkBqijDZ17zRFuFDDPXKfXhCFkKQeEKyYqE4f3CiUDCsGojDOpcjP0n6YmEkP1R79dMk-6ZsZLGva/um2DYd6emAEA-jlH00QtLM9tiARxCdvH/7)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/wtt2F6laGsCkbnNMvtxAi2aRdbq3WlqlrLvhO4Tmz-bnbU7LkJfKjY5_ZbAiIrkDtkiTOCCMrVlCUnijYGBh8k7hZXZm_QWhJ1FVGPb3RIydoX4WUm2hVIyPjCz4XdmTL3ku1EyJQHTw7cAuBQdVX-S9AnWDR1yGPHse-NrNNo7LayPt-Blo1H0E_2nj9dc9akma1rVQsDqzBsC8PpJRwcOlhV4v2ZDfg-Qt7wLM1S4sNoV3Zlicj9MkJ4AvbaP4awbthw-p3o-4DO-pAqJINWTM37p9bRR3sAiyt_xI7P7LAuTfM-7W4uwyNnEbCyUUr9xCk0WbqxqBmjXcxFixyOmoy2u4O7VZcEZbnA1QpFp7OxIAY-OV0U2GG3pFtzSqdqzlsrt11ByvXYUBy6d9QuoKfpWkYtXYeWqG_i-083iFDvbfSnyBBREbjPDUd3ExZd98-9p_lj0E1vEYzP7acfcN/B3ydpYTavA8hl2SWYbRj997I6GXYY1Qi/7)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/QkwgTnz0msE2ScFBrZvCGQnKQBV6rfBskVMiERTt08im9y8UZuI3okSZoaNsK1BovLBRCf7Wx8Z_3CaxIhZQVZO3w7xRJQ_bWTMQqafg7h7uaIiapOQithHaLG0ifvw1-912f4xxeRjiqv7ToyMzxZ9vAifNi_oWDclSDNGtzCtJMluYQ1pn65gMcMHehRI2jIo9T8tqQEy4fVNtQ8fIcbNFvb9CvnHafNDlqULB5bC158ulx7ui0DMO-mo_XfdhHZReKM9YyAuGl9mqf-xlwxwQnmc73vpmt9RUtvxH6CBn43s4oSENt_I6q-NYi9emRuWH4tmp3Ri3ooLhsnNMdIa1v5kDCuKRcNsWSHjLg-kqXhkL6oyDjZbmr3720YsvcA6zUA0qO9P3GC5QVzquygzf4z7qhfEFivRqa2CAzDOBe_UskfyIRDLRLatri8GGddMnBW4vFKD3xh5ORYsAL2l7/sbcP-2WP-monIVDN-I4BhOXcNhMe7f2x/7) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/a1xqP_4PU_9AJGEQl682nKRihjgTc20plNtHgRM8jAlTCL50QZXclZNWHrMn1ZiyRpY-fVLLrp_XSEwNw_uiuo7ix5sdtgUR81s1PeYrNiz9d9Q3VEHq5gMCqcoOugBET6er2ys0lwNFrfxWi61Ek7c9vc8KHXZnozFHRwzMeubs65LaD3b0a-Cu5rbDG4Oxe9K7NMXW3jIhNzo86EPUsGyTcHTibwAHKRBOvJMLjnOJLMCVm0oUcZsVvaX3c7vNS_-7yZihqafppkdMf75bcWna7IbI2qUrp3mtj6hYdBmpXzQB8yXlP2B3Z4cev5uxnlBK12aCBH4H9mXzCDsWll4o0-9vVQYxOYMD5yHk1a4uol8MaBT9_75MRA7u9SgS1JcaDcRyUGyeWiejpNmrAR61xLfBgzmeEh_0Q6xUGUtBh_8csUNVDa8YUKD1JkmCapweXFbtawYntoW61lHZ844E/4jt8BpbsaKtTiTRMF2pZwWivuu7hy-az/7)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/E4R9ABo0vjv5oAQKuaR6O4HjQlfEWCnhjGPr77MQmfGbW4wKAFCuJQf7aFrsz-J4a_mxAAtO13PveAuGfTrUOg95ZuL7J8QDyJUQ-VuN6VQOu638dUc-dUAqh82NHvg7IrUpc-s6fD-_RS3iwZftSGVntIeLdHmCjVsYF8l09B8XAeRrYPCQdcG43tuZNONP_kgUfQh8IfbGkgn0LOZJxyt7Nxxxdd9KQYp-rjHrdLV5lDh3VNfy63ic955t2mtWMMN44m6UghYHBLQ9bzVWXV9lrz1hb_jZl09FQBkBnNttceIFXJzU-z0nyBbzfzu-CaF9jndRnlgXNMGGIPOl0yKFrA1N5eT80s34Mj722WHgSsM7aAP7DiZYWqeCt9Que-6K84ECd3gYqz9PUE45GwdlX8eBI3TCboTu1JqQ4rlYrZMX_EdtDznaZqVxGLIvxPDbIbsvyqTLK6w0n1xKj0KL/jvkLMpy_NqQws__1FZgKj1-Lbek4j1k-/7)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.

Sincerely,

clean_body: Please – for the sake of all our families | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. Hi Peter — it's Caroline Edwards Nickel. I want to share with you why I’m so proud of my husband, Wiley, and the decision he’s made to run for U.S. Senate. Wiley and I have always believed in the power of hard work and doing what’s right for others. Since the day we met, his commitment to doing what is right, _no matter what_ , has inspired me. From his work as a White House staffer under President Obama to his service in the North Carolina State Senate _and_ the U.S. House of Representatives, Wiley has always fought for what’s best for working families. Now, he’s ready to take that fight back to Washington. **This race is personal for us.** When Wiley was just 18, he lost his father to cancer — the man who shaped his passion for public service. His father, a farmer, taught him the value of hard work and the importance of making a positive impact. That’s why Wiley has spent his life fighting for affordable healthcare, securing better pay for teachers, and defending the rights of every North Carolinian. But at this moment especially, our state needs a leader who isn’t afraid to break from the business as usual in Washington and take on special interests, billionaires, and extremists — unlike Thom Tillis, who caves to pressure from the far right _at every turn._ We cannot continue down the same beaten path if we want to win this seat and flip the Senate — it’s time to forge a new way forward. And we need people like you, Peter, who are ready for Wiley’s bold, people-first leadership in North Carolina. [**If you also believe that North Carolina deserves a fighter in Washington who will stop at nothing to deliver the change that we desperately need, would you consider becoming a Founding Donor to Wiley’s campaign for Senate? **Closing the curtains on my campaign.**

I'm at my wits' end, Peter.

The Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their war chest.

Now they're raising $50 MILLION to flip my seat blue.

In 2024, I was outspent 3 to 1 by the Democrats trying to buy my seat, and the DC Democrat machine has _**already**_ pledged even more against my reelection.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will we lose my House seat, Republicans WILL lose the House. It'll be Democrats impeaching Trump and stonewalling the AMERICA FIRST agenda all over again.
**[Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/Jqv2e9nV5mqAVIryrjmojdu_30KazWitXZBFkCwOX1jVfCYQB--jIGStw0qAVWCRi0GHjTIC1DS6OLS3qF2-pU35H43U2nO5sx_zizIF4quQmZQZlQ6LXwOYSffGKa_rQ2mon97acZUEQYbOgHMcml3jsIYDJ28JMKZujYlTJ_GtyxZ1cWJAPJRxDl13AsJV8EbxRpWE6G2eFkhyafB1o07QOaaA2HcLTd-eUOVzrHwYCZ0kT_74dj3P4qVe3E3gFEcCoDiASWW-EVoK72frsL2KsfKzjCPNh5Ua2coXyKGCXkm0T_VMD0-Qt_m_BvRTWm_AxqMMvGe336ZBlkOTegYolk-Zk9xpcGUrz0baiG02jfGZq2FZOaEE81o43jqHgABl2-gPDqh1EligubYPSWTy7k0O43mF9-ABtl2ws5WPCJD9MvRkZx_S9R34oY7QP0si6MyablEGwp2sYjWS-ifpIOfRsfx0U7hBnKVrSYJ8Hqe8etXuWmk/UrjHFe7y_D_MXgh8lMr7os3S1kcud3sZ/7 "Peter, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's first Secretary of the Interior and I was a ground forces commander at SEAL Team 6.")**
_**In 2022, I led the team of Navy SEALs that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in our party.**_

If the Democrats destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

_**[But if you can chip in just $5 right now](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/x0ug7P6x6y-f5Lbs-abLSO3VBJd5GEBT6XTQzV6I474KeP5yD2aPdOsDylDzmJTO7QvI2YTiLwmch5oSzuM35L7x3QRovQ-zBqa9RVdxwsNmW7ET97l0TOABbMmuT7gHgCeLWtKRfy0aw5NAOYFyHjjZOou18h5aB4rbkg7kqxqjTR0N8T_AnRY1kDWaUM_bB-D8bdVOqchzaCWGLHqLUgTTCzOxB8a4ISAgjNiBf9uYgvU4ZyxpApjhDDaGG1_O0jdgXCY6Nbi5Mz3G-63QHDg-tpoilHzzghsMPcdT76Quo_J26m17jM-_L8earY41BHu0KNmDbYb311UVpGLTGzkuHB-bizM5zRlD7X-pzcSIs-ghjqoOjpPK9XBXYgjUvDWx7oABEK_fxD5e5UgUg-V3P_RnWSoa6bjydMgdyNAOHNjwkPc40ynuXsg6qGLbM4yGPQtiStFES09sAsEc8tRLFoTpc47iqYY2e0kaaw-ATcEPWpluJZQ/VRkF7njoIDLCOV17MkIj1EQWAyDM9WsS/7 "But if you can chip in just $5 right now")**_ , I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation my entire life, will you help me out?

_****_

subject: God led me to share my story with the world — warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/65Gfng3H1ZJS0sDVllewQP05-maIbVrwik0NUTVSz6ycwPlX4KeAPgG-HffPfI00mXrHXfzeAMxYm8ZGdSMFh9w8Kx_UqILTg_KEBeG1JDn8-BZeRXCe1DMp0QvYAeW3R5eNXZQWm0cBnlZcA3HUzhiSy2i_mCd_98SgM5QnEk8h8LAUvleCtt1a_FI_KYbF5dLWGCz4-IQrrb8lAfdbqFem3wmUGVMpSvqeskU4Mjp0q0KrBNq4dcJ7ZAE86kBeNMhTF0pV-cW1WR4JE3CvXcJbgOAD8BqVpRyZrhgKMmJk_g4A9ar377l3_ylg8BFmm5aC-sRTFF25B_ocf-xRbuOwk8jS6wCxFjoYzCzH_25xcLCl4tjLGhONXwTnvkJ-uIRQKY40yI-d-LFk_mHbaigNlIvusUZoawImxzvto7MDYHysJ3aFJR8gsswWVAeV6XZ9PnmsZr7XMxC-2EdHJMD5uOZcjHiuhV6o85v94Q/oNv0Tou7QHevxcn_d9iZvK-bjpTrm2sQ/7 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/W9eCCaZLdWI8ignfWir6szG-D5zrhlBQPYHshIWnWVgOVwSh5qwRpVWxWTKrqwqGvl1UBuQzNQoDCAUeTHfxDpA-NZhbGc4HuH0P2kzro_CySyOM7Ns3mkAjeBeSXPO79SW81JnDhcChWG03kUpPlh_LFmEvb9EPlBl8-Tjtv4HQ9JrSmi_Cb9t6UIynOgVU5PJY7_BTwxQJ8BfG3-JhShDvfi7l9mMewL5JT0-n4GeYWY3g22GvXh4UWtC183SqnpC9WNK5zdNLkDHxl3X6Cw1zHGbLjdVHUTt4Gcr_JCWoQ_qZNnaDTxptu-LWdWj5sLvhiCaESdTQy8WRWghaFaTtheYW8AdYKJuE689hoolLD6Hj1u6UJc6Zrf-tfmeNPdC7AwjCX4qZS-mAVdnzmJPnE3TrNVmLZgGuAHf4WEO7rVrFAyAHLzCS0wW4mQUazZsFk79gO3xUXdMCHqpX6Zd4fcG5BzqYIULtBRxxIw/LQgNzpuMP6UM66WHd5yAAed53Gjfq6QO/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/FqTd3SF_GL-xGYFO7VrRX3m8HJRcr8ET-eH8eEAkblcQF2I4QI2xs1EcZ3hORDVyqOu-8ZMOjmFkXtyknzP3EYecdFp-2BAv0m4N4qtkZct6M6SZMu-uVEuZ78_unctDaz57LyK7qCftlffM64FpB22yHKAhfJGp2E26cLoCYpwytX9ppNkDYb1ZOFJBkOsSDKr-jG-TqLD6b8ksNehQ8ohlrcX-FERCjFBoFMHeWVijrSOwusjcw6Vu29OjNcz-SFXpbM5tQTrVO45nglJpZbJjiQoufMC-OnAHq7_clicIR8-UN3j-95He_Z7Re2-o3Uw12ohj7MfitOb9SF4341HTQy545lmA1Sulga5bJBuJU38ReDiJqRaLgXk7z11BVDQ7XIIFPEXHA4IKmn7l1BfzZypWdnZUn2woc_Q-RvLDUMSjopNWbVDf7ZOFKgYKbnU77X4PKcwSTEMx1kNpuJpog99MlH4katTXy-7Sdw/0ydibxdIXhvg59CTM3KYSl5blcF8efs2/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/tMXA6gGbC4Vj_xwbMr6yN8PzePHqdh7oxlUW98MAvqdch9u3iC_rwN9gOvxeTWNc3KFVQg3YCBvJHKJhkT4oyRYgt89icsISIOZmkg69j8RqIlfUCQk_UwgFSvkhHpS2RJOu216m1tnz9jk7uAH0ZBF20DG_9Q9eLw5HF5higqdCLr9FmaBiY7DjKpsN7QAa66bXcxPus-vhoIPjylE3pkrOyBKAtrQxEtjNXycmENe2EGDUpCW3OmwBZDUQkqtRxYLZUJ8iTFfLJatJEeId4ylmd5iZs-9xoA5yS6_Ap-w3XF58-zIvx2DQaIdBCoLnWH_nRJT9Wclct9UCag7l20tb9tQzwQU-wJK8h9kfh1DyJDPPG1__QgWlWFWs4zWvMfHPuv8UNinB8lgP6TwbJ9WwuwmYHZMKQeRGalSEOlrCkhesbuqNxUQM58d52oHVVZgxVHbWHAdG3V0KByq3wnf9AmeY1JHmRZoVgWbfUA/x5t09Wi9DRteggCd5NCsHv-h4nwNo61j/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. | Peter, it’s Democrat Blake Gendebien. Blue Amp Action said I could reach out with an update on our race in NY-21. Last month, the Administration withdrew Elise Stefanik’s nomination to be the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations. It’s clear: they are scared. They’ve seen what we’ve been able to accomplish in just a few months. Thousands of grassroots donors have stepped up to help send a dairy farmer to Congress, and voters across the North Country are ready to elect a leader who will actually fight for them. Our opponents know we had a real shot at winning this race, so they’re keeping Elise Stefanik in Congress to help them cut Social Security, Medicaid, and Medicare and give more tax cuts to billionaires. But, Peter, I’m not giving up. It doesn’t matter who I’m running against or when the election might be – I’m still committed to representing the community that raised me. [As we get ready for next November, I need your support to continue moving forward. Will you split a donation between me and Blue Amp Action today to help us prepare for what’s ahead?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a71d194-4ca5-4704-a697-5fa8ad5c2d96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08c8bce0-a8fd-456b-88e7-e7f7bf24e49f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Office of the Governor
subject: ✅ Wrapping Up a Historic Session
body:
Responding to Crisis with Courage
---
| | | | | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/ZvkO8MsfoPfJhA5bk0-92M5mn1eLQpgbLGHFttm2TC0=400)
---
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-signs-legislation-to-strengthen-maryland%25e2%2580%2599s-workforce.aspx/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/r_WhT0yeJDtghAej27rIZVgBKayBeOfrZnYy5MWY3GY=400)
---
My fellow Marylanders,
Over the last 90 days, we faced an historic budget challenge and watched chaos unfold in Washington, D.C. But in Annapolis, we answered crisis with courage.
**We laid out 3 objectives in January:**
1. Modernize the tax code to give middle-class families tax relief;
2. Grow our economy and diversify off Washington, D.C.; and
3. Invest in our people.

At a time when middle-class families need a break, we made sure that **94% of Marylanders will either get a tax cut or see no changes in their taxes**.
At a time when the federal government is trying to eliminate the Department of Education and gut funding for schools from Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore – including schools that teach students with special needs – **we delivered the largest single investment in K-12 education in the history of our state**.
And as Elon Musk’s DOGE continues to lay off thousands of public servants, **we have preserved record funding for local law enforcement** and helped our federal workers find new opportunities in state government and the private sector.
Maryland is mobilizing. We’re working to grow this state. We’re working to protect your rights. And while we’re willing to work with anyone, we will never compromise when it comes to protecting you.
Let’s continue to answer crisis with courage.
Your Governor,
Wes Moore
| | [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2FPages%2Fhome.aspx/2/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/wT0d7K74aI8VKm0qGdbdsw8a3j0nBnxzSbTElESXuZs=400)
---
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2F7TLfHKTJVOA/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/xFnTl_h6I-9NPLiSAI2iLfRMsgOkTwt9Yhse9BHTGnI=400)
### [**🔴 WATCH: Our Latest Recap**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2F7TLfHKTJVOA/2/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/N37VRoOr0sXtoB3-qp6NvWE9-6dGFLgXdgUGUoUFg1w=400)

Partnering to make prescription drugs more affordable, welcoming new job growth, working with our county partners and Work For America to help displaced federal public servants – **this is what mobilizing for the people of Maryland looks like**.
---
[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2FX5k1gROqmyo/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/INOFuWBHoEbx62yjR6747d5gGJZRB4a_LmHOV_RSNTQ=400)
### [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-celebrates-the-formation-of-the-enough-alliance-and-100-million-dollar-philanthropic-investment-to-end-child.aspx/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/lS1jj5knRqPfdvnDw9RK6N1EM8ZJiUhA82lGU0d2bBg=400)[**🖊️ What We Delivered this Session**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2FX5k1gROqmyo/2/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/_hEs2IpCDThspUIMknKFpbsK7VcSbjCZBKJiFIhKB9k=400)

In our first bill signing, I signed into law legislation that continues our work of supporting workers and middle-class families, including the **RAISE Act** and the **Model Employer Act.** [_View the livestream here_](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=622TTXxSQ0c/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/JYrzo5jx7Quu1cfMnT297Tf5xZ1Z79R72jZorinipcA=400) _._
---
| [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fshorts%2FklfmGlLbfss/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/HcwvFS09_LaNkSlwEQMC0CUZsdwLFLlRArLjUi-caMc=400)
### [**Leading our International**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-to-lead-international-trade-and-investment-mission-to-japan-and-south-korea.aspx/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/RL2E1UPDtGTeuNcvBhLsY0yNYVul8oBusyBaxXiXFcY=400)
### [**Trade and Investment Mission**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2Fpages%2Fgovernor-moore-to-lead-international-trade-and-investment-mission-to-japan-and-south-korea.aspx/2/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/GwRYDspcBo03KznQlti1XqVlODx-52-wWroOQ6P86eo=400)

Our trade and investment mission couldn’t come at a more significant time. The federal government’s recent actions, including massive funding cuts, could impact Maryland’s economic health.

Japan and South Korea are two of Maryland's closest trade partners, and we need to build on that strong foundation to identify new areas of common interest and mutual benefit. [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/XiWxBwNlT-MIyMaVGTNcvkx4xSjTXwN4ktm3GGZUpT8=400) | | |
## [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwtop.com%2Fmaryland%2F2025%2F01%2Fmaryland-enshrines-access-to-abortion-in-state-constitution-after-voters-approve-amendment%2F/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/zNTntZLFoxMW1VcU742fQiEn8Ezufut1SJYq2xW8ykU=400)[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.mymcmedia.org%2Fin-state-of-the-state-gov-moore-pledges-to-shrink-deficit-grow-maryland%2F/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/faE0nqYFJKFOjswNarjEcvXtZQy-15zdB40gCWMMNtc=400)**[**Maryland Gov. Wes Moore says tariffs on Canada, Mexico are deeply problematic for Port of Baltimore**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cbsnews.com%2Fbaltimore%2Fnews%2Fmaryland-port-baltimore-tariffs-wes-moore-canada-mexico%2F/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/H8Scmrr32EVYRUrHDmOcoabW1YDF62tedx6shqWD7bw=400)**

The Port of Baltimore, one of the nation's busiest port facilities, supports thousands of local jobs and brings in billions of dollars worth of goods, especially car parts and produce, according to Maryland economists.
---|---|---
| |
## [**Maryland AG sues Trump administration over delays, cuts to NIH grant funding**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwtop.com%2Fmaryland%2F2025%2F04%2Fmaryland-ag-sues-trump-administration-over-delays-cuts-to-nih-grant-funding%2F/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/q_NQ31rqsckZY7QHH2ncPRWVE82vviIDHwiv7jZdLhU=400)

Billions of dollars from the NIH’s budget go toward funding studies and programs at universities, hospitals and other research groups. The agency’s grants support hundreds of thousands of jobs every year and have generated more than $94 billion in new economic activity in 2024 alone.
---|---|---
| |
## [](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fmocoshow.com%2F2024%2F10%2F16%2Fmaryland-secures-13-9-million-in-federal-funding-to-boost-workforce-development-for-individuals-with-disabilities%2F/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/CAiNmjwzPrSqcJOcIaTsPJt1EcrF1uSZbc7FXHQhwNg=400)**[](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.cbsnews.com%2Fbaltimore%2Fnews%2Fopioid-fatal-overdose-decline-maryland%2F/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/Zel9PhsGcpjvN3WILOu0QvR5zjvPZKS_hTdCPO3M_p0=400)**[**Maryland is 2024’s 6th Most Innovative State**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwallethub.com%2Fedu%2Fmost-innovative-states%2F31890/1/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/DYej-67ERL97ynEoemVd9DehUcrQ9aRPETUstR4l70A=400)****

In order to recognize the nation’s biggest contributors, WalletHub compared the 50 states and the District of Columbia across 25 key indicators of innovation-friendliness.
---|---|---
| [**More News**](https://links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fgovernor.maryland.gov%2Fnews%2Fpress%2FPages%2Fdefault.aspx/2/01000196211173b3-fcd1467d-8034-4ff4-a301-8da9e5f1af40-000000/_tpsj3NKqEnMBuFGg5X5w4tnMHUtqCSohkUNMYQVVj4=400)

clean_body: Responding to Crisis with Courage | | | | | | | My fellow Marylanders, Over the last 90 days, we faced an historic budget challenge and watched chaos unfold in Washington, D.C. But in Annapolis, we answered crisis with courage. We laid out 3 objectives in January: 1. Modernize the tax code to give middle-class families tax relief; 2. Grow our economy and diversify off Washington, D.C.; and 3. Invest in our people. At a time when middle-class families need a break, we made sure that 94% of Marylanders will either get a tax cut or see no changes in their taxes. At a time when the federal government is trying to eliminate the Department of Education and gut funding for schools from Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore – including schools that teach students with special needs – we delivered the largest single investment in K-12 education in the history of our state. And as Elon Musk’s DOGE continues to lay off thousands of public servants, we have preserved record funding for local law enforcement and helped our federal workers find new opportunities in state government and the private sector. Maryland is mobilizing. We’re working to grow this state. We’re working to protect your rights. And while we’re willing to work with anyone, we will never compromise when it comes to protecting you. Let’s continue to answer crisis with courage. Your Governor, Wes Moore | | | Partnering to make prescription drugs more affordable, welcoming new job growth, working with our county partners and Work For America to help displaced federal public servants – this is what mobilizing for the people of Maryland looks like. In our first bill signing, I signed into law legislation that continues our work of supporting workers and middle-class families, including the RAISE Act and the Model Employer Act. . | Our trade and investment mission couldn’t come at a more significant time. The federal government’s recent actions, including massive funding cuts, could impact Maryland’s economic health. Japan and South Korea are two of Maryland's closest trade partners, and we need to build on that strong foundation to identify new areas of common interest and mutual benefit. | | | The Port of Baltimore, one of the nation's busiest port facilities, supports thousands of local jobs and brings in billions of dollars worth of goods, especially car parts and produce, according to Maryland economists. ---|---|--- | | Billions of dollars from the NIH’s budget go toward funding studies and programs at universities, hospitals and other research groups. The agency’s grants support hundreds of thousands of jobs every year and have generated more than $94 billion in new economic activity in 2024 alone. ---|---|--- | | ** In order to recognize the nation’s biggest contributors, WalletHub compared the 50 states and the District of Columbia across 25 key indicators of innovation-friendliness. ---|---|--- | | Update your subscriptions, modify your password or email address, or unsubscribe . *

body:
| |
---
Every time one of Musk’s companies lands a government contract, their stock value increases. And when that happens? So does Marjorie’s net worth. | [View in browser](https://ymwvegw.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NDI1MzUsXCJsXCI6MTUxMzIyMDYzODI2NTg1NDE4LFwiclwiOjE1MTMyMjExNTk0OTIwMTIxMH0iLCJzIjoiMTBlOTRlYjBkYTFlMWIzZCJ9)

|

Peter,

You probably remember when Donald Trump basically filmed a commercial for Elon Musk’s car company on the White House lawn.**

But here’s what you _didn’t_ see:**
|
---
| [ ](https://ymwvegw.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NDI1MzUsXCJsXCI6MTUxMzIyMDYzODM3MDcxMTgxLFwiclwiOjE1MTMyMjExNTk0OTIwMTIxMH0iLCJzIjoiZjJkNWM2MjkwZGQ3NTdkNSJ9)
---
|
---
Right before that stunt, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene — who sits on the committee that oversees Musk’s DOGE initiative — **bought more Tesla stock**.

Every time one of Musk’s companies lands a government contract, their stock value increases. And when that happens? So does Marjorie’s net worth.

That’s not public service. _That’s self-dealing_.

Members of Congress are elected to work for the people. But too many are just working for their own bank accounts. We started Ban the Trade PAC to expose this kind of corruption and stop it at the source.****
|
---
**_[We’re fighting to ban congressional stock trading and hold the worst offenders accountable. And we need your help to keep building. Connor**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105603603/538787864/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWEwMjhkMi0zZjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L7IPXhSb0Nw_t0QI8VYaFxAjVnwlHPhr7vx-MsZ9kFA=) I know there’s a lot of chaos surrounding us right now. clean_body: This can’t wait any longer | Marsha Blackburn here, fellow Patriot. I've been holding off messaging you, but this can’t wait any longer. Although it may not seem urgent to you now, the 2026 midterm elections will come a lot sooner than you think - and the midterms are always the toughest for the party IN power. I'm working with NRSC Chairman Tim Scott to rally supporters RIGHT NOW to guarantee that we will come out on top - with our Senate Republicans at the helm ready to push forward the MAGA agenda! But we desperately need to know if you are come the midterms! We can't let the Radical Left catch us slipping. Although things are looking like they are in our favor, this does NOT guarantee us a win in 2026. The tides can still turn, especially in states with open seats! We need every steadfast conservative to for our GOP to evaluate where we need to rally more support. We cannot afford to have this many patriots unverified, especially when the Dems decide to hit us full force. Together, we will not only secure President Trump's MAGA agenda, but we shall secure and maintain a Republican Senate majority for years to come. name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: About Derrick Van Orden:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Yes, these are real headlines.
Peter,
Western Wisconsin needs someone in D.C. who can get things done.
That can’t be said about my opponent and our current incumbent Derrick Van Orden. And before you ask, yes, these are all real headlines:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87422?refcode=em20250410-8876&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8876%2E614464%2Ee1f1Uz)
**[If you are sick and tired of seeing extremists keep their seats while only getting headlines like these, please split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots today. Van Orden is vulnerable, and our chances of unseat him are better than ever headed into the 2026 midterm.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87422?refcode=em20250410-8876&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8876%2E614464%2Ee1f1Uz)**
**[Donate $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87422?refcode=em20250410-8876&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8876%2E614464%2Ee1f1Uz)**
At a time when our district, our farmers, small businesses, and veterans are all struggling, Van Orden is _still_ making more headlines for his unhinged, inappropriate antics than actually helping our district as a legislator.
Just take this line from _The Bulwark:_
_“Of the thirty-two bills and resolutions Van Orden sponsored in the 118th U.S. Congress (2023–24), exactly none became law; just three bills passed the GOP-controlled House before dying in the Senate.. a legislative titan he is not._ **_Despite this sorry record, Van Orden has nonetheless managed to make a name for himself in Congress... crudest, meanest, dumbest, and most obnoxious.”_**
---
In the past month alone, he’s called local town hall participants Nazis and threatened online commenters to fight him.
Maybe this is why Van Orden relies on dark money instead of grassroots support. And over the past few months, Van Orden has been cozying up to Elon Musk and his elite buddies – threatening career retaliation over anyone critical of Musk or this administration.
**[Van Orden is NOT working for us, and we have a shot to elect a real, Wisconsin-first leader to Congress – but I can’t do it without your help. Will you split a donation of $10, or whatever you can, between Heartland Patriots and our campaign to send Derrick Van Orden packing?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87422?refcode=em20250410-8876&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8876%2E614464%2Ee1f1Uz)**
