clean_body: Yes, these are real headlines. Peter, Western Wisconsin needs someone in D.C. who can get things done. That can’t be said about my opponent and our current incumbent Derrick Van Orden. And before you ask, yes, these are all real headlines: At a time when our district, our farmers, small businesses, and veterans are all struggling, Van Orden is still making more headlines for his unhinged, inappropriate antics than actually helping our district as a legislator. Just take this line from The Bulwark: “Of the thirty-two bills and resolutions Van Orden sponsored in the 118th U.S. Congress (2023–24), exactly none became law; just three bills passed the GOP-controlled House before dying in the Senate.. a legislative titan he is not. Despite this sorry record, Van Orden has nonetheless managed to make a name for himself in Congress... crudest, meanest, dumbest, and most obnoxious.” In the past month alone, he’s called local town hall participants Nazis and threatened online commenters to fight him. Maybe this is why Van Orden relies on dark money instead of grassroots support. And over the past few months, Van Orden has been cozying up to Elon Musk and his elite buddies – threatening career retaliation over anyone critical of Musk or this administration. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I appreciate your support, Peter. Rebecca | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

body:
Show your support for public lands — before it’s too late.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1260%2E400544%2EMw8ST4)
**This is your LAST chance to claim your limited-edition _Protect Public Lands_ sticker** and show that you're standing strong against Trump’s attacks on the lands we all love.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250410_1_sticker?amount=5&refcode=em20250410-1260&refcode2=1260_400544_Mw8ST4&akid=1260%2E400544%2EMw8ST4)
If Donald Trump and his billionaire friends get their way, our public lands could be handed over to private developers and Big Oil.
**We can’t let that happen. These places belong to all of us.**
Governors are now the first line of defense. And Deb is ready to fight back — just like she did as Secretary of the Interior.
**As New Mexico’s next governor, Deb will bring the same fierce leadership to protect our lands and preserve our environment for future generations.**
**[But we can’t do it without you. Donate any amount to our campaign before midnight to claim your sticker before they’re all gone.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250410_1_sticker?amount=5&refcode=em20250410-1260&refcode2=1260_400544_Mw8ST4&akid=1260%2E400544%2EMw8ST4)**

Together, we can protect our public lands and build a future rooted in justice, sustainability, and respect for the Earth.
Team Deb

name: 30,000 Signatures Needed [FFR]
subject: PBS and Sesame Street under attack
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g) **_THIS IS OUTRAGEOUS._** [**" Sesame Street's Future Is in Jeopardy"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=3&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=4&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g) **Elon Musk and Marjorie Taylor Greene are fighting to defund programs like Sesame Street,_PBS_ , and _NPR_.** They're claiming that Sesame Street brainwashes viewers and children with "communist" agendas and promotes "anti-American" views.

**We refuse to let _PBS_ and Sesame Street get cancelled by the GOP's extremist agenda.**

[**_We need you and every other person reading this email to sign our Emergency Petition. Help us gather 30,000 signatures before 9:00 AM EST tomorrow >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=5&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g) | [SIGN THE EMERGENCY PETITION ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=6&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g)
---
It's critically important we fight back. **_If we fail:_**

**-> FIRST:** Millions of Americans would lose access to educational and news programming.

**-> SECOND:** Beloved programs like Sesame Street and Curious George and local sports coverage would be SHUT DOWN.

**-> THIRD:** The GOP's hateful, anti-journalist agenda will gain momentum. Their lies about 'propaganda' inside public programming will continue dividing our country.

A top executive at _PBS_ put it perfectly: _" There's nothing more American than _PBS _. "_

We know that many Americans agree with us that we can't let the GOP's political games result in us losing educational staples like Sesame Street. **But agreeing isn 't enough, we need you to sign our emergency petition.**

[**_SIGN NOW: Add your name to our emergency petition calling on Congress to protect _PBS_ and programs like Sesame Street._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=7&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g)
[SIGN THE EMERGENCY PETITION ->](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=8&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g)
---

[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60546?t=9&akid=22988%2E4449941%2E10ny3g)
Hurry,

Fight for Reform
_PBS_ is not associated or affiliated with Fight for Reform and has not sponsored or approved of this communication.

We refuse to let PBS and Sesame Street get cancelled by the GOP's extremist agenda. | It's critically important we fight back. If we fail: -> FIRST: Millions of Americans would lose access to educational and news programming. -> SECOND: Beloved programs like Sesame Street and Curious George and local sports coverage would be SHUT DOWN. -> THIRD: The GOP's hateful, anti-journalist agenda will gain momentum. Their lies about 'propaganda' inside public programming will continue dividing our country. A top executive at PBS put it perfectly: " There's nothing more American than PBS . " We know that many Americans agree with us that we can't let the GOP's political games result in us losing educational staples like Sesame Street. But agreeing isn 't enough, we need you to sign our emergency petition. body:
And most Republicans seem happy to stand by and let him do it. But they have plenty to say about passing billionaire tax cuts!
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105605491/538794595/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDIyMWY1ZS00NjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdpbH6dt1Jzq5J3OcSfytYeS5nBaPiWrfgPRO8UCtx0=&emci=1fdf63f6-2916-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cd221f5e-4616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)

| | **Donald Trump is taking a wrecking ball to our economy with his tariffs**. Meanwhile, most Republicans seem happy to stand by and let him do it.**Republicans have the power to stop these tariffs in their tracks, but most are choosing to sit by and let the chips fall where they may.** Trump announced a sweeping set of tariffs last week. And even though he's paused some of them (after sending financial markets into turmoil), Trump's reckless acts are on track to drive up the price of everyday goods that Americans buy and have accelerated fears of a recession. **He's treating the pocketbooks and livelihoods of the middle class like pawns in a political game, all while he pressures Congress to pass another round of tax cuts for billionaires.** So far, Republican leaders in Congress have little to say about containing the damage caused by the tariffs. But, when asked, they have plenty to say about passing billionaire tax cuts. **The American people see right through this misplaced set of priorities.** They are showing up in record numbers – at town halls, at rallies, at the ballot box in special elections – to DEMAND that Republicans show a bit of spine and stop an out-of-control President from sabotaging our country further. Congress has the power to pass legislation _today_ that would roll back the President's authority to levy tariffs without oversight. **I urge Republicans in the House and Senate to bring such a bill to a vote — we cannot let their cowardice continue.** [**Will you join me? name: Tobias Read
subject: I’m proud to be an Oregonian today.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250410em-proud [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250410em-proud]
Hi, it’s Tobias Read, Oregon Secretary of State.
I'm proud to be an Oregonian today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250407em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250410em-proud [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250410em-proud]
As your Secretary of State, I am responsible for ensuring Oregon’s elections are run freely and fairly and protecting voting rights from bad-faith actors seeking to undermine our democracy.
That’s why I was proud to see so many people stand up for our democracy in the face of this assault on voting.
And that’s why it’s so important that we have elected officials who are serious stewards of government.
I’m committed to being that kind of leader for our state, but I’m counting on your continued support to keep up my fight against these attacks on our democracy. Can you chip in any amount straight away? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250410em-proud]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250410em-proud]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

name: Team Schrier
subject: Healthcare should never depend on your ZIP code
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
NBC Right Now: Washington State Rep. Kim Schrier champions rural health access with new grant extension bill [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105606420/538797906/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU1MjUyZC00OTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=254B3sLqFQtkSwKMof46xAIZ1eFDrZjGzGo5PQ0gDj4=&emci=1fc974ed-2516-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4a55252d-4916-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

Have you seen the latest work from Kim?

She just introduced a measure in Congress that would extend key federal grants to enhance rural healthcare access.

In Washington’s Eighth District, access to healthcare isn’t a given. Here’s what Kim said about fighting for these essential benefits:
_**“The Eighth District is nearly 10,000 square miles, with many of my constituents living in rural communities that depend on a scarce number of medical providers in their area. In Congress, I’m focused on supporting rural health care to ensure that Americans can get care close to home...”**
-Kim Schrier_
Right now, too many of our neighbors live in rural communities where medical providers are few and far between. And in an emergency, driving hours for care isn’t just inconvenient—**it’s dangerous**.

As both a doctor and representative, Kim knows how crucial it is to have reliable care close to home. **That’s why she introduced this bipartisan measure** —to ensure communities across our district have the kind of lifelines they depend on.

These grants don’t just keep the lights on. **They save lives.**

But here’s the truth: Making progress like this depends on having leaders in Congress who understand what’s at stake. Kim is proud to be that voice for our healthcare providers and for the folks across Washington State who deserve access to timely, quality care. **[She's ready to keep fighting for every family in WA-08. Will you chip in so Kim can keep up her critical work?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105606428/538797912/-782864167?refcode=em25_250410_rurhea_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250410_rurhea_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=4a55252d-4916-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&refcode2=4a55252d-4916-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU1MjUyZC00OTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=254B3sLqFQtkSwKMof46xAIZ1eFDrZjGzGo5PQ0gDj4=)**

clean_body: NBC Right Now: Washington State Rep. Kim Schrier champions rural health access with new grant extension bill Peter, Have you seen the latest work from Kim? She just introduced a measure in Congress that would extend key federal grants to enhance rural healthcare access. In Washington’s Eighth District, access to healthcare isn’t a given. Here’s what Kim said about fighting for these essential benefits: “The Eighth District is nearly 10,000 square miles, with many of my constituents living in rural communities that depend on a scarce number of medical providers in their area. In Congress, I’m focused on supporting rural health care to ensure that Americans can get care close to home...” -Kim Schrier Right now, too many of our neighbors live in rural communities where medical providers are few and far between. And in an emergency, driving hours for care isn’t just inconvenient—it’s dangerous. As both a doctor and representative, Kim knows how crucial it is to have reliable care close to home. That’s why she introduced this bipartisan measure —to ensure communities across our district have the kind of lifelines they depend on. These grants don’t just keep the lights on. They save lives. But here’s the truth: Making progress like this depends on having leaders in Congress who understand what’s at stake. Kim is proud to be that voice for our healthcare providers and for the folks across Washington State who deserve access to timely, quality care. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: VoteVets
subject: House Republicans just passed the SAVE Act. If it becomes law, it will disenfranchise Military voters.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump and Elon’s agenda is overwhelmingly unpopular. We’ve got the GOP on their heels right now. And now — like clockwork — Republicans are desperate to make it harder for people to vote.
#
Trump and Elon’s agenda is overwhelmingly unpopular. We’ve got the GOP on their heels.
And now — like clockwork — Republicans are desperate to make it harder for people to vote.
Republicans in the House passed the SAVE Act today, under the guise of election security. It’s a blatant effort to make it harder for people to register to vote and cast their ballot. And if it becomes law, it’s going to impact Veterans, Military Families, and Active Duty.
SAVE would require all voters, including Military voters, to present very specific proof of US citizenship — either a passport or a birth certificate — in person at a government office in the United States to register or update their voter registration. Military IDs and service records are not enough proof to register. It would ban automatic, online, and mail in registration.
How might all of that impact Troops deployed overseas, their spouses, or disabled Veterans who can’t get to an office? **It could effectively ban them from registering.**
This bill is terrible. It’s an effort to suppress Military votes. If it passes the Senate, it’s going to undermine our elections. **And today, we need you to speak out against it.**
[**TELL THE U.S. SENATE: VOTE NO ON THE SAVE ACT!**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250410_vv_em_save_act?source=em250410-1-120&akid=34333%2E3013755%2ENwiV73)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250410_vv_em_save_act?source=em250410-1-120&akid=34333%2E3013755%2ENwiV73)
---
We’ve got to rally against this.
Thanks for adding your voice.
The team at VoteVets

name: Emerge HQ
subject: Say ‘NO’ to Trump’s trade war 🗣️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Last week, on Donald Trump’s so-called “Liberation Day,” he announced blanket tariffs on countries around the world. Let’s be clear: these tariffs aren’t about liberation—they’re a tax on hardworking Americans.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105606799/538799141/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliYjcxMDhmLTRhMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Wd9D0MI6kxe8KLlum66MoaDDZ2EZ7MWZHX8nclSOcUo=)
---
| Peter,

Last week, on Donald Trump’s so-called “Liberation Day,” he announced blanket tariffs on countries around the world. Let’s be clear: these tariffs aren’t about liberation— _they’re a tax on hardworking Americans._

Trump’s reckless trade war will raise prices on everything from groceries to housing, and these tariffs target some of our closest allies and trading partners, including Canada and Mexico. Even Trump himself has admitted that the American people will feel the pain of his tariffs.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105606800/538799142/1722526094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjliYjcxMDhmLTRhMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Wd9D0MI6kxe8KLlum66MoaDDZ2EZ7MWZHX8nclSOcUo=&emci=12258112-5a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9bb7108f-4a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=920818)
Emerge Alum **Rep. Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03)** is taking a stand and leading efforts to introduce legislation to help lower housing and utility costs to relieve working families. Real leadership means putting people first, and Emerge women are fighting back and taking action.

That’s the power of electing Emerge women! Here at Emerge, we’re working to help train even more Democratic women to run, win, and stand up to Trump’s disastrous trade policies so we can bring real relief to hard-working families. clean_body: Last week, on Donald Trump’s so-called “Liberation Day,” he announced blanket tariffs on countries around the world. Let’s be clear: these tariffs aren’t about liberation—they’re a tax on hardworking Americans. | = | Peter, Last week, on Donald Trump’s so-called “Liberation Day,” he announced blanket tariffs on countries around the world. Let’s be clear: these tariffs aren’t about liberation— they’re a tax on hardworking Americans. Trump’s reckless trade war will raise prices on everything from groceries to housing, and these tariffs target some of our closest allies and trading partners, including Canada and Mexico. Even Trump himself has admitted that the American people will feel the pain of his tariffs. Emerge Alum Rep. Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03) is taking a stand and leading efforts to introduce legislation to help lower housing and utility costs to relieve working families. Real leadership means putting people first, and Emerge women are fighting back and taking action. That’s the power of electing Emerge women! Here at Emerge, we’re working to help train even more Democratic women to run, win, and stand up to Trump’s disastrous trade policies so we can bring real relief to hard-working families. | Together, Emerge HQ * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States

name: Patty Murray
subject: Congress could reverse Trump’s tariffs TODAY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Donald Trump "couldn't care less" about the working families he's hurting.
| | |
---
Peter – Donald Trump’s ego-driven and reckless tariffs will put a tax on nearly **everything** we buy – whether at the grocery store, the car dealership, or a neighborhood coffee shop.
**These tariffs are igniting a global trade war, triggering what may be the worst market meltdown since 2008, and effectively imposing a TAX HIKE of thousands of dollars per year for the average American household – speed-running our economy into the ground.**
This week as we saw the stock market plummet, retirement savings crater, and companies begin layoffs, Trump said flat out that he **“couldn’t care less,”** about the rising costs soon to hit working families’ wallets.
While Trump just reversed some tariffs (at least at the time of this email), it’s clear there’s no real plan or strategy to this chaos with many incoherent and damaging tariffs still in place. And it’s painfully clear that Trump and his billionaire Cabinet are completely out of touch with the American people.

The good news is that Congress has the power to reverse Trump’s devastating tariffs. The bad news is that Republicans are refusing to lift a finger in opposition to Trump and his pro-billionaire agenda.
Let me be clear: Any Republican who isn’t working to end these tariffs is co-signing Trump’s reckless tax on American families that’s pushing us closer to a GOP recession.

[**_So I need you to join me in speaking up right now: If you agree that Congress must reverse the Trump tax ASAP, please sign my petition._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105606845/538799222/-1423037702?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk496-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmI3MTA4Zi00YTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQ0o1CYdRZfwzDUt0dwZ66tmOw0enoBsxLMPCtEmd9c=&emci=e0c03c62-0d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96b7108f-4a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13116610)
As we rush headfirst into a painful (and self-inflicted) recession, Republicans are ignoring the pleas from people in their states and are instead hard at work hammering out how to best help Trump hand over trillions of taxpayer dollars to billionaires.
**We have to send a message loud and clear to Republicans demanding they abandon their party's pro-billionaire, pro-recession agenda and work with Democrats to save the economy and protect the people who elected us to represent them in Congress.**

[**_So please, Peter, will you help me hold their feet to the fire by signing the petition now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105606846/538799223/-1423037702?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk496-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmI3MTA4Zi00YTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQ0o1CYdRZfwzDUt0dwZ66tmOw0enoBsxLMPCtEmd9c=&emci=e0c03c62-0d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96b7108f-4a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13116610)
| | [SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105606847/538799224/-1423037702?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&code=jtk496-su-nd&sustainers=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmI3MTA4Zi00YTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xQ0o1CYdRZfwzDUt0dwZ66tmOw0enoBsxLMPCtEmd9c=&emci=e0c03c62-0d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96b7108f-4a16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13116610)

We know they will try to tip the scales in favor of candidates who prioritize their interests, not ours. But we also know that grassroots support like yours can make all the difference. Abigail’s running a campaign that represents you — the people of Virginia — not billionaires looking to control the narrative. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Katie Porter
subject: Who traded stocks before Trump’s tariff announcement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39626%2E3422442%2E-Fzuux)
Dear Derek,
It’s bad enough that Donald Trump’s idiotic tariff policy is destabilizing our economy. **Now, it seems like government officials might be profiting off the chaos, too.**
Take a look at how stock trading spiked BEFORE Trump announced his tariff “pause.”
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250410_1_ak?refcode=em20250410-39626&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39626_3422442_-Fzuux&akid=39626%2E3422442%2E-Fzuux)
Our savings and retirement are not chips for Trump officials or members of Congress to gamble with. The American people deserve answers about whether anyone used nonpublic information to juice their own stock portfolios.
The reality is that existing guardrails aren’t enough to stop the self-dealing in Washington.
**When I was in Congress, I introduced legislation that would’ve banned members of Congress, the president and vice president, and the justices of the Supreme Court from trading individual stocks.** And, in my political work, I only endorse Congressional candidates who support a ban on members of Congress trading stock.
We deserve confidence that our elected officials are acting in the public interest, not their own self interest. **If I’m elected California’s next governor, you can always count on me to act in the best interest of Californians.**
But I need your help if we’re going to win this race. Can you make a donation of $5 today?
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250410_1_ak?refcode=em20250410-39626&refcode2=39626_3422442_-Fzuux&akid=39626%2E3422442%2E-Fzuux)
Thanks for considering,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250410-39626&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39626_3422442_-Fzuux&akid=39626%2E3422442%2E-Fzuux)**

name: Team ITT PAC
subject: Kentucky’s governor has a message for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
The word is getting out: **This Democrat Has a Key Message for His Party: Be Normal** The word is getting out, Peter.

More and more people are recognizing the power of our strategy — because it works. Just look at what _Bloomberg_ is saying: **Andy Beshear’s approach is resonating, and it’s exactly the kind of leadership Democrats need to win.**

But before we ask you to [**consider chipping in $5, or whatever you can,**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105607372/538800907/739826862?refcode=em25_250410_bloomb_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250410_bloomb_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=069664cf-4c16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDY5NjY0Y2YtNGMxNi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=opALzEp_GdU-uHzMSzBIYNgZiQsdhISmWzkCoU_r_0Y=) to help Andy’s In This Together PAC, let us explain how we’re taking his winning strategy to victory at every level:

It’s not by playing games or chasing headlines – _it’s by meeting voters where they are, talking to them like real people, and focusing on the issues that matter most._

That’s how Andy won in deep-red Kentucky — **three times.** It’s how he has fought to protect reproductive rights, defend LGBTQ+ Kentuckians, and stood up to right-wing extremists.

When Republican lawmakers tried to defund diversity programs, he vetoed them. When they attacked trans kids, he stood up for them. When Trump and the far-right try to distract Americans with culture wars, he stays focused on what matters and continues to talk about jobs, healthcare, and the economy — _because that’s what people actually care about._

This is the kind of leadership we need. **This is the kind of strategy that wins.**

Together, we’re bringing Andy’s message to Democrats across the country: focus on the people, treat them with the dignity and respect they deserve, speak like normal people, and give them real solutions for the issues that impact their daily lives. That's how we win. [**But Andy is counting on your support to do it. clean_body: The word is getting out: This Democrat Has a Key Message for His Party: Be Normal The word is getting out, Peter. More and more people are recognizing the power of our strategy — because it works. Just look at what Bloomberg is saying: Andy Beshear’s approach is resonating, and it’s exactly the kind of leadership Democrats need to win. But before we ask you to = to help Andy’s In This Together PAC, let us explain how we’re taking his winning strategy to victory at every level: It’s not by playing games or chasing headlines – it’s by meeting voters where they are, talking to them like real people, and focusing on the issues that matter most. That’s how Andy won in deep-red Kentucky — three times. It’s how he has fought to protect reproductive rights, defend LGBTQ+ Kentuckians, and stood up to right-wing extremists. When Republican lawmakers tried to defund diversity programs, he vetoed them. When they attacked trans kids, he stood up for them. When Trump and the far-right try to distract Americans with culture wars, he stays focused on what matters and continues to talk about jobs, healthcare, and the economy — because that’s what people actually care about. This is the kind of leadership we need. This is the kind of strategy that wins. Together, we’re bringing Andy’s message to Democrats across the country: focus on the people, treat them with the dignity and respect they deserve, speak like normal people, and give them real solutions for the issues that impact their daily lives. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Insider trading?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8466%2E5257348%2E4fzo6P ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — we just
witnessed the full Trump cycle:

1. Make a horrible policy decision.
2. Create lots of pain.
3. Falsely claim the problem is solved.
4. Reverse course.
5. Leave things worse than before.

Rinse. Repeat.

He announced major tariffs, sending the stock market crashing, only to
turn around days later to put those tariffs on hold, which sent the stock
market back up.

Here’s the thing: It doesn’t pass the smell test. Especially not from a
president who will do anything to enrich himself and his family — and who
promoted his own “meme coin” when he took office.

Let’s not forget, this is also someone who surrounds himself with
grifters.

I’m calling for an investigation into Trump’s tariff announcements: Did he
commit insider trading? Is he using the Oval Office to manipulate the
markets in his own interests? To benefit himself, his family, his staff,
or his friends? Who knew about his announcements in advance and did they
cash in?

You can’t put anything past this corrupt regime.

I think what the American people need is some certainty, some
predictability. Especially American businesses. They're getting anything
but that. People who have seen their retirement savings wiped out need to
be made whole. And they need to know whether Trump insiders were profiting
off of their financial pain.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250410_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8466%2E5257348%2E4fzo6P ]As I continue to investigate, I’m hoping you will pitch in a few
dollars to support my efforts to hold Trump accountable.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: EMILYs List
subject: All top donors contribute to Republican campaigns. Why?
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105607684/538801975/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE424_20250410_TopDonors_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055938&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU0ZGYwOC00ZTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0xfYf5WztRQtPPmXIth7vDnOF0InL57iZb8Kn2IJLsw=) Peter,

By a wide margin, the top political donors in this country contribute to Republican campaigns. That's because they know Republican politicians will benefit the ultra-wealthy at the expense of everyone else. Just look at this donor data from the 2024 election: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105607685/538801976/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE424_20250410_TopDonors_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055938&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmU0ZGYwOC00ZTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0xfYf5WztRQtPPmXIth7vDnOF0InL57iZb8Kn2IJLsw=) _[Open Secrets, 3/26/25]_ **Republicans might have billionaire donors, but we have you — a powerful grassroots movement.**

And if you need any more proof as to the power of grassroots movements, just look to Wisconsin — where EMILYs List-endorsed Susan Crawford beat billionaire-backed Brad Schimel, who received _more than $25 million_ just from Elon Musk and his affiliated groups, _by ten points_. clean_body: | = Peter, By a wide margin, the top political donors in this country contribute to Republican campaigns. That's because they know Republican politicians will benefit the ultra-wealthy at the expense of everyone else. Just look at this donor data from the 2024 election: = [Open Secrets, 3/26/25] Republicans might have billionaire donors, but we have you — a powerful grassroots movement. And if you need any more proof as to the power of grassroots movements, just look to Wisconsin — where EMILYs List-endorsed Susan Crawford beat billionaire-backed Brad Schimel, who received more than $25 million just from Elon Musk and his affiliated groups, by ten points. = | = Democratic pro-choice women face a number of obstacles when running for office, especially when they're up against deep-pocketed, extremist opponents or anti-choice billionaire backers. name: Jane Fonda
subject: A night to remember.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Here’s what happened last night.

Hi, Jane here. Last night, MoveOn and JanePAC joined forces to bring together organizers, actors, storytellers, and grassroots supporters from across generations to connect through trivia and talk about what it takes to build a movement that lasts. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105607747/538802185/2105508926?refcode=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1ZWYxMDVhLTRkMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Kfhec8caDsmRlFwgv3quA2oWw6xPRsLdJRkuF7KHh8=) **Over 1,450 grassroots supporters joined us from all across the country because, like you, we give a damn. We give a damn about our collective future. We give a damn about the chaos happening in Washington. And most importantly, we give a damn about _each other._** One thing I’ve learned over the years is that real momentum comes from shared experiences like this. When we show up to listen and connect about how we build something greater than ourselves. We’re up against a political machine backed by billionaires and extremists. They’re betting we’ll check out or give up. But if last night proved anything, it’s that people are still showing up — and ready to go even further. I’m so grateful to everyone who showed up, but if you missed it, there’s still a way to be part of what we built together. **[Every dollar raised from last night’s event is going toward the work of electing progressive leaders — up and down the ballot — who are ready to take on corporate polluters and push back against right-wing extremism. If you’re able, I hope you’ll consider chipping in to support that mission and keep our momentum going.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105607748/538802186/2105508926?refcode=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1ZWYxMDVhLTRkMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Kfhec8caDsmRlFwgv3quA2oWw6xPRsLdJRkuF7KHh8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105607749/538802187/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1ZWYxMDVhLTRkMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Kfhec8caDsmRlFwgv3quA2oWw6xPRsLdJRkuF7KHh8=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105607750/538802188/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.25ef105a-4d16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI1ZWYxMDVhLTRkMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_Kfhec8caDsmRlFwgv3quA2oWw6xPRsLdJRkuF7KHh8=)

clean_body: Here’s what happened last night. | Hi, Jane here. Last night, MoveOn and JanePAC joined forces to bring together organizers, actors, storytellers, and grassroots supporters from across generations to connect through trivia and talk about what it takes to build a movement that lasts. = Over 1,450 grassroots supporters joined us from all across the country because, like you, we give a damn. We give a damn about our collective future. We give a damn about the chaos happening in Washington. And most importantly, we give a damn about each other. One thing I’ve learned over the years is that real momentum comes from shared experiences like this. When we show up to listen and connect about how we build something greater than ourselves. We’re up against a political machine backed by billionaires and extremists. They’re betting we’ll check out or give up. But if last night proved anything, it’s that people are still showing up — and ready to go even further. I’m so grateful to everyone who showed up, but if you missed it, there’s still a way to be part of what we built together. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We have a long road ahead. But I’m not going anywhere, and I hope you’re with me. Warmly, xx Jane = P.S. I know there are a lot of reasons why all of you couldn’t join us last night. It’s no problem. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: NDRC North Carolina Watch
subject: 5 things to know about the attempted election theft in North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Contribute to help fight back against Republican attacks on free and fair elections.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105608163/538804068/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1MjZiZGJmLTRlMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RquP6BVqUjdtDck6Lap172D9r7i4Bnj9zwX4m4TvObQ=&emci=7ea4efef-2916-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4526bdbf-4e16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, **In North Carolina, Republicans are showing us just how far they’re willing to go to overturn a free and fair election. Here’s what you need to know:** 1\. Multiple recounts have confirmed that Republican Jefferson Griffin lost last November’s state supreme court race to Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs. We were proud to endorse her as a Democracy Defender in that election, and the people of North Carolina have spoken. 2\. Rather than concede, Griffin and state Republicans sued to try to steal this seat on North Carolina’s highest court. 3\. Conservative judges on North Carolina’s Court of Appeals sided with their colleague Griffin’s attempt to challenge the ballots of over 65,000 voters. If it’s upheld, the ruling could overturn Justice Riggs’ victory. 4\. Next, this decision was appealed to the North Carolina Supreme Court. 5\. If Republicans get away with this anti-democracy plot, you can guarantee they’ll try to replicate this playbook across the country. [**We cannot let that happen. The NDRC is working _right now_ to defend free and fair elections in North Carolina and across the country. Make a contribution of $30 or more to help power this work.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105608165/538804073/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCRedux_email_20250410-NDRC-Tier1-NCRedux_56&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250410-NDRC-Tier1-NCRedux_56&utm_campaign=NCRedux&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1MjZiZGJmLTRlMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RquP6BVqUjdtDck6Lap172D9r7i4Bnj9zwX4m4TvObQ=) Thank you, Team NDRC | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105608168/538804074/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NCRedux_email_20250410-NDRC-Tier1-NCRedux_56&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250410-NDRC-Tier1-NCRedux_56&utm_campaign=NCRedux&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1MjZiZGJmLTRlMTYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RquP6BVqUjdtDck6Lap172D9r7i4Bnj9zwX4m4TvObQ=)

clean_body: Contribute to help fight back against Republican attacks on free and fair elections. | Peter, In North Carolina, Republicans are showing us just how far they’re willing to go to overturn a free and fair election. Here’s what you need to know: 1\. Multiple recounts have confirmed that Republican Jefferson Griffin lost last November’s state supreme court race to Democratic incumbent Justice Allison Riggs. We were proud to endorse her as a Democracy Defender in that election, and the people of North Carolina have spoken. 2\. Rather than concede, Griffin and state Republicans sued to try to steal this seat on North Carolina’s highest court. 3\. Conservative judges on North Carolina’s Court of Appeals sided with their colleague Griffin’s attempt to challenge the ballots of over 65,000 voters. If it’s upheld, the ruling could overturn Justice Riggs’ victory. 4\. Next, this decision was appealed to the North Carolina Supreme Court. 5\. If Republicans get away with this anti-democracy plot, you can guarantee they’ll try to replicate this playbook across the country. = Thank you, Team NDRC | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Team BWC
subject: Stand with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| Did you see Bonnie’s message? The Speaker of the House shut down the House last week all to stop a _bipartisan_ bill supporting new mothers.

**_[These are unacceptable actions. Read more from Bonnie below and stand with us by signing our petition here to stand against Republican incompetence>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608388/538804709/-799643054?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250410_PT_Speaker_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_Speaker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDRmZWMyZC00ZjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBu0kR2zbeTboU71L2_K3wmZh1kHI6at3QduNy9QiPg=&emci=7d4fec2d-4f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=904fec2d-4f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)_**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**

Last week, the Speaker of the House tried to block a bill that would allow representatives of Congress who are new mothers to vote by proxy while they recover at home with their newborn.

When his efforts failed, **he shut down the House of Representatives.** This is the level of Republican incompetence we’re facing — if they don’t get their way, they shut things down.

**_[We cannot continue to stand for this. If you’re against incompetence in the House, click here to sign our petition in support of better governance for all American citizens>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608389/538804710/-799643054?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250410_PT_Speaker_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_Speaker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDRmZWMyZC00ZjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBu0kR2zbeTboU71L2_K3wmZh1kHI6at3QduNy9QiPg=&emci=7d4fec2d-4f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=904fec2d-4f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)_**

Not only do the actions of the Speaker prove the Republicans’ immaturity in governing, but also their immense lack of care for women. When faced with a bill in support of women’s rights, they were so vehemently opposed that **they had to shut down the entire House and send us home.**

We have so much to get done in Congress, and it is shameless that he is able to shut down our operations like that not just for any bill, **but for one in support of women’s rights.** The Republicans have made it clear where they stand and who they prioritize, and now we need to do the same.

**_[Use your voice and stand against these egregious actions by signing our petition today. We need to show Republicans that they cannot get away with such neglectful and incompetent governing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608390/538804711/-799643054?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250410_PT_Speaker_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_Speaker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDRmZWMyZC00ZjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LBu0kR2zbeTboU71L2_K3wmZh1kHI6at3QduNy9QiPg=&emci=7d4fec2d-4f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=904fec2d-4f16-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)_**

Thank you for all you do. Together, we can make a difference.

— Bonnie
---
* * *

---

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Announcing the Monopoly Busters Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Corporate monopolies have successfully rigged the game in their favor.
#
Peter,
You know something is deeply wrong when corporate profits continue to soar but families can’t afford milk or eggs or cereal when they go to the grocery store.
**The reason why is simple:** corporate monopolies have successfully rigged the game in their favor.
In addition to raising prices, they’re also buying influence in Congress and the White House so they can write the laws and regulations that govern them.
**That’s why my House colleagues Pat Ryan, Angie Craig, Chris Deluzio, and I just announced the creation of the Monopoly Busters Caucus to take on corporate power and build an economy that prioritizes working people.**
[**If you’re with us, will you split a donation between Representatives Ryan, Craig, Deluzio and myself today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250410?refcode=em20250410-4935&amount=3&refcode2=4935_420207_oNCCsa&akid=4935%2E420207%2EoNCCsa)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250410?amount=3&refcode=em20250410-4935&refcode2=4935_420207_oNCCsa&akid=4935%2E420207%2EoNCCsa)**
If we really want to tackle this issue, **we need Congress to act.** Launching the Monopoly Busters Caucus is about preparing for just that. Even with Mike Johnson as Speaker, we can draft legislation, get our message out there, and work with the public to pressure Republicans into taking action.
And when we win back the House majority in 2026, we’ll be ready to pass new legislation as quickly as possible.
But Peter, we also need to recognize that the changes we want to see aren’t going to happen without a fight. **Big corporate interests are lined up behind the billionaire-led Trump administration, and they’re going to do everything they can to keep the system rigged in their favor.**
That’s why your support is so important. Our fight to take on corporate power is made possible by grassroots supporters like you.
[**So Peter, can I count on you to split a donation between Representatives Deluzio, Ryan, Craig, and myself today? We’re counting on your help to build an economy that works for working people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250410?refcode=em20250410-4935&amount=3&refcode2=4935_420207_oNCCsa&akid=4935%2E420207%2EoNCCsa)
More soon,
Pramila Jayapal

Are tariffs and fear-mongering keeping you up at night? In this video, Kathy Barnette and Rich Lowrie unpack the truth behind the Trump tariffs, the fear being sold, and why we're at a tipping point. >From the media to social media "experts," the noise about tariffs, your 401K, and geopolitics is loud--but let's calm down and dig into the facts.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c90f64b9-da0e-4ee0-bd65-5cb1998eaeb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

* Why fear over tariffs is being oversold.

In this video, Kathy Barnette and Rich Lowrie unpack the truth behind the Trump tariffs, the fear being sold, and why we're at a tipping point. >From the media to social media "experts," the noise about tariffs, your 401K, and geopolitics is loud--but let's calm down and dig into the facts. | | ---|---|--- What You'll Learn: Why fear over tariffs is being oversold. How we're in the final stretch of a historic "Fourth Turning." The real risks--like massive debt--nobody's talking about. Pain before gain: Trump's tightrope act with tariffs. | | ---|---|--- Next Up: Grab a front-row seat and buckle up for an electrifying with Rabbi Raphael Shore and Kathy Barnette! name: Winsome Earle-Sears, Lieutenant Governor of Virginia
subject: Slaves did not die in the fields so that we could call ourselves victims now in 2025.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Democrats think minorities can’t succeed without DEI. They think that we need their help, their labels, and their permission.| | | Democrats think minorities can’t succeed without DEI. They think that we need their help, their labels, and their permission.| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d4b77e248ba4336b82b21741cb68edd&_e=sQigagApBJ3ks12JAHPhBRGETBPIPPKYwVGiCQQNorCDV1CLRn9K7Fnii4rrn_HGHLdU3SUly1BIXKDiVqX1SylDCLsIW3CCV_eNYzAhi4KcdBoQFglJDOfXQRGa_G3u-RSTLhYtM9iA62a0CSU13aHARTUVAUxOHKFsrfBvLRuwnxj4DEdLY1dWaq9Ld75GsWfxzKBwomN0izkVyLRRg3b11WFs0JOtpst9Hg-HCQeEmfdL4OyuDEQ7iTGDnULaTWTR7nCpvmvGL_HLhDqBmJxdydIlNoMpFQtHy407gD6mKK3uSfAzA9_OwuQoRHiGj9TAjP4qvaj6ACn6aGt7wFJrpPGjOEypb4z2TEInLekPeHHCW9I7WNmkYH7sDU7JAKBEsOcjCtW3jOwmkoyD4xlJjWRnxyanzqwxGOBB0Dk%3D)
---
**Slaves did not die in the fields so that we could call ourselves victims now in 2025. **

If they saw the DEI nonsense today they would say to us, **_'Is that what we died for??_ _NO_! We died for you to have an _opportunity_ - _take it!'_**

My father came to this country with nothing more than $1.75 in his pocket. He had next to nothing, but with education, grit, and determination, my father built a life for me and my family here.

_**He never asked for a hand out & he never needed one!**_

Fellow American - Democrats think minorities can't succeed without DEI. They think that we need their help, their labels, and their permission.

_But I 'm the Lt. Governor of Virginia--_**the former capital of the Confederacy.**__ I didn't get where I am today through victimhood but through **faith, education, and grit.**

Right now, I'm running to become the Governor of Virginia. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, spews DEI **nonsense** at every chance she gets. But I believe in the American Dream; _anyone who takes responsibility & works hard can succeed in this country!_ Seriously, my father is a perfect example of this; he didn't take a single handout to find success in America!

**DEI is a cancer._I won 't let Democrats insult the sacrifice & hard work of my father and every other minority American with their DEI handouts & victimhood._ **

**Here 's my call to action, fellow American: [donate $18 or more to help me end DEI nonsense and lead with the promise of personal responsibility and hard work!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d4b77e248ba4336b82b21741cb68edd&_e=sQigagApBJ3ks12JAHPhBRGETBPIPPKYwVGiCQQNorCDV1CLRn9K7Fnii4rrn_HGHLdU3SUly1BIXKDiVqX1SylDCLsIW3CCV_eNYzAhi4KcdBoQFglJDOfXQRGa_G3u-RSTLhYtM9iA62a0CSU13aHARTUVAUxOHKFsrfBvLRuwnxj4DEdLY1dWaq9Ld75GsWfxzKBwomN0izkVyLRRg3b11WFs0JOtpst9Hg-HCQeEmfdL4OyuDEQ7iTGDnULaTWTR7nCpvmvGL_HLhDqBmKc4pon_lfnbaj59NqYFen6hLITMCwsw8p8n_nkjnT2IvBY74VhfZGSinCBvnM6Z3AN1DMGlW8PN7v5tHv3i9v_jy4wAIhBzlXAfABAjjWNz4M7DWE79Gr6kgiv3-7_ewGx7vzUn4x8_4Bww2peyUZM%3D)**
---
[ DONATE NOW >>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d4b77e248ba4336b82b21741cb68edd&_e=sQigagApBJ3ks12JAHPhBRGETBPIPPKYwVGiCQQNorCDV1CLRn9K7Fnii4rrn_HGHLdU3SUly1BIXKDiVqX1SylDCLsIW3CCV_eNYzAhi4KcdBoQFglJDOfXQRGa_G3u-RSTLhYtM9iA62a0CSU13aHARTUVAUxOHKFsrfBvLRuwnxj4DEdLY1dWaq9Ld75GsWfxzKBwomN0izkVyLRRg3b11WFs0JOtpst9Hg-HCQeEmfdL4OyuDEQ7iTGDnULaTWTR7nCpvmvGL_HLhDqBmGnT6uiQK5Es4VFjvFSO-sQMiodgbMA4wUel19wFEylMljieotAy3Rl6EN4XuVOOJx-KTYMdYA3XH4rkHVJmW_x5oQ0hKRvYUARk8lwpiVg4IzWwABZ7VVyoApk7KqoS5mjR6o9DyYcUjS6bYmcTOdc%3D)
---
I am really just so grateful to have you on my team in this fight. Together, we'll win in November and end crazy Leftist policies like DEI once and for all!

Thanks again and God bless,

Winsome Earle-Sears
_Lieutenant Governor of Virginia_
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d4b77e248ba4336b82b21741cb68edd&_e=sQigagApBJ3ks12JAHPhBRGETBPIPPKYwVGiCQQNorCDV1CLRn9K7Fnii4rrn_HGHLdU3SUly1BIXKDiVqX1SylDCLsIW3CCV_eNYzAhi4KcdBoQFglJDOfXQRGa_G3u-RSTLhYtM9iA62a0CSU13aHARTUVAUxOHKFsrfBvLRuwnxj4DEdLY1dWaq9Ld75GsWfxzKBwomN0izkVyLRRg3b11WFs0JOtpst9Hg-HCQeEmfdL4OyuDEQ7iTGDnULaTWTR7nCpvmvGL_HLhDqBmPeqYGXvSxwdlSqXe9GKB52MwcIPzqAUvTfpUDeW0XXsvUAN5PrTiRI_7BU3E7YeqBIEDV2Nub-yOgWN5IP-SUPaoilOPHTZPtPmvKHcJRA4Ov1WPXHMuGJqD_NtUYQcqLCPhSrD0aSP03AaNE_X6ZE%3D)

The liberals can't stand it, fellow American!

They simply cannot fathom that I, Winsome Earle-Sears, am a proud conservative Republican - that I dare to think **differently!**

**And they may just completely lose it when this black, female conservative becomes the next Governor of Virginia!**

_But we need your help to get there, fellow American!_

_**[Will you join me today and chip in so I can win this race and continue shattering the Left's narratives?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3d4b77e248ba4336b82b21741cb68edd&_e=sQigagApBJ3ks12JAHPhBRGETBPIPPKYwVGiCQQNorCDV1CLRn9K7Fnii4rrn_HGMG2mUVE7zgx8Jcj6pDu3bYgMlf8R56bX6js3YAqqKQkN99H1avqcokro7P-eO7LaURLHWduDlYxsRP7I457HWHGVNdP-eOD6yOcZLqJE7watbN0YJjxjrjZSk57d6TRWN1gFV3_BXTVIQfBBlgHNKW0pkbCQ8qzRJV6JcttriEd8vxPh3rscjRuCHGYrXLbrLFd5T3cMeXfYjO38Sq1mCq57FYLqCYV1otdBzZy3x_2S8wR56uisutJg-M4AsNd0g-_jDKGEPIXgqvNWo8ovva5pO7VHTNCWQmFj_tGSNxmGvfB6eZrIQZjQdyhsroyowJHms99LkS4tMrC_92L5lTnOVnbRoq0eHzv2TckYFwA%3D)**_

name: Team Benson
subject: Tudor Dixon may not know why she’s running, but Jocelyn does
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
While other potential candidates struggle to make their case to Michiganders, Jocelyn knows exactly why she’s running, what office she’s running for, and whose lives she’s running to improve.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=210%2E181023%2EPmli3F)
You may remember Tudor Dixon — she ran for Governor of Michigan in 2022 with the backing of Betsy DeVos, who spent millions of dollars to support her.
She’s back, team. Dixon recently announced that she’s considering throwing her name in the ring and running for political office.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250410_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=210%2E181023%2EPmli3F)
Dixon indicated that she’s considering a run for Michigan’s open Governor or Senate seat — two very different offices with two very different sets of responsibilities.
At the very least, anyone running to represent Michiganders in elected office should be able to explain why they believe they’re the best candidate for the job they’re seeking. **But Dixon can’t, because she doesn’t even know which office she’s running for!**
While other potential candidates struggle to make their case to Michiganders, Jocelyn knows _exactly_ why she’s running, what office she’s running for, and whose lives she’s running to improve.
**Jocelyn is running to be the next Governor of Michigan to build the future Michiganders deserve — one that lowers costs and raises wages, protects our rights and freedoms from bullies and billionaires, and ensures every Michigander gets a fair shot in life.**
[**Chip in today to help her bring bold leadership to Lansing and move Michigan forward →**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q22025.35DAUP&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250410_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=210%2E181023%2EPmli3F)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608938/538806731/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyMTk4Zi01MTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIeOzBzG7a0wwoPFaz0gi-q2u5ivkkCbuVoadpifiA=)
JUST IN: _House Republicans PASS the SAVE Act >>_
**MAGA Republicans in the House just voted for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote. [**Sign now to demand the Senate BLOCK the SAVE Act >**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608939/538806732/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyMTk4Zi01MTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIeOzBzG7a0wwoPFaz0gi-q2u5ivkkCbuVoadpifiA=&emci=f5dc1398-4616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7f22198f-5116-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)****[**> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608940/538806733/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyMTk4Zi01MTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIeOzBzG7a0wwoPFaz0gi-q2u5ivkkCbuVoadpifiA=&emci=f5dc1398-4616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7f22198f-5116-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)**
| | **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608941/538806734/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyMTk4Zi01MTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIeOzBzG7a0wwoPFaz0gi-q2u5ivkkCbuVoadpifiA=&emci=f5dc1398-4616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7f22198f-5116-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)**
---
Picture this, folks:
You go in to vote, and you're turned away at the polls – despite having voted at the same location for years.
_Why?_ You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate.
**The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario,** and it will slam the door on millions -- soldiers serving abroad, rural Americans, tribal members, disaster survivors, working families, and women who took their spouse's name.
150 million citizens --_half the country_ \-- lack passports. And at **$130** each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either.
Make no mistake, folks: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box.
[**We've seen this playbook before, but the good news is we can fight back. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll sign the petition to demand the Senate STOP the SAVE Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608942/538806735/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyMTk4Zi01MTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIeOzBzG7a0wwoPFaz0gi-q2u5ivkkCbuVoadpifiA=&emci=f5dc1398-4616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7f22198f-5116-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)
| **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105608943/538806736/-1254296917?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjIyMTk4Zi01MTE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahIeOzBzG7a0wwoPFaz0gi-q2u5ivkkCbuVoadpifiA=&emci=f5dc1398-4616-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7f22198f-5116-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=26828920)**
---
We’re hoping for at least two 43614 signatures by midnight tonight. Thank you in advance for your commitment to defending the sacred right to vote.
-Team DASS

body:
Join us for some joyous noise in South Lake Union! We're not letting up on Elon or Tesla's stock price.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/efa1103fbad1/seattles-biggest-teslamusk-protest-yet-39603?e=10cc7d1928)
---
|

[](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=6dd17e4c46&e=10cc7d1928)

---
| Last week’s Hands Off event was epic and we’re going to **keep the momentum going** with our first featured event at South Lake Union!
---
| [REGISTER NOW!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=eec14c7324&e=10cc7d1928)
---
|

The intersection of Westlake and Mercer is a prime location, just up the block from Tesla, to **make it clear we're not slowing down after last week's historic event.** At the end, we'll make the short march together to the Lake Union Park for a rally with special guests. **Let's make some joyous noise!**
[ Please RSVP and share with friends!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=41c64f683b&e=10cc7d1928)
See you Saturday!\- Devin

But let me be clear, this is just the first step in the process, and the Left is going to do all they can to derail us with millions of dollars of lying attacks. # [Charlie Kirk EXPLODES AT the angriest woke brat he's ever met](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=161045917&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMDQ1OTE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQzMjE5MDgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjkxMzkwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.UToxBOLJiUU-T-AVDfNNfTUtQQvzxa2ZQ6N2x3dlnI8)

Charlie Kirk was **[confronted by his angriest foe yet](https://substack.com/redirect/7c75a16e-8fd4-4565-a283-5bf3187b30bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a TPUSA "Prove Me Wrong" speaking event on campus. Watch how he handles this guy's venom and personal insults and takes him down in the end.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7c75a16e-8fd4-4565-a283-5bf3187b30bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7c75a16e-8fd4-4565-a283-5bf3187b30bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The man was hostile towards Kirk right from the get-go interrupting his previous conversation with a student with a bullhorn. He began to argue that Elon Musk and Tesla are not worthy of police protection amid nationwide attacks on dealerships.
"The role of the police is to protect private property!" Kirk snapped at the man. "Whether it be a Wendy's being burned by Black Lives Matter or a Tesla dealership being burned by angry people like you, the police should protect private property!"
"There's plenty of cases of police protecting the dealership before the mod is even there," the man argued back. "You think that's a good use of taxpayer dollars? Protecting a billionaire's property?!"
**[Kirk told the man that he has a"sick and twisted" worldview.](https://substack.com/redirect/7c75a16e-8fd4-4565-a283-5bf3187b30bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "What you are cheering for is the disenfranchisement and unemployment of Americans!" He then chastised him for rudely interrupting his previous debate. "You are an agitator or a leftist that would never be able to build something yourself!"
"I've already worked 20 hours this week!" the man shouted at Kirk. "F**k Elon Musk for taking a chainsaw to the National Park Service,... did you even graduate college?! You're gonna come to a college and. act like you know f**king better than everybody?!!"
Watch how Kirk puts this guy in his place:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7c75a16e-8fd4-4565-a283-5bf3187b30bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**[Presented By Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/eb2259bf-525d-4a82-832a-9c93fe282171?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

# **MAGA rising star makes clueless Democrat ruin his suit with one simple question:**_**" You think Baltimore is a safe city?!!"**_
GOP Rep. Brandon Gill **[grilled Neill Franklin, a Baltimore police veteran, over failed Democrat leadership](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d160a0-24ac-4b76-a10a-12f3f0fa7a7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that has lead to carnage and chaos in the city during a House Judiciary hearing called "Sanctuary Jurisdictions: Magnet for Migrants, Cover for Criminals", Wednesday.
**["Do you think that Baltimore is a safe city?"](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d160a0-24ac-4b76-a10a-12f3f0fa7a7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Gill asked Franklin.
"Of course it is," explaining that "perception" is the true measure of a city's safety. "It's what you feel as a resident in Baltimore city."
Gill asked if Franklin was aware that the homicide rate in Baltimore was 35/100k, 5x the national average. "Does that sound like a safe city to you?!"
Watch Gill make him sweat:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a9d160a0-24ac-4b76-a10a-12f3f0fa7a7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

body:
I’m standing up to Musk in Congress by introducing legislation to hold DOGE accountable. And I’m more than ready to stand up to him here in West Michigan.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105609535/538808890/463868053?&refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-04-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Yjc4NGUzOS01MzE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLCPpl8mzkwdK9TPk8615kTbXKl0h6U7kqUE6Vx6XeE=)

| Democrats pulled off an incredible victory in Wisconsin despite Elon Musk dumping $25 million into the race for the Republican. After the win, I was asked whether I would want Musk to campaign against me. My response?

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump has no economic strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Last week, Donald Trump used an incorrect formula — which he couldn’t even calculate correctly — to implement reckless, arbitrary and sweeping new tariffs against just about every country in the world (except Russia) that sent the global economy into a tailspin. **Stock markets plunged. Businesses retrenched. Workers were laid off. American retirement accounts permanently suffered. And foreign countries started looking for new trade partners.** Not surprisingly, House Republicans fully backed Trump, even going so far as to remove Congress’s own authority to stop some of the tariffs. Then yesterday, Trump suddenly _reversed_ a significant portion of those tariffs. **Why?** Because foreign countries had _“called”_ our government in response to the tariffs. Yet even though all he got in return for the damaging and destructive tariffs were a few phone calls, Trump and his administration are now claiming that this economic whiplash was Trump’s master strategy all along — that it was part of a grand plan to negotiate a deal with foreign countries to help our economy. **Well Peter, that’s a very bad deal.** In truth, as Trump himself admitted, he saw other economic metrics teetering and decided to pull the plug. Let’s be clear: There is no strategy. And that’s the biggest problem. Trump’s chaotic, unpredictable and irrational economic policies are not only hurting Americans and spooking the markets, but they are also spooking American businesses and foreign governments — increasing the likelihood of a recession every day. And House Republicans sit idly and do nothing to help their constituents. **It’s time for all of us to ramp up the pressure on House Republicans to use Congress’s significant power to stop this destructive trade war.** **I’m on the front lines calling them out. name: Rapid Response @ LCV
subject: BREAKING: House votes 220-208 to disenfranchise MILLIONS of voters
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIzNTQ4MTYS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIwMDE1NDkzMQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
BREAKING: House passes the SAVE Act, which would make it more difficult for millions of eligible voters to cast their ballots. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~
Rush your gift of $5 or more to help fight this assault on voter rights >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MqEjY4B~ Peter —The economy remains in a tail spin, and people are showing their
frustration with Trump. Last weekend, millions of people across the country took
to the streets to fight back against Trump and Musk’s abuses. Meanwhile, what is
the House doing? They just voted 220-208 to pass the SAVE Act, their radical, restrictive voter
ID law. The SAVE Act would require all voters to prove their citizenship by presenting a
passport or birth certificate — documents many U.S. voters don’t have. They
would be required to do so in personwhen registering to vote or updating their voter registration information. The
legislation would prevent registering to vote by mail and online — and
effectively end voter registration drives nationwide. Senate Democrats have said they’ll block the bill, but we can’t take anything
for granted — we have to do everything we can to prevent it from moving forward.
If the SAVE Act becomes law, tens of millions of eligible voters — especially
seniors, veterans, women, students, and rural voters — could be blocked from
casting their ballots. But here’s the catch: this vote will require 60 votes to pass in the Senate,
which means we have a real chance to stop it. The environmental movement must respond — and we need your help.Last week, LCV flew in state environmental leaders from all over the country to
fight for our top priorities, including demanding that senators fight for
everyone’s right to vote and oppose the SAVE Act. We’re asking for YOUR help to power campaigns like these to oppose attacks on
our constitutional freedoms. Please, pitch in right now by renewing your membership for just $5 to power our fight for a healthy democracy and a better environmental future >> https://links.messages.lcv. Without a democracy where everyone is represented, corporate polluters will
decide the policies that affect our health and our planet’s future. RENEW NOW TO PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, the SAVE Act would threaten the right to vote for tens of millions of U.S. voters. Here’s who this Republican-led bill hurts the most: People who don’t have a passport — about half of the U.S. populationSenior citizens and the 60 million people who live in rural areas — who face additional barriers to presenting a passport or birth certificate in personVeterans and current military personnel who would no longer be able to use their military IDs to register or voteAn estimated 69 million women who changed their last name after marriageStudents, people of color, and members of Tribal communities Many of the marginalized communities most impacted by the Trump administration’s
attacks on climate policies and environmental safeguards are also the people Republicans are trying to keep from registering to vote. This is an attempt by Republicans to control who has access to vote and suppress
any voters who might oppose their sweeping pro-polluter agenda. We must respond by applying pressure on the Senate to stop this destructive bill

clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. BREAKING: House passes the SAVE Act, which would make it more difficult for millions of eligible voters to cast their ballots. Rush your gift of $5 or more to help fight this assault on voter rights >> Peter —The economy remains in a tail spin, and people are showing their frustration with Trump. Last weekend, millions of people across the country took to the streets to fight back against Trump and Musk’s abuses. Meanwhile, what is the House doing? They just voted 220-208 to pass the SAVE Act, their radical, restrictive voter ID law. The SAVE Act would require all voters to prove their citizenship by presenting a passport or birth certificate — documents many U.S. voters don’t have. They would be required to do so in personwhen registering to vote or updating their voter registration information. The legislation would prevent registering to vote by mail and online — and effectively end voter registration drives nationwide. Senate Democrats have said they’ll block the bill, but we can’t take anything for granted — we have to do everything we can to prevent it from moving forward. If the SAVE Act becomes law, tens of millions of eligible voters — especially seniors, veterans, women, students, and rural voters — could be blocked from casting their ballots. But here’s the catch: this vote will require 60 votes to pass in the Senate, which means we have a real chance to stop it. The environmental movement must respond — and we need your help.Last week, LCV flew in state environmental leaders from all over the country to fight for our top priorities, including demanding that senators fight for everyone’s right to vote and oppose the SAVE Act. We’re asking for YOUR help to power campaigns like these to oppose attacks on our constitutional freedoms. Please, pitch in right now by renewing your membership for just $5 to power our fight for a healthy democracy and a better environmental future >> Without a democracy where everyone is represented, corporate polluters will decide the policies that affect our health and our planet’s future. RENEW NOW TO PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS Peter, the SAVE Act would threaten the right to vote for tens of millions of U.S. voters. Here’s who this Republican-led bill hurts the most: People who don’t have a passport — about half of the U.S. populationSenior citizens and the 60 million people who live in rural areas — who face additional barriers to presenting a passport or birth certificate in personVeterans and current military personnel who would no longer be able to use their military IDs to register or voteAn estimated 69 million women who changed their last name after marriageStudents, people of color, and members of Tribal communities Many of the marginalized communities most impacted by the Trump administration’s attacks on climate policies and environmental safeguards are also the people Republicans are trying to keep from registering to vote. This is an attempt by Republicans to control who has access to vote and suppress any voters who might oppose their sweeping pro-polluter agenda. We must respond by applying pressure on the Senate to stop this destructive bill that threatens the rights of millions of eligible voters. Will you help? Please, chip in to our campaign by renewing your LCV membership today with a gift of just $5 or more. You’ll make an immediate impact to mobilize our national network to fight the SAVE Act and protect the right to vote >> Thanks for supporting our democracy, Peter. body:
House Republicans just passed a budget resolution that will slash hundreds of billions from essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP. Here's the good news: | | | Peter, As Donald Trump and Elon Musk are gutting Social Security and veteran's benefits, **Republicans in Congress just passed a budget resolution that will slash hundreds of billions from essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP.** Why? So they can fund tax cuts for themselves and their billionaire friends. **The good news:** This budget is not close to being final. Budget reconciliation is a long process, leaving us time to organize members, activists, and representatives across the country to reject this budget and pass a fair one that protects working people. **The better news:** House Republicans passed this resolution by just two votes. They desperately need to hold onto every last bit of support that they have — and we’re heading into a congressional recess that will put these representatives face to face with their constituents. **The BEST news:** There are opportunities for you to make a major impact without even leaving your home! **[Next week, Working Families Power is hosting virtual phone banks where members like you can reach voters in Republican districts and help them demand that their representatives vote against a budget that cuts taxes for billionaires and services for working families.
