clean_body: | | | Hi, this is Melissa Evans. That’s me and my husband, Derrick, at home with our four kids. If you donated to Derrick’s campaign recently, thank you . Your support means the world to him. The politicians in Washington D.C. hate him. They treat him like he's redneck trash. You see, many people THINK they know Derrick’s story based on the headlines and newspapers. “January 6th Insurrectionist.” “Redneck from West Virginia.” The media is going to say what it wants. But I know the real Derrick, and I want you to know him too. Derrick was my college sweetheart. He was one of the few pro-life conservatives I met on campus—passionate, kind, and full of conviction. When we got married, we lived a normal American life. We had kids running around. Derrick was working on homes, helping out at the family ranch, even volunteering at rehab facilities across West Virginia – a state ripped apart by opioids and alcoholism. On top of running for local office, he also helped coached D1 football. Beyond the wins and losses, he wanted to teach young men how to be good fathers, American __patriots, and strong leaders. But that all changed in a blink of an eye. The life Derrick created for our family was FLIPPED UPSIDE DOWN OVERNIGHT. A SWAT team of Biden's FBI agentsbusted down our front door. The kids were screaming. Derrick had his hands up. I was CONFUSED, living in a NIGHTMARE. Then I remembered – Derrick went to Washington DC on January 6th to PEACEFULLY contest a stolen election. That’s what this was all about. The Biden Regime labeled him an “insurrectionist” and that was it. My husband was going to prison. We tried to fight back. We argued entrapment. We argued violation of free speech. Nothing worked. The courts REFUSED to hear it. Derrick’s fate was SEALED. He would be spending his nights in a cold, dark prison cell. I would be laying in bed alone wondering how I'm going to take care of four kids by myself. Months later, when Derrick was released on good behavior, the man I saw come home was different. He always had an interest in politics, but going to prison this lit a fire inside of him I had never seen before. So when Derrick found out he was PARDONED by President Trump, and was now eligible to run for U.S. Senate, that’s immediately what he decided to do. I support him 100%. Do you? This isn’t about “revenge” for Derrick. This is about justice. Justice for the HUNDREDS of Americans who were entrapped and imprisoned on Jan 6th. Justice for young girls like Laken Riley who were MURDERED by Joe Biden’s illegal aliens. Justice for our police officers, first responders, and military heroes who were FIRED over vaccine mandates. Justice for our coal miners and blue collar workers – right here in states like West Virginia – who’ve seen their livelihoods SHIPPED overseas. Now, I don’t know a whole lot about politics, but I know this: Derrick’s running for Senate to look out for America's future – to look out for the people who have been IGNORED by the politicians for too long. He calls it the “Swamp”. Bottom line: he needs your help to WIN. Washington thinks Derrick is some low IQ redneck who belongs in jail. Even the Republicans. Fine, let them think that. Because while they sip martinis and discuss billion-dollar deals with megadonors, Derrick is out in the field talking to the people who matter most:Americans like YOU. Your support would mean so much to him. I keep telling him he’s doing a great job, but nothing makes his day more than seeing. Every dollar you donate helps him: → Hire additional staff to knock on doors (if only for a few hours). → Get on TV and radio and tell his story (WITHOUT the fake news media spin). → Send out campaign mail, brochures, yard signs, T-shirts (you name it)! ** All of these things are CRITICAL for running a successful ground campaign – and . Will you help my husband win his Senate campaign by rushing over $25 or more? Sincerely, Melissa Evans Wife of Derrick Evans P.S Derrick was just telling me how much his supporters mean to him – that’s why I decided to write you this email to . ** P.P.S. Despite all of the hard times Derrick went through as one of Biden’s political prisoners, he still has his sense of humor. Look at what he wanted us to be for Halloween! | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | |

name: Team Ilhan Omar
subject: Ilhan is running
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250410-1309-foote&t=1001&akid=1309%2E342411%2ElExkHU ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter — This is
huge!

Today Ilhan Omar is officially launching her campaign for reelection to
Congress in Minnesota’s 5th district!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250410-movement.URKsi6&refcode=em20250410-1309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1309%2E342411%2ElExkHU ]If you’re ready to take on the corporate interests, the far-right, and
the entire political establishment to reelect Ilhan Omar and fight for our
progressive values, rush a contribution to her campaign today. >>

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250410-movement.URKsi6&refcode=em20250410-1309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1309%2E342411%2ElExkHU ]Donate ››

Since her first election to Congress in 2018, Ilhan has been a fierce and
consistent fighter on the issues we care about, from tackling the climate
crisis, to ensuring healthcare for all, to achieving a true ceasefire in
Gaza.

Now, she is helping to lead the charge to hold Donald Trump’s
administration accountable and fight back against the billionaire
oligarchs who seek to take from the working class for their own benefit.

But the truth is, winning reelection has never been easy. Millions of
dollars have been spent to unseat Ilhan. We have gone up against attacks
from AIPAC, far-right special interests, conservative Democrats, and
Donald Trump himself.

And each time we were victorious because we had a committed grassroots
movement behind our campaign — a movement of folks doing what they can,
when they can, to win over voters and fight for the progressive vision of
the future that Ilhan and all of us share.

That’s why it’s crucial that we make today a HUGE day for our fundraising
efforts. We want to show everyone who is watching this campaign that Ilhan
is not just ready to compete, but ready to win once again. We want to
scare off the competition before this race even gets started.

So please,
Peter.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250410-movement.URKsi6&refcode=em20250410-1309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1309%2E342411%2ElExkHU ]Make a contribution of $3 or whatever you can afford
today to Ilhan Omar as we kick off this campaign. This is a big moment for
Ilhan, and it would mean the world to her if you had her back today.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250410-movement.URKsi6&refcode=em20250410-1309&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1309%2E342411%2ElExkHU ]Contribute ››

We’re excited to start this new campaign and to reelect Ilhan once again,
and we hope you are too! We’re counting on this grassroots team to be
there every step of the way.

In solidarity,

Team Ilhan Omar

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1309%2E342411%2ElExkHU

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Team Gillen
subject: re: Operation 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Operation 2026 is officially underway, and we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Laura’s message as we work to secure a strong Democratic majority that will fight for hardworking families.

| Peter,

Operation 2026 is officially underway, and we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Laura’s message as we work to secure a strong Democratic majority that will fight for hardworking families.

Together, we flipped this seat from red to blue in a year when Democrats faced tough losses across the country. Every minute and dollar that our incredible network of supporters invested into this campaign had a _major_ payoff.

**We proved that we know what it takes to win!** The NRCC is targeting NY-04 in 2026, and we need your continued support to ensure we have what it takes to defend this seat, take back the House, and fight back against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105613063/538820947/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-04-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwMTFjZi01ZjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZTH5KtrP0iJauae2l46ySCXRiYGA6_C3K2UL8Dx4yE=)

_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
From: **Laura Gillen**
Date: Sat, Mar 29, 2025
Subject: Democrats can’t flip the House without this seat

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105613068/538820949/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-04-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmYwMTFjZi01ZjE2LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VZTH5KtrP0iJauae2l46ySCXRiYGA6_C3K2UL8Dx4yE=)
---
| Peter,

After just weeks of taking office, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have shown us that Republicans are more interested in advancing their extreme agenda than actually supporting working families facing skyrocketing prices.

House Republicans have one of the slimmest majorities in nearly a decade, and they’re using every ounce of their power to push for cuts to federal funding for critical programs like Medicaid and Social Security.

It’s clear that the only way to hold the Trump Administration accountable is by taking back the House in 2026. That’s why we’re launching **Operation 2026** — _our plan to secure a strong Democratic majority that will fight for hardworking families!_

Democrats can’t flip the House without this seat. The Cook Political Report has named our district as the only TOSS-UP in New York, and we need to show powerful grassroots strength.

clean_body: Operation 2026 is officially underway, and we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Laura’s message as we work to secure a strong Democratic majority that will fight for hardworking families. | Peter, Operation 2026 is officially underway, and we wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Laura’s message as we work to secure a strong Democratic majority that will fight for hardworking families. Together, we flipped this seat from red to blue in a year when Democrats faced tough losses across the country. Every minute and dollar that our incredible network of supporters invested into this campaign had a major payoff. We proved that we know what it takes to win! The NRCC is targeting NY-04 in 2026, and we need your continued support to ensure we have what it takes to defend this seat, take back the House, and fight back against Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. | = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Laura Gillen Date: Sat, Mar 29, 2025 Subject: Democrats can’t flip the House without this seat | = | Peter, After just weeks of taking office, Donald Trump and his MAGA allies have shown us that Republicans are more interested in advancing their extreme agenda than actually supporting working families facing skyrocketing prices. name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: “Paradise Lost” | Watch the Trailer
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmv1m04pbq44548yqqbqh6p1fc9ueu04rsydrqaribdcn1jukdxky2sodrkbuu87bi384d3lrztpi31bbi&__stmp=suiypv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkw8og31jndsj5q9ecur4nht771a7r370xh72e4eg0ucnebkln4anu07lkz27yc79i4k2d29c2ee5cim8vkx880t6wfe0vhb2tfr74w8n6q6q0dekf6fktf1nffviu2cv5g3s4h4y70yi7e5q99z&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkw8og31jndsj5q9ecur4nhtsg44r711ev2ydkus0p4x63ribudgu1sc6tcda8595f7m3mu4ecz3tgy51b2sggm7htycju6al8am1ywgzyraakt00cmsxtrn0d3tpnymhrvs8xu4t8copihsnjbj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=suiypv&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Urgent: Help Fund Crucial Senate Races >> Urgent: Help Fund Crucial Senate Races >> | | | | | Dear Patriot, Breaking news: With liberal Democrat Senator Jeanne Shaheen's unexpected announcement, we now have another open Senate seat on the map for this 2026 Election Cycle. Michigan, Minnesota, Georgia, and now New Hampshire are all winnable seats for Republicans to flip, BUT WE NEED TO ACT QUICKLY to fund these races. Important: Open Senate seats are the best opportunity to hold and grow our Republican Majority so we can continue enacting the Trump agenda. We have 'Open Seat Funds' already set up to support the eventual Republican nominees in many states. Please donate right now to KEEP THE SENATE RED! We can't let Democrats derail the historic and Nation-saving work Republicans are doing in the United States Senate to support and protect President Trump and his administration. If we lose the Senate, President Trump's term effectively will be cut in half. Thank you! We can't waste this HUGE opportunity. ********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate** | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: Joe Kerr
subject: Just a few more votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Kerr for California
body:
Working and middle-class families deserve better than a House majority that bows down to billionaires.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105613855/538823636/-40941803?refcode=BLU_EM_JKC_2025-04-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU4Yjg2YjgtNjMxNi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o9wtmn-WM_g3YP-QUUpMItEqf1isxi_pUO7yu5VKaKE=)
---
| _**Peter,

Here’s what we’re up against:**_

Last month, House Republicans narrowly passed a budget resolution 217 - 215 that would give billionaires **_TRILLIONS_** of dollars in tax cuts at the expense of critical programs like Medicaid. _**217 - 215**_ That’s how narrow the Republican House majority is. The Trump administration and the GOP want you to believe they have a mandate. The truth is, they don’t. A few more votes could have changed that outcome.

That’s why I’m putting all I’ve got into this race. Working and middle-class families deserve better than a House majority that bows down to billionaires. CA-40 holds the key to building a majority invested in lasting solutions for working-class families on public safety, climate change, and so much more.

clean_body: Working and middle-class families deserve better than a House majority that bows down to billionaires. | = | Peter, Here’s what we’re up against: Last month, House Republicans narrowly passed a budget resolution 217 - 215 that would give billionaires TRILLIONS of dollars in tax cuts at the expense of critical programs like Medicaid. 217 - 215 That’s how narrow the Republican House majority is. The Trump administration and the GOP want you to believe they have a mandate. The truth is, they don’t. A few more votes could have changed that outcome. That’s why I’m putting all I’ve got into this race. Working and middle-class families deserve better than a House majority that bows down to billionaires. CA-40 holds the key to building a majority invested in lasting solutions for working-class families on public safety, climate change, and so much more. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Grateful to have your support. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1011&refcode=email-20250410_v&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

🚨 🚨 🚨This is an all hands on deck moment: Republicans in the House JUST
voted to move full speed ahead with a bill to give massive tax breaks to
billionaires – while ripping away Medicaid funding and our social safety
net to foot the bill. 🚨 🚨 🚨

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24951?source=email-20250410&t=1061&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]Headline: House GOP passes budget that guts Medicaid to give tax cuts
to the rich.

It’s not an exaggeration to say lives are on the line.

This bill could SLASH Medicaid spending by $880 billion, alongside huge
cuts to nutrition assistance and so much more. It would RIP healthcare
away from millions, especially seniors, people with disabilities, and
low-income children and families.

Vulnerable Republicans are already nervous these cuts will cost them their
jobs, but Trump is pushing them to pass them ASAP anyway – which is where
we come in.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250410nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]Our Revolution is quickly activating our Citizen Action Team to DEMAND
Congress stop putting billionaires over families. We rallied on Capitol
Hill today and we’re bird-dogging Republicans to ratchet up the pressure
and overwhelm Congress. But this is THE most crucial moment for this fight
so we’re RAPIDLY scaling up – can you urgently chip in so we can stop more
billionaire tax breaks and save Medicaid

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump, his billionaire backers, and Republicans in Congress are HELL BENT
on pushing through their plan to give billions to the wealthiest Americans
while tearing apart the systems that keep working families afloat.

This is Trump declaring war on the working class – and after today’s House
vote, Congress is moving FULL STEAM AHEAD to do it as quickly as possible.

But here’s the thing: as public anger swells, pressure is building on
Congress not to do it. Even some Republicans are worried that massive cuts
like this could cost them their jobs — which is why Our Revolution is
working around the clock to OVERWHELM Congress with massive opposition to
this cruel plan.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24951?source=email-20250410&t=1060&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]Our Revolution protest.

Our team is already hard at work pressuring lawmakers, organizing
protests, and showing up in key districts to hold Congress accountable.
But this is a top priority for Trump and his billionaire backers, so to
defeat them we’re going to have to build our power even more. And that’s
where you come in.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24950?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250410nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8172%2E5885482%2ELJBIOR ]We’re scaling up FAST – can you rush a donation to help?

When we organize, we win.

# [The Greatest Trick They Ever Played](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=161056301&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMDU2MzAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQzMjkzNjgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjkyMTM2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kkFGk8tJxzdTGXF442Y3ujihN1-Oes4mbbbchvtHBbI)
### How America Overturning Trump Reveals Our Inner Rot
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Apr 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=161056301&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMDU2MzAxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDMyOTM2OCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2OTIxMzY4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.z1cysJ2b1gg6XAFY1jMgWrhdu_Sdp7qZf5Tvs3x6zUA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=161056301&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMDU2MzAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQzMjkzNjgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjkyMTM2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kkFGk8tJxzdTGXF442Y3ujihN1-Oes4mbbbchvtHBbI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=161056301&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxMDU2MzAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDQzMjkzNjgsImV4cCI6MTc0NjkyMTM2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.kkFGk8tJxzdTGXF442Y3ujihN1-Oes4mbbbchvtHBbI)
---
| | [](https://substack..42PfrGe2mS2LRe9P96evLgraqYVxwLtu6fYhJRAthJg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/the-greatest-trick-they-ever-played?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This week a previously unimaginable thing happened: a broad coalition came together to successfully resist President Trump.
CEOs and their retired workers, financiers and academics, the DOGE Bros and federal workers, even D's and R's came together to turn back Trump's tariffs. And they did it in the name of protecting the only American institution everyone agrees cannot fail:
The stock market.
And while I know a lot of people are pleased that a Trump policy was finally stopped, I worry that the reason this specific policy was stopped reveals a deep sickness in our nation.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ZUxfC5hPx_u926u1ZihWWt9bt_OibMu8kPSlcaDTOxs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161056301)
Think about it. We can't come together to save our air, our water, or our planet. We can't unite against adversaries like [China](https://substack.com/redirect/8dcf4849-73c9-43dc-9d94-3479ca5930b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [Russia](https://substack.com/redirect/c40a5c07-6934-4ee1-8742-e54d7b460109?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). We can't agree on feeding hungry kids, [developing the next generation of energy](https://substack.com/redirect/3e4e009f-321c-4e24-bc34-03cf85d245dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), fixing healthcare, or preserving vital services.
But when the stock market falls from whatever its current artificial high is back down to a level last seen... let me check... _less than a year ago_ --and [is still higher than every point in history](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ec30f8-3470-4875-97d3-716a00be0702?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) prior to 2024, everyone loses their collective minds and revolts at the idea of their hard un-earned money from the last year disappearing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/544c1984-529c-45de-af49-e7bfa1d356c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The S&P 500 is up 89% in five years and, at it's lowest during the recent tariff crash when everyone panicked, was exactly where it was a year earlier.
As a kid in the 90's, I was fascinated by a DOW ticker next to Zesto's ice cream shop on the main drag in my hometown, Jefferson City. I watched it obsessively as we drove back and forth across town for years.
In middle school, I asked my teachers about the stock market and how it worked. I remember them saying it was like gambling. It's not a sure thing, they told me, it's risky.
Naturally, I was confused, since I had watched the stock market consistently go up for years, so I asked for second and third and fourth opinions. But I kept getting the same answer from everyone, including my parents and people down at church: the stock market is gambling, and people without a lot of money can't afford to take risks like that.
This was both the truest statement and greatest lie I've ever been told.
It's the truest statement because, certainly, people without money can't afford to gamble everything they have on risky ventures. But it's the biggest lie because, in my lifetime, the stock market has never been a risk at all. Instead, it has been guaranteed by the largesse of the United States government.
Every time the stock market has gone down, our government and politicians have done literally everything they could to get it back up again. It's the most protected institution in America. Politicians of both parties point to its increases as roaring successes.
In this case the great truth, that working people can't afford to take risks, is the foundation for what makes the great lie, that the stock market (as a whole) is risky, untrue.
It wasn't always this way. Once upon a time the stock market was risky. But years ago, the financial class realized that if they could get everyday people across our country bought into the stock market, the government would be forced to insulate the market from risk. And, sure enough, they got us.
Their hook? Convincing America to ditch fixed benefit pensions (which some corrupt companies had gutted in a spectacular manner) for stock-based individual retirement accounts.
The original legislation for those accounts was put into place in the 1970s. But in the 1980s, employer sponsored 401(k) plans began to explode as the Reagan administration passed tax cuts and tax code changes that made 401(k) plans [more desirable to everyday](https://substack.com/redirect/f875d878-fb56-4c81-90bc-71cc1e8ff5ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) workers--and legitimized the accounts by creating a 401(k) program for federal employees. A few years later, Bill Clinton picked up the baton and expanded 401(k)'s to small businesses. The IRA [followed a similar](https://substack.com/redirect/1dfb12a4-45fe-48ed-b8a0-c5f01a2ac8b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) timeline to the 401(k) and, by 2010, millions of working people and retirees who could not afford to gamble with their retirement money or risk losing any of it, had a vast percentage of their net worth and their entire ability to survive later life tied up in the stock market.
Wall Street literally took control of our survival.
I saw this over and over again on the campaign trail. Desperate retirees clinging to underfunded retirement accounts and social security, praying that the stock market would explode and stretch their $80,000 401(k) plans a few years longer.
You can see it right here on my Substack if you go back and look through old comments. I frequently get negative comments when talking about the financialization of our economy and what it has done to the income gap, services, opportunity, security, and independence of everyday people living in our country. I don't blame the people writing them, the threat is real.
For example, in response to one of my pieces on how the shareholder class is stripping our country for parts, one of my supporters, Norm, replied with the following:
"By "shareholder class" do you include the millions of Americans who have worked hard most of their life, saved, and invested in American businesses so they could retire comfortably in a home they own? Do you mean us heretofore loyal Democrats who support Democratic public servants up and down the ballot both financially and with our gifts of time? Just want to be clear who you are demonizing here."
The answer, Norm, is no. You are not the shareholder class.
You and millions of other hardworking Americans-- nurses, teachers, truck drivers, laborers, and even Marines (yes, they switched our pensions to this)-- are being held hostage by the shareholder class for their own massive profits. It's gotten to the point, as we saw this week, that we must stand behind Wall Street whenever their source of free wealth is in jeopardy because we won't survive old age with any measure of dignity unless we prop them up.
That's why you and your Republican neighbors and the top .01% all came together and took a stand against Trump's tariffs. Not because they were stupid, or because they were mean, or anything like that. There are thousands of things going on that are stupid and mean that America doesn't blink an eye at or do anything about. For God's sake, millions of American children are going to bed hungry tonight, and have gone to bed hungry for decades, and a small fraction of what we put toward making the stock market as risk-free as possible would have cured their hunger a thousand times over.
And the worst part is, that in order to keep stock prices up, for decades we have overspent, overleveraged, and gutted everything that was meant to protect us while the financiers gobbled up our companies and industries and stripped them for parts.
It's an American tragedy. And I mean that in the classical Greek tragedy way.
As I wrote about in [America the Business](https://substack.com/redirect/f6bc90e6-f8ca-442a-89c2-a1bc70560589?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), our country has been living off an inheritance of production and creativity as we slowly sold off and shipped overseas everything that our forefathers built between the Great Depression and the 1980s.
And although we don't talk about it a lot, we are slowly running out of things to sell off and ship away. And as that happens the cold hard truth that we never invested in anything is going to catch up to us. Given the current arrangement, that's going to push to more and more desperate measures to keep the market afloat and stave off any corrections to the value of stock indices that are artificially inflated by government money, massive tax cuts, and deregulation.
Unless something drastically changes, working people in this country will have no choice other than to watch it happen and pray that they're dead by the time the whole thing crumbles down around us. That's the reality because the financiers made sure that the people who could least afford exposure to market risk are now the most exposed.
We can still break free, but the only path I see is to do something counter-intuitive: to let go of the desire to join in on the shareholder class's "free money" and ditch our reliance on the markets for reliance on one another and ourselves, by making social security a real and livable prospect for everyday Americans.
That move would free our country from making terrible finance-sector driven decisions, would un-tie us from a class of people who have created the greatest income inequality in a century, and, in the end, I suspect it would be far less costly for all of us to put our IRA and 401(k) contributions into a social security type system than it is for us to keep spending unfathomable sums and feeding inflation by propping up the stock market and the corrupt businesses that populate it.
The shareholder class, of course, knows that, and its why they fight everyday and spend billions in campaign contributions advocating for the opposite to happen-- for social security to be privatized.
If that vice ever closes, we truly will never escape.
If you have any other ideas for how to turn it around, I'd love to know. Please share them in the comments!
Lucas

name: Team Crow
subject: Trump is rigging the system against working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Donald Trump is failing to deliver on his promises to lower costs. Instead, he’s prioritizing a reckless trade war, increasing taxes with tariffs, and trying to push through more handouts for billionaires.

This administration has turned its back on everyday people.

Housing, health care, and groceries will only get more expensive for working people who are struggling to make ends meet.

Trump couldn’t care less — but Jason grew up in a working class family, and knows what it’s like to struggle and stretch a paycheck.

Growing up, Jason had minimum-wage jobs, worked construction, and joined the Army to pay for school. That’s why Jason is fighting so hard to create an economy that works for everyone — not just the ultra-wealthy.

Jason refuses to stand by and let leaders rig the system against working people. But to keep up this fight, he needs your help. If it’s within your budget, please chip in to support his campaign: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-apr25]

We need to lower costs, boost wages, and invest in opportunities for every family to create an economy that works for all of us.

Jason is in this fight because he knows what’s at stake, but he needs you on his team.

Thank you for standing with us,

Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
